Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

Peter, I fully support President Trump. But I’m concerned - you’re not on our Trump supporter list and your membership is currently marked PENDING... See Your Status Below NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com MEMBERSHIP:PENDING DEADLINE: 12 HOURS SUGGESTED DONATION: Don’t wait, Peter, we’ve re-opened this membership for the next 12 hours. Are you going to say no to supporting President Trump? | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. name: Jirair Ratevosian
subject: A huge thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jirair Ratevosian for Congress
body:
Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/zXToNFXV4kioy6WMrocbTQ2?unsubscribedata=UcFVS3kH436o4UVwr9uEqUOBdS6BwG89uFfz6tHQiOMiRnsiR4oWwcpN%2Fx65q2vgWpWGwNRf9GE%2BrolyeckyrG0yasyQRQQrsZInxLF7PVbNx2PQHUiZXDV4lHDF6sigwLtlgbXQrZuMs%2Bg54lKI9cWvICb9qBtEepmvksraBDDuePTvb528VuEp68JvSF3LwtQKC314PBdaRBAQcdZbIWdHEJ%2F6DlAUO4sGIYj0iT6xrBUk20FusYtlGwQ5hlny4nFVCFgS7XCVFpQglMD1pc%2FKKobQHUQmARBRfhEcM%2BjTY8cjcFxiDTADjc92ziDSG8mPhut43rthiFnyjaO3Pvflqg8VnVnZVezogf1IlliQzs9dGzObyRaOrvvRILu4Os%2BcjKDdXupRP7yndyn1EcncvYeY6RCVkKZxEgWZUZ2Yqoijr%2BR5HqOtvS%2F1WYwb)

| |
---
Hi Peter,

I need to stop and say a huge thank you!!

Last year, especially the last few months, has been incredible for both my personal and professional lives. I launched my congressional campaign, married my amazing and supportive husband Michael, advocated for the communities I'm passionate about, and worked my way up to become a leading candidate in a CROWDED primary.**I couldn't have done any of this without your support. Thank you!** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76483084/447652376/1834572481?refcode=JR_EM_FR_010423_1_1_ThankYou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFiODllN2ItNWVhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6X4SJ1LyfjmN06Zg3YkAL_QnUWGZzO4wJqD0STnbkx8=)
---
Your support means everything to me. You are the reason I am in this race. I'm beyond grateful for the opportunity to have worked with you this past year. Together, we have made steps toward making this country free and safe for all peoples and communities.

I believe 2024 will be even better! With this primary election **less than 2 months** away, we are ramping up our efforts to further stand out in this highly competitive race. Your continued support is crucial, and I cannot thank you enough for your generous donations, work, and dedication to this campaign.

[**If you want to help further our efforts, please consider chipping in. We are so close to election day, and every little bit counts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76483085/447652377/1834572481?refcode=JR_EM_FR_010423_1_1_ThankYou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmFiODllN2ItNWVhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6X4SJ1LyfjmN06Zg3YkAL_QnUWGZzO4wJqD0STnbkx8=)

clean_body: Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, I need to stop and say a huge thank you!! Last year, especially the last few months, has been incredible for both my personal and professional lives. I launched my congressional campaign, married my amazing and supportive husband Michael, advocated for the communities I'm passionate about, and worked my way up to become a leading candidate in a CROWDED primary.I couldn't have done any of this without your support. Thank you! | = Your support means everything to me. You are the reason I am in this race. I'm beyond grateful for the opportunity to have worked with you this past year. Together, we have made steps toward making this country free and safe for all peoples and communities. I believe 2024 will be even better! With this primary election less than 2 months away, we are ramping up our efforts to further stand out in this highly competitive race. Your continued support is crucial, and I cannot thank you enough for your generous donations, work, and dedication to this campaign. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me. Jirair * | = Meet Jirair An experienced federal policy leader, public health doctor and progressive voice for change, Jirair has dedicated his life to helping others and spent his career bringing diverse communities together to solve big challenges. name: Dave McCormick
subject: Let’s mobilize grassroots conservatives

body:
[](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fa3d9a64199547a198169cc50dc776f1&_e=qMONJDNpKpw-Z458ZEzDwk20ma__-SXzxCejAnavAMFq1NW_lBmcQjMCifkl6BMwcl0nmUDfKvT0yEBdmTYIMqB9jx1ljjzlNfGENunMrMKdilGOaJGa_rNqdgU_QHpMOVbLobGUxTG5icxZ_GMff_QbBtyufAwl89Ly8QWVrCgP0UGYmBnpaiCdJwiYRZ-dQBb4zTcANCxzz8Wotrser6YcfddQCYbSubhss0TTt3QG3oyB3Gwj2MqXHT7SaPkktjSvULDw7n9vn1rV0da6oKc8ssLpxfiMJ6hfh15V6aNNvCO4l_y_2fBNU77YdmAOj2fF42Sxtgr9Z71Etokm1CBBNWteKSgCr0iyhQVPjHNvjC32E3p1nbjvcY0IJA1_YMZyz41_-eg8xnMGlVCnXQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

You've heard from me.

You've heard from **Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, John Barrasso, Marco Rubio, Steve Daines, Marsha Blackburn, and Tom Cotton** about the importance of having skilled conservative leadership in Washington.

But many times, strong conservative candidates don't have the funding or resources to compete with the Democrats' deep pockets. I am not going to let that happen to our campaign.

**[That's why we're launching a grassroots election fund to help us mobilize grassroots conservatives ahead of the crucial 2024 elections!](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fa3d9a64199547a198169cc50dc776f1&_e=qMONJDNpKpw-Z458ZEzDwk20ma__-SXzxCejAnavAMFq1NW_lBmcQjMCifkl6BMwcl0nmUDfKvT0yEBdmTYIMqB9jx1ljjzlNfGENunMrMKdilGOaJGa_rNqdgU_QHpMOVbLobGUxTG5icxZ_GMff_QbBtyufAwl89Ly8QWVrCgP0UGYmBnpaiCdJwiYRZ-dQBb4zTcANCxzz8Wotrser6YcfddQCYbSubhss0TTt3RyEd-U1oF3cyKFxNhNOdgoHPEHTgmoz5XjDHq4kwFfqryAmR3Xgwta2hAGiMe6wBBRFYAZbcpBRY4ACeZsCXlGVVOxQFyN9KBrGczGA4xGL0w2zADGMbPiz11D-mYaI_xgS4yli-G4ggZFB4Vdeq87Ow5Hta12SqJl3gCNWX-v9Q%3D%3D)**

I am reaching out to you because we need your help in growing this effort. **[Will you chip in??](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fa3d9a64199547a198169cc50dc776f1&_e=qMONJDNpKpw-Z458ZEzDwk20ma__-SXzxCejAnavAMFq1NW_lBmcQjMCifkl6BMwcl0nmUDfKvT0yEBdmTYIMqB9jx1ljjzlNfGENunMrMKdilGOaJGa_rNqdgU_QHpMOVbLobGUxTG5icxZ_GMff_QbBtyufAwl89Ly8QWVrCgP0UGYmBnpaiCdJwiYRZ-dQBb4zTcANCxzz8Wotrser6YcfddQCYbSubhss0TTt3QoUf4K12y1Ff09-q3E_WUJW5iC7o1aTVFz6J5IqqYEKuqeuPx_-TQrM6JJmSoyMhjfy-pdSq0iLvgFX-xuYD3KxgEBp7gqhk8x60a6lFqFzk4yEp_JNOzrm3q5wHgAAu_IA6tMhBT1FLf9wK3zNzp1Q_HrVRaoIo-xjcz1kljcBw%3D%3D) **

_**[Here's what your donation will help fund:](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fa3d9a64199547a198169cc50dc776f1&_e=qMONJDNpKpw-Z458ZEzDwk20ma__-SXzxCejAnavAMFq1NW_lBmcQjMCifkl6BMwcl0nmUDfKvT0yEBdmTYIMqB9jx1ljjzlNfGENunMrMKdilGOaJGa_rNqdgU_QHpMOVbLobGUxTG5icxZ_GMff_QbBtyufAwl89Ly8QWVrCgP0UGYmBnpaiCdJwiYRZ-dQBb4zTcANCxzz8Wotrser6YcfddQCYbSubhss0TTt3QDdg8OKIKuzSJ31r7HL1hkeQq7Kn_7UvMEgNObAp8W4MPH9p0VjDC6wIo2kDCjHeVXRaiw8knyNmWnVJVXK9G4gR3zjdHNe0ElWbX2RyyQbPZ9xS0_U1sIqok3oe5-v4gPpEwwgad6ErYfhX4FgLHIj-kbhAtDC_DAmHqcqmmC5Q%3D%3D)**_
** -> Coordinate field teams
-> Recruit volunteers
-> Organize voter outreach efforts
-> Travel across the state for grassroots events
-> Identify and register voters
-> Reach more voters with our conservative message**

This ground game is how elections are won and your early investment will allow us to get our grassroots supporters in the field earlier and stronger. I can't overemphasize how important this is!

**[Fellow American, will you be an early supporter of this fund??](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fa3d9a64199547a198169cc50dc776f1&_e=qMONJDNpKpw-Z458ZEzDwk20ma__-SXzxCejAnavAMFq1NW_lBmcQjMCifkl6BMwcl0nmUDfKvT0yEBdmTYIMqB9jx1ljjzlNfGENunMrMKdilGOaJGa_rNqdgU_QHpMOVbLobGUxTG5icxZ_GMff_QbBtyufAwl89Ly8QWVrCgP0UGYmBnpaiCdJwiYRZ-dQBb4zTcANCxzz8Wotrser6YcfddQCYbSubhss0TTt3TB-iG6w33UBWTQN4YqUkjoI8bsKVX32W7IlIH0e-z-RZRdcsKxtMr6XKpzR4kW0JbpzjE4A16dQ3cQvqCIRVTHgvtcQrekOYn6e-pUHwU6lvOI2pkA_8aMR6vTS78wb9_w9WbVDCjKib2Y8gUeBzdD6U6FVNc-glV9OapXXIri-w%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your partnership in the success of our campaign!

You've heard from Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, John Barrasso, Marco Rubio, Steve Daines, Marsha Blackburn, and Tom Cotton about the importance of having skilled conservative leadership in Washington. But many times, strong conservative candidates don't have the funding or resources to compete with the Democrats' deep pockets. I am not going to let that happen to our campaign. I am reaching out to you because we need your help in growing this effort. -> Coordinate field teams -> Recruit volunteers -> Organize voter outreach efforts -> Travel across the state for grassroots events -> Identify and register voters -> Reach more voters with our conservative message This ground game is how elections are won and your early investment will allow us to get our grassroots supporters in the field earlier and stronger. I can't overemphasize how important this is! Thank you for your partnership in the success of our campaign! \- Dave McCormick Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick. Our mailing address is: PO BOX 23537 PITTSBURGH, PA 15222

body:
Just five seats represent the battle for the Senate Majority. Pitch in now to provide direct support to these critical races!
**Five Senate candidates need your help today, Fellow American.**

Tough conservatives are taking on sitting Democrats, and running for open seats, across the country. These are the races that will decide the Senate. More details:

_In West Virginia, Joe Manchin is NOT to run for re-election, and[**Gov. Jim Justice**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e0bc2a9ac09e482dad771e533015c725&_e=Nt7DnLxfMYhvLEYlD8XT5eNGIFcrM17lzLIEGsWgrKP0kQWMjZV0UBlf-p3DPHPSYNjGc0SxJ5CA2OJ827M40mlSIBpgqlb6Q48xyDz5i_PaDHoin_-_ogldOYlmxlUgrLqLToDY4TaqopgIPmAVFeAyFdrGnmKDPc7VQQ7kh_19GB4alX-56t8mFPANBB5ZB5P3Z6Gcw9Qu_CkDJTC4ZAiseeknM-XznPEqcg7s0_Q5vtSo8YddBQN6lqf8j2Zd8AFr_Lpb-NdM-u9OfuCVJqvj7SYttwTAEF54pSYe4gg5uYAwONp475PFI_ha1dsNsQMX5v-ngpVdVazAbB29sZGrkRLpHtmAHOlQv8TBy8iSoSqM-TzZD4Fyvm8MgvtapVQ9JdQ-R1cjZ1T-BreuaKQoNLVkE_SYaMV7DFlp8gk%3D) can flip the seat.

In Montana, Democrat Jon Tester is up against [**Tim Sheehy**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e0bc2a9ac09e482dad771e533015c725&_e=Nt7DnLxfMYhvLEYlD8XT5eNGIFcrM17lzLIEGsWgrKP0kQWMjZV0UBlf-p3DPHPSYNjGc0SxJ5CA2OJ827M40mlSIBpgqlb6Q48xyDz5i_PaDHoin_-_ogldOYlmxlUgrLqLToDY4TaqopgIPmAVFeAyFdrGnmKDPc7VQQ7kh_19GB4alX-56t8mFPANBB5ZB5P3Z6Gcw9Qu_CkDJTC4ZAiseeknM-XznPEqcg7s0_Q5vtSo8YddBQN6lqf8j2Zd8AFr_Lpb-NdM-u9OfuCVJqJZugIpMuM5YzqO-aDvLLMGnrTlIHmfBRMYVw5Tapjq0CUBT4jh-2e4SOMMaDB6nIKdcFPdfNsr8pc8gck-0O2TxvL91pewgfUMArBxH71GSsJLv2GNXZYZcjeofpqGfYqd3i_qyoL4gddUk03yLIU%3D), a tough conservative, and fellow veteran, who can win.

In Ohio, there are several strong GOP challengers running against [**Sherrod Brown**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e0bc2a9ac09e482dad771e533015c725&_e=Nt7DnLxfMYhvLEYlD8XT5eNGIFcrM17lzLIEGsWgrKP0kQWMjZV0UBlf-p3DPHPSYNjGc0SxJ5CA2OJ827M40mlSIBpgqlb6Q48xyDz5i_PaDHoin_-_ogldOYlmxlUgrLqLToDY4TaqopgIPmAVFeAyFdrGnmKDPc7VQQ7kh_19GB4alX-56t8mFPANBB5ZB5P3Z6Gcw9Qu_CkDJTC4ZAiseeknM-XznPEqcg7s0_Q5vtSo8YddBQN6lqf8j2Zd8AFr_Lpb-NdM-u9OfuCVJpN7Mc5llo3x-IpuS1YtHuOWLOZgmQwhnGZImkwuAI25WRL4MilioofCSmLzcjRxRQDDDhnmMwWdhtZx7PEFVPCoM_hA4cydEpEhTp-UthhA9xAJeUoNfaDIINsAenns-SLL0uhgUKweWS0iVI_9EkI%3D). With an early investment, we can win this seat.

In Pennsylvania, another veteran, [**David McCormick**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e0bc2a9ac09e482dad771e533015c725&_e=Nt7DnLxfMYhvLEYlD8XT5eNGIFcrM17lzLIEGsWgrKP0kQWMjZV0UBlf-p3DPHPSYNjGc0SxJ5CA2OJ827M40mlSIBpgqlb6Q48xyDz5i_PaDHoin_-_ogldOYlmxlUgrLqLToDY4TaqopgIPmAVFeAyFdrGnmKDPc7VQQ7kh_19GB4alX-56t8mFPANBB5ZB5P3Z6Gcw9Qu_CkDJTC4ZAiseeknM-XznPEqcg7s0_Q5vtSo8YddBQN6lqf8j2Zd8AFr_Lpb-NdM-u9OfuCVJkYnWZvCN0JGeYEbjAr5NBqkYZddkfVWhv0XejnnJZ4bHaBiNirWyVZqbLbwAgOIRUK8ED49Byv0c_wCzxsU1JPzZfcmqNhgzTwWNR73FS2HjjMUn-PUpYFlKV5ekO7bfKuNTzJfLvpSoI_G4ehyIQo%3D), is taking on Democrat Bob Casey. It’ll be as close as it gets.

And in Arizona, [**Kari Lake**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e0bc2a9ac09e482dad771e533015c725&_e=Nt7DnLxfMYhvLEYlD8XT5eNGIFcrM17lzLIEGsWgrKP0kQWMjZV0UBlf-p3DPHPSYNjGc0SxJ5CA2OJ827M40mlSIBpgqlb6Q48xyDz5i_PaDHoin_-_ogldOYlmxlUgrLqLToDY4TaqopgIPmAVFeAyFdrGnmKDPc7VQQ7kh_19GB4alX-56t8mFPANBB5ZB5P3Z6Gcw9Qu_CkDJTC4ZAiseeknM-XznPEqcg7s0_Q5vtSo8YddBQN6lqf8j2Zd8AFr_Lpb-NdM-u9OfuCVJo652g4C21IuX7ryA0tQLbZdKkFqBIuft7oj9dfGM7a1lVa8XG3xl5i4Q3xOpX_WOiD9AlWwe4XZp6JlPRBY8Rkh_Ql89SCAx2jAVmYhLNczcwL4ZLXIlwfK_b9LaAESIznnzIDttVGtmgg-2XgXw3w%3D) can defeat Sen. Kyrsten Sinema and Democrat Reuben Gallago._
We can win all five of these elections — and we [**cannot**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e0bc2a9ac09e482dad771e533015c725&_e=Nt7DnLxfMYhvLEYlD8XT5eNGIFcrM17lzLIEGsWgrKP0kQWMjZV0UBlf-p3DPHPSYNjGc0SxJ5CA2OJ827M40mlSIBpgqlb6Q48xyDz5i_PaDHoin_-_ogldOYlmxlUgrLqLToDY4TaqopgIPmAVFeAyFdrGnmKDPc7VQQ7kh_19GB4alX-56t8mFPANBB5ZB5P3Z6Gcw9Qu_CkDJTC4ZAiseeknM-XznPEqcg7s0_Q5vtSo8YddBQN6lqf8j2Zd8AFr_Lpb-NdM-u9OfuCVJgMqj2xvvw8a9_z4w0ibL9ul8ofZdPLX2puPx3byDXjn1oWX2zTx_caVeqKr9VCmCRWQhv7jT-_pkwIAGy8nTvilmhRps3fggLhw8ksXGAdUxR7i2rA2P3n0LcWD5WpCI_kFNpRBL4NUvWZW_Gf-U98%3D) risk losing even one of them.

I’m asking you to split a donation between [**all five**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e0bc2a9ac09e482dad771e533015c725&_e=Nt7DnLxfMYhvLEYlD8XT5eNGIFcrM17lzLIEGsWgrKP0kQWMjZV0UBlf-p3DPHPSYNjGc0SxJ5CA2OJ827M40mlSIBpgqlb6Q48xyDz5i_PaDHoin_-_ogldOYlmxlUgrLqLToDY4TaqopgIPmAVFeAyFdrGnmKDPc7VQQ7kh_19GB4alX-56t8mFPANBB5ZB5P3Z6Gcw9Qu_CkDJTC4ZAiseeknM-XznPEqcg7s0_Q5vtSo8YddBQN6lqf8j2Zd8AFr_Lpb-NdM-u9OfuCVJixRrq81jRAkCCvR0hDtfSYfJtw3ZazOpSuBvfSxcgl8VvpVA2ZDWa44IVVGiuzRYEE7VCFsnDIGhUGhSwGtJ156uY2EHKJ51jqFVPgHP1hE4k0jRn5g9c_-25mWstZBxEPNKowAKajXkONyzzWLSTg%3D) of these races. It will immediately be used to invest in victory come November.

[**Pitch in $10, $15, $25, or even more.>>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e0bc2a9ac09e482dad771e533015c725&_e=Nt7DnLxfMYhvLEYlD8XT5eNGIFcrM17lzLIEGsWgrKP0kQWMjZV0UBlf-p3DPHPSYNjGc0SxJ5CA2OJ827M40mlSIBpgqlb6Q48xyDz5i_PaDHoin_-_ogldOYlmxlUgrLqLToDY4TaqopgIPmAVFeAyFdrGnmKDPc7VQQ7kh_19GB4alX-56t8mFPANBB5ZB5P3Z6Gcw9Qu_CkDJTC4ZAiseeknM-XznPEqcg7s0_Q5vtSo8YddBQN6lqf8j2Zd8AFr_Lpb-NdM-u9OfuCVJloYTXDZSqyai4UhzgQ2q2WjeDPv5lTpXA39mHOUrn5lwDC6if-OoN9SdbvsOQQWk1nUjk0lZ8c7FlmQfaa9Qt6yCf43axmzG_94yYhemCTx7F7FoMS8SXxn6KMt2TfNPAY1IA_B3Zg5MVczTVDzG3A%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=e0bc2a9ac09e482dad771e533015c725&_e=Nt7DnLxfMYhvLEYlD8XT5eNGIFcrM17lzLIEGsWgrKP0kQWMjZV0UBlf-p3DPHPSYNjGc0SxJ5CA2OJ827M40mlSIBpgqlb6Q48xyDz5i_PaDHoin_-_ogldOYlmxlUgrLqLToDY4TaqopgIPmAVFeAyFdrGnmKDPc7VQQ7kh_19GB4alX-56t8mFPANBB5ZB5P3Z6Gcw9Qu_CkDJTC4ZAiseeknM-XznPEqcg7s0_Q5vtSo8YddBQN6lqf8j2Zd8AFr_Lpb-NdM-u9OfuCVJr9JH7Ziod9vhwuKsQL2jLa3h5oN3AxDKZq4DTkb5Xu1K8VrdIjulLEVK77tsW8STouCEwrUwePlMvBlFYpX1HVxEFG-zUdoBR2c8Cbjb6FHDRMWlDlxwP2m7hmDc6-5Fm72rK7ICRUWW0UU2hJoefI%3D)
As I’ve said before, if we lose in 2024, we’re done.

But if we take back the White House, keep the House, and flip the Senate, we’ll have a chance to make America strong again.

We have a plan to stop the Marxist Left in its tracks.

**The first step is sending reinforcements to the Senate, and that’s why I need every tough conservative to split a donation between these key races ASAP.**

body:
We’re facing down six upcoming special elections in the next few weeks. That means six opportunities to elect state Democrats who can continue fighting for our progressive agenda. | | |

We’re facing down six upcoming special elections in the next few weeks. **That means _six_ opportunities to elect state Democrats who can continue fighting for our progressive agenda and push _back_ against GOP extremism.** In the past year, we’ve seen Republicans stop at nothing to destroy our democracy and strip away our fundamental freedoms. With record-high numbers of anti-LGBTQ+ bills and countless attacks on voting rights, it’s clear that **electing state Democrats is the _best_ way to protect our future. ** **Over the next few weeks, we’ll have a chance to power our work in 2024 – but we need your support to cross the finish line.** [Chip in now to help state Democrats defeat their extreme opponents in upcoming races nationwide →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6Pvh4jlTa6sqD_E1qrXe7r2xQYH14Xoriz4M__PN8KexmCocaQ9U8EVIv3ydOUlVIH7Ts8_M2k_HoowBWc973XFmWk405NfgE4cFgXsb_gGF0FzTVqvOslwy6QSINjFtkdDwOwV5FunrnIqNIMbPJwUP9ZSKGmza7fmfgPxBPXCEU1PGPWa-kChYSNar2E2NiWDKjs3wwr80uPUbmmByaCFXNcz9UAd1ENgyzDcQSxx6VCRL3kk7LxQiPjq7Q06IrX_TxsqNsUlZb2tyN0nbsUwNLnrJGy2f0dIGQMUKQCHpz_yMAyJr3ziGQPOHy7IV1fsfZgpGEU_U82rG_VtU5xX4btwlNQlqX1ihe5kkruw8Nu5c2WRGRysJ-yK_7GW1-NA/42q/X1-QT7lKTHOtd9-fWb_f-A/h0/xbwGh9y3e9kAzjL0Y6MHHwiR12ksfimhGrdUNfEyVBc) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

We’re on a winning streak. Last year, Democrats secured victories in over 30 special elections, defended our majority in the Pennsylvania House, expanded our power in New Jersey and New Hampshire, and fended off a right-wing trifecta in Virginia.
Each victory brings a direct, positive impact to our communities. Democrats are fighting to increase the minimum wage, protect our democracy, protect abortion, and so much more.
Our state legislators have a huge impact on our day-to-day lives – and we must continue electing Democrats committed to advancing our Democratic agenda in our state legislatures.
**Can we count on your support?**
[Donate to help state Democrats across the country take on their GOP opponents and win before the polls close in our next special election →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6Pvh4jlTa6sqD_E1qrXe7r2xQYH14Xoriz4M__PN8KexmCocaQ9U8EVIv3ydOUlVIH7Ts8_M2k_HoowBWc973XFmWk405NfgE4cFgXsb_gGF0FzTVqvOslwy6QSINjFtkdDwOwV5FunrnIqNIMbPJwUObYzhIB5iGpnNEf0PogIIqcDcfiVgzdkfTQ3yZ_wLdfGZvLpN3K8jUW4_TlxjH0oW9FNF4iUTYQqa8bvpHFsPtYv4MYSvaMGOfb30EE7xcSY2EU0e9JjM5aWQSFrqwOtiMYEPi0n5Qho_d2GmbQ7O0uX7Driwk_CUHlgkj-mhCok6RmYuav4xSR04wO6l_3WfnesKZUiUln-d5bz-yuZOUBpffOzyZkOQy896DsLeEQA/42q/X1-QT7lKTHOtd9-fWb_f-A/h6/74_pDd1hZjYrPeXYfk3B5rac_ewRpbi6CuUT4tLt7Pk)

clean_body: We’re facing down six upcoming special elections in the next few weeks. That means six opportunities to elect state Democrats who can continue fighting for our progressive agenda. | | | | | ---|--- We’re facing down six upcoming special elections in the next few weeks. That means six opportunities to elect state Democrats who can continue fighting for our progressive agenda and push back against GOP extremism. In the past year, we’ve seen Republicans stop at nothing to destroy our democracy and strip away our fundamental freedoms. With record-high numbers of anti-LGBTQ+ bills and countless attacks on voting rights, it’s clear that electing state Democrats is the best way to protect our future. Over the next few weeks, we’ll have a chance to power our work in 2024 – but we need your support to cross the finish line. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We’re on a winning streak. Last year, Democrats secured victories in over 30 special elections, defended our majority in the Pennsylvania House, expanded our power in New Jersey and New Hampshire, and fended off a right-wing trifecta in Virginia. Each victory brings a direct, positive impact to our communities. Democrats are fighting to increase the minimum wage, protect our democracy, protect abortion, and so much more. Our state legislators have a huge impact on our day-to-day lives – and we must continue electing Democrats committed to advancing our Democratic agenda in our state legislatures. Can we count on your support? Let’s go! Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. Dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to DLCC PAC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and DLCC PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. name: Katie Porter
subject: I hate to be this negative, but I really could lose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KATIE PORTER FOR SENATE]
body:
[ https://act.katieporter.com/go/14559?t=1001&akid=35924%2E3422442%2EywAt7S ]Katie Porter for Senate

Derek,

I’m a straight shooter, and I take a lot of pride in these emails being
honest and transparent. That means telling you I could lose our race for
the U.S. Senate.

Two December polls show me being pushed out of the primary. That means my
time in Congress would come to an end.

Here’s why: California has a unique system. The top two vote-getters in
March’s primary advance to the general election in November. Early polling
suggests that I am in a very strong position to win the general election,
no matter the other candidate, but the math in this primary is weird. A
celebrity Republican is gaining traction in the polls, and he could
advance to second place and keep us from qualifying for the general
election.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240104-2?refcode=EMAP24_2_LOS_20240104_V1_F&refcode2=35924_3422442_ywAt7S&akid=35924%2E3422442%2EywAt7S ]Can you donate $5 today to help me communicate with
voters and become California’s next U.S. Senator?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240104-2?refcode=EMAP24_2_LOS_20240104_V1_F&refcode2=35924_3422442_ywAt7S&akid=35924%2E3422442%2EywAt7S ]Donate ›››

Thanks for being a part of our team.

Katie

Peter Willis, we’re about
to go LIVE!

TONIGHT at 8:30pm ET / 5:30 PT — Our Revolution’s Peace for All Town Hall
with U.S. Reps. Barbara Lee and Rashida Tlaib, and peace activists around
the country.

We will discuss the urgent need for a ceasefire in Israel-Gaza and the
diplomatic and legislative solutions being put on the table!

Progressives are leading the call for a Ceasefire, but now the AIPAC lobby
is set on spending $100 MILLION to try to defeat our strongest peace
champions in Congress in 2024. We must stand together in the push for
peace.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8763?t=1013&akid=5143%2E5885482%2EsiryJC ]CLICK HERE TO JOIN THE ZOOM!

Progressives are under attack for calling for an end to the indiscriminate
bombing of Palestinian civilians and children — and we must have one
another’s backs.

Rashida Tlaib was censured simply for standing on principle. And, Barbara
Lee is taking on the establishment as the Peace Candidate in the U.S.
Senate race in California. We need these strong anti-war voices in
Congress.

Tune in now! [ https://ourrevolution.zoom.us/j/993867009 ]https://ourrevolution.zoom.us/j/993867009

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Lucas
subject: [gif] Josh Hawley’s infamous cowardice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Three years ago this week...
#
Peter — on the morning of January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley pumped his fist at rioters outside the U.S. Capitol. You know the moment:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42221?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42221?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP)**
**Then, when those same rioters stormed the building hours later, Hawley showed us who he really is** — just a fraud and a coward who runs from threats to our democracy.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42221?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42221?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP)**
Missourians can’t afford another six years of Hawley’s cowardice in the U.S. Senate. That’s why I’m running to replace him.
**I’m Lucas Kunce, the 13-year Marine veteran, antitrust advocate, and Democrat on a mission to defeat Josh Hawley and take back power for working people.** We’ve built a record-breaking grassroots movement without a cent from corporate PACs to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and put everyday Missourians in charge of our country.
The GOP insiders supporting Hawley know we can win. So they spent all last year spending BIG to tear me and our movement down. Now that it’s officially election year, there’s no telling what else they’ll do to keep their grip on this seat. So I’m asking:
**[Will you rush your first donation to my campaign today so we can defeat Josh Hawley? Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any GOP Senator running for re-election this year, and with multiple recent polls confirming this race is in a statistical tie, we have a real opportunity to flip this Senate seat in November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42221?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42222?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42222?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42222?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42222?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42222?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42222?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42221?refcode=em20240104-4535&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4535%2E614464%2ExnnNAP)

Thanks for all your help,
Lucas Kunce

**Five Senate candidates need your help today, Fellow American.**

Tough conservatives are taking on sitting Democrats, and running for open seats, across the country. These are the races that will decide the Senate. More details:

_In West Virginia, Joe Manchin is NOT to run for re-election, and[**Gov. Jim Justice**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=05b0aa8e542e42b090c0db96770e26bf&_e=aJbhVfcX2RM9N1vOSj3Ieryzr73Yu7jbM3cHbKFpBviT-M-A5_s7Yq4nEGEGXPCCVMxWEVgnkPmb68ZAq7EBWJqzoi6gf86CA-LtpmpaVX7hLeg05GVqG_udH1E8WnK-fQ78M0VDyK71rUb8YBwUD0ww6l92pqelMF4AmgipPHUMTOPAaG1H3UN_o1TJY7cmPdHKjxse6M_saAVn86VaTN2yWiatjgpPcMSakivL_STWfknwTFH-6zp_iXMvrXZi14uCzeVNQHO6qfWsxc1142kyUrgcjfPAwA5ClEy7ENIrBzH3lgTakDPdgFHkDuBI3FT2NPdl0W7RtkiBLzzqIBumw36neM8LTWpAAlvIM1sTtv95coADUzoLrEjWvgInvCNcNbKRmdx5urVyLSg8iFS4GhHz1M4y0YdA0qMj8n4%3D) can flip the seat.

name: Diane Sare

body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230102_join_the_friends_of_s&n=1)
---
Friend [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k1icCOtNiMwyoZncTHZnrBU&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230102_join_the_friends_of_s&n=2)
## Why has not one single member of Congress demanded an investigation into President Biden's role in the Nord Stream Pipeline detonation?
This is why my campaign for U.S. Senate must become a flagship campaign to save our Republic from the billionaires club which wants to colonize us again. I am not going to get any help from the mainstream media which is owned by the same corporations which are making money by killing people all over the world, and putting American's lives and security in jeopardy. Therefore, my campaign must be based on people to people hands on organizing and canvassing. That's how I became the only independent candidate to achieve ballot status in the State of New York when I ran against Chuck Schumer in 2022, and it's going to be harder this time. The petitioning begins on April 16, and I need 400 volunteers to get this done. Thanks to a lawsuit, in which I was a co-plaintiff, out of state petitioners can collect signatures of registered New York voters as well, so all non-New York State residents are welcome to join this campaign! | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
January 4th, 2024
Contact: Duane Dichiara
Phone: (916) 997-4784
---
| **Congressman John Duarte Endorsed by ****California Republican Party**** **
---
| | **Modesto, CA – **Today, John Duarte officially reports an endorsement from the California Republican Party for his re-election campaign to California Congressional District 13. The California Republican Party’s endorsement is a testament to Congressman Duarte’s record of supporting policies that foster economic growth, strengthen public safety, and help hard-working people achieve the American dream.

“I am grateful to have earned an endorsement from the California Republican Party,” said Congressman Duarte. “This endorsement reflects our shared commitment towards promoting fiscal responsibility, safeguarding our local neighborhoods, and fighting for a future where the working people of Central Valley can thrive.”

John Duarte recognizes the common-sense policies that help create a brighter future for families in the Valley. That’s why John is working on policies that promote small businesses, lower inflation, and provide tax relief, helping working Californians keep more of their hard-earned income. John’s campaign continues to see growing support across the district as he addresses the unique needs of local communities and works across the aisle to bring real results to the Valley. For more information about John Duarte or the campaign, please visit [www.johnduarteforcongress.com](https://johnduarteforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d614871a572868b235b65477d&id=8f3a4bf63f&e=76a47b375f). ###

clean_body: | | | | This is our chance... Friend, Now that we are entering a MAJOR election year, I’m assembling an elite team of my top supporters – my Senate Rescue Team (SRT). And I’m inviting you to join,** Friend. In fact, this is so important that I’m requesting a list of all supporters who claim their Senate Rescue Team (SRT) Membership by MIDNIGHT tonight. Your Membership is absolutely critical to ensuring that we’re able to retake the Senate 2024 – and it could even determine the fate of our nation. Because without common sense conservatives who love this country, and the Constitution it was founded on – our country will never be the same.. This is your chance to save our great country, Friend. | We are entering one of the most critical election years of our lifetime. It’s up to us to ensure we have a strong start, that will carry us through the many challenges that we will no doubt face. But a strong start isn’t possible without your support,** Friend. So, can I count on you? | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | Senator Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA \-

name: Senator Tom Cotton
subject: Five seats to secure
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Just five seats represent the battle for the Senate Majority. Pitch in now to provide direct support to these critical races!
**Five Senate candidates need your help today, Peter.**

Tough conservatives are taking on sitting Democrats, and running for open seats, across the country. These are the races that will decide the Senate. More details:

_In West Virginia, Joe Manchin is NOT to run for re-election, and[**Gov. Jim Justice**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c2e44c6e99a94a4b8dd5980afea334f8&_e=qlWEGJjro0HCsbg19dINp2IO52aLa9ryLtJBCtKDBS0E4b8QYTHf3RXlbBz0UyEAteljm-e7TfcAAJnwPpdHyMrAylDqoPPV9xCFG4_PbtbH4pJCyHnuQYHZsYJ5HaiXbwuYvEYlEvHX7o4SMaMd5E74vFVxMDWKnQq8e8eluWLv4pF0IvQLqgqy5bTvv3sX0TjhCIPelc8HzmPmTu75mmDtS4vmjpFLMfUX3p7NLGsAc8-OKcbzY0xYwgsH_FsBswBl3jkv-gc4q7GC1t5N173Vue7R20xRwvHEJdNI2MLW1bJ7aGyeRxyTzcJ35Xoyx5Q4bEooiWQaQVSoLzBiCIzMq1ITLnyC5Lax3-9AVFJYgzXtEOu7drs0jIPBqU5uj4bDxH72JLJY-3RofMVBCePh_iEaUQTymAQBYLmYn6CW3F1G3hFZcRD2q-Xh-U8A) can flip the seat.

In Montana, Democrat Jon Tester is up against [**Tim Sheehy**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c2e44c6e99a94a4b8dd5980afea334f8&_e=qlWEGJjro0HCsbg19dINp2IO52aLa9ryLtJBCtKDBS0E4b8QYTHf3RXlbBz0UyEAteljm-e7TfcAAJnwPpdHyMrAylDqoPPV9xCFG4_PbtbH4pJCyHnuQYHZsYJ5HaiXbwuYvEYlEvHX7o4SMaMd5E74vFVxMDWKnQq8e8eluWLv4pF0IvQLqgqy5bTvv3sX0TjhCIPelc8HzmPmTu75mmDtS4vmjpFLMfUX3p7NLGsAc8-OKcbzY0xYwgsH_FsBswBl3jkv-gc4q7GC1t5N173Vue7R20xRwvHEJdNI2MJ95TH-V_bOpzCfnOr0ztiRsVNjOs_5tjY4B4npHUjPtHsEpEX0xuK3_ozDjmNDBu2CDRN2qO2YWEtXdHt2saGNlN9ErXkkNpIsJxXrEripUGpzM-g_Hnt_sERucCiINPTUKYfg4dvHKdCkeOknCLO4), a tough conservative, and fellow veteran, who can win.

In Ohio, there are several strong GOP challengers running against [**Sherrod Brown**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c2e44c6e99a94a4b8dd5980afea334f8&_e=qlWEGJjro0HCsbg19dINp2IO52aLa9ryLtJBCtKDBS0E4b8QYTHf3RXlbBz0UyEAteljm-e7TfcAAJnwPpdHyMrAylDqoPPV9xCFG4_PbtbH4pJCyHnuQYHZsYJ5HaiXbwuYvEYlEvHX7o4SMaMd5E74vFVxMDWKnQq8e8eluWLv4pF0IvQLqgqy5bTvv3sX0TjhCIPelc8HzmPmTu75mmDtS4vmjpFLMfUX3p7NLGsAc8-OKcbzY0xYwgsH_FsBswBl3jkv-gc4q7GC1t5N173Vue7R20xRwvHEJdNI2MKkKR1zVfZvxsOnGWT6pWFlr_d5Zs93xFBkhE8F4jNBWVCnl_TuwaIc3bqR2EmAor3qsiuaO31ub7ASNmIhL1Ttn9Nm7wnVtodIG0wA_jK0Bd-sKc--j3CYDQZZMRBqBKXaWUzNTHIAsmVkZAWF2tgY). With an early investment, we can win this seat.

In Pennsylvania, another veteran, [**David McCormick**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c2e44c6e99a94a4b8dd5980afea334f8&_e=qlWEGJjro0HCsbg19dINp2IO52aLa9ryLtJBCtKDBS0E4b8QYTHf3RXlbBz0UyEAteljm-e7TfcAAJnwPpdHyMrAylDqoPPV9xCFG4_PbtbH4pJCyHnuQYHZsYJ5HaiXbwuYvEYlEvHX7o4SMaMd5E74vFVxMDWKnQq8e8eluWLv4pF0IvQLqgqy5bTvv3sX0TjhCIPelc8HzmPmTu75mmDtS4vmjpFLMfUX3p7NLGsAc8-OKcbzY0xYwgsH_FsBswBl3jkv-gc4q7GC1t5N173Vue7R20xRwvHEJdNI2ML1bjoKeZuPMWavIKc0CKB1ebs39RoPz-7bJIYzEcfQSq8wwYfDgdVXvkp-rEk2RFrm00hQqYGXSavnkfaXCMIUjDcJmMautRR1PKD6G4C4gR50nmyigBoFMxrGfhOB-Y5hyFwD9hC44bm0WgathhQx), is taking on Democrat Bob Casey. It’ll be as close as it gets.

And in Arizona, [**Kari Lake**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c2e44c6e99a94a4b8dd5980afea334f8&_e=qlWEGJjro0HCsbg19dINp2IO52aLa9ryLtJBCtKDBS0E4b8QYTHf3RXlbBz0UyEAteljm-e7TfcAAJnwPpdHyMrAylDqoPPV9xCFG4_PbtbH4pJCyHnuQYHZsYJ5HaiXbwuYvEYlEvHX7o4SMaMd5E74vFVxMDWKnQq8e8eluWLv4pF0IvQLqgqy5bTvv3sX0TjhCIPelc8HzmPmTu75mmDtS4vmjpFLMfUX3p7NLGsAc8-OKcbzY0xYwgsH_FsBswBl3jkv-gc4q7GC1t5N173Vue7R20xRwvHEJdNI2MKoWhhcYOygQ4KzScE143-RTrdYI8vOaJRVljo25-ammvwXOGjivRMBzkZ7_xaXyNMfWqCycKFuN3VyriGlM2TdgirlDfzp5PY4kRG5iGV0aBEm8TdRwNCwvX6zQTGf3QLUuYgILSYK3S8ANV10V6DG) can defeat Sen. Kyrsten Sinema and Democrat Reuben Gallago._
We can win all five of these elections — and we [**cannot**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c2e44c6e99a94a4b8dd5980afea334f8&_e=qlWEGJjro0HCsbg19dINp2IO52aLa9ryLtJBCtKDBS0E4b8QYTHf3RXlbBz0UyEAteljm-e7TfcAAJnwPpdHyMrAylDqoPPV9xCFG4_PbtbH4pJCyHnuQYHZsYJ5HaiXbwuYvEYlEvHX7o4SMaMd5E74vFVxMDWKnQq8e8eluWLv4pF0IvQLqgqy5bTvv3sX0TjhCIPelc8HzmPmTu75mmDtS4vmjpFLMfUX3p7NLGsAc8-OKcbzY0xYwgsH_FsBswBl3jkv-gc4q7GC1t5N173Vue7R20xRwvHEJdNI2MITVtFaDm_0KKyB5r9fhKTgehT8uBe43HMHyTtLxe0cXDT5InNxxsOMTCfLSP1QuxxUVGf7kJA84EpCClmuNOZGN6yuwQy_BkEPx1JYi7rIXxp4VYds4pUbagHTs7_dqfZ9WM8igivyLftwKNv4IjE_) risk losing even one of them.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Donald Trump is holding 4 rallies this weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Trump is going to threaten and attack anyone who dares stand in his way. Including me and our campaign. In rally speech after rally speech.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4969%2E5257348%2E3vynUG)
Derek,
We are less than 2 weeks away from Republicans voting in the Iowa Caucus, and the presidential race is heating up. **You can tell because Donald Trump is holding _four_ rallies this weekend to energize his base.**
Let me be frank: Donald Trump is a danger to our country.
The former president _still_ refuses to accept the results of the last presidential election.
He is facing four criminal indictments spanning 91 charges, along with two civil lawsuits — while he attempts to bully and intimidate the judges, prosecutors, and witnesses to undermine the rule of law.
And he is making endorsements to install his handpicked allies in the Senate.
**_If given another four years in office, he's already embraced the role of being a demagogue and declared that he will be a “dictator on Day One.”_**
Trump is going to threaten and attack anyone who dares stand in his way. Including me and our campaign. In rally speech after rally speech.
It’s no wonder why he’s making me his villain, Derek: I've stood up to Donald Trump before — and he knows what I can and will do in the U.S. Senate to defend our democracy.
**[Will you add in a donation of $10 or more before Donald Trump takes the stage so we can protect our democracy and give Californians a strong fighter in the U.S. Senate?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2024_abs_em.sN9m5T&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240104_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4969%2E5257348%2E3vynUG)**

Jim Justice**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3259a61f01c14bf1b909e35aa8bab1e9&_e=uvb-vqGIySK01wA82J6c4Lr6naCZyGq0mnQ3zQ-H74F1LqQbztn5lIwLwBok0dSLUB9I4URTM-oEx0yooxOTb0ZZ2sXiyB8UVDcQI5HmEUrcO8iTjeZwgrue4prTwfxZ77vgoEzHQ4gsS0eH07dWBTkDaakDUIjQ1B0Fsu-5ruaqtbnHInTc4_uGRCeEWYTioccwWe-txxNrNv1eQS6BOG29nwStY4dXrrht5Vy79NOZNadMW5eFtZHuwnSi09osD19V75bfVbcyAsml8wqwaEqY1GtvkyhRI9ktBn9jozu-p51JOPngzSd1cGyuFLkkAiRd8XURPU-43XMvtNKgBLXHyavT99-pg2FpNwFwVIkxx1be2d9oYR_TAxfbXRwAs6_QzCQghg9SBe_catHlFJe2B-BmjondAkHXJ-uvkvE%3D) can flip the seat.

name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38614%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CrZ8m3NXraejrRyWOFU2Fg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38625%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iLqSaD6gboULJSebYn0EQA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38626%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N7LU8Ne4quoKDUArDcspUQ&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38627%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RHXi%2feO3pNNHrvBHSa5Fow&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zarb5ph0brak8mf4jnbratrs8ttihvm2mmnigln8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5im4ob7cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztj6qbdrt9vprpjdgopm53chqb8b7ppd38np7h48_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5im4ob7cdh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z49rdsj6rphu7n1jauttd1hr62qdllch5ekehb9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5im4ob7cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg47345e5deogr5bgs6qcubt0b1rg4jg4j8qrt38_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5im4ob7cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Caucus Room Member Communication
body:
No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-adrulkl-trhiujldw-j/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-adrulkl-trhiujldw-r/) **Caucus Room Members** **Caucus Room "Factory Reset" completed. Let's go!**Time to take the newly focused Caucus Room for a test drive!Begin forming groups with your neighbor Members. Use Group Names that are descriptive and will attract Members.
* Form a group together with your Republican County Chair.
* Form a group with your conservative neighbors to support a candidate or ballot initiative you are interested.
* Form a group with your neighbors to be the hands and feet of a state-wide or national group you are a part of or want to support.
* Form a group to discuss strategies for change, or prioritizing where to focus.
* Form a group to publicize activities and events.
* Form a group where issues can be debated in real time, virtually.
* Invite friends to join Caucus Room. The more the merrier.
* The list just keeps going.

We look forward to watching your creativity and energy express itself.Feedback about things going well or not so well is welcome and greatly appreciated. We are pretty sure issues will crop up, so let us know what is working well or what you would like to see improved.And we will provide you feedback on how things are going.Happy New Year!John CoorsManager, Caucus Room LLCjohnc@caucusroom.com

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-adrulkl-trhiujldw-y/) | CaucusRoom, LLCPO Box 745214Arvada, CO 80006 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-adrulkl-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-t) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-adrulkl-trhiujldw-i/)

He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e576b74e23d67de50ba5c564106c4a5b168deca9de26493a50396dd4efc0f96c7351a0cbd65fa7ab650254745914f134314a54b919d9ff98

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e576b74e23d67de50ba5c564106c4a5b168deca9de26493a50396dd4efc0f96c7351a0cbd65fa7ab650254745914f134314a54b919d9ff98

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, Last night, Ron DeSantis took on the liberal media once again for a live town hall in Iowa... In case you didn't get a chance to watch him in action, you don't have to miss the greatest moments of the night: 🟦 He raised the stakes in the 2024 election. 🟦 He made it clear what his plans are with the bureaucratic IRS. 🟦 He put in the work to EARN the support of Iowans and the American people. All eyes were on Gov. Ron DeSantis once again, and he did not disappoint. He likes nothing more than sitting down with the American people and explaining how he'd put his plans into action to save this country for us. We know there's a target on our back in Iowa, but we can rise above and WIN on January 15th if you help us fight today. Ron DeSantis has risen to the occasion, and the people of Iowa know he is the only one who has earned the support. He's proven it time and time again. It's time for us to fight for Ron DeSantis, and we have NO time to waste. Please,CHIP IN TODAY to help spread the word about this town hall victory and show Iowans that we're ready for their support at the upcoming caucus. CHIP IN $25 CHIP IN $50 CHIP IN $75 CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Another GOP Congressman Announces His Retirement

Republican Rep. Blaine Luetkemeyer of Missouri has announced his
retirement from the House of Representatives. The House Republican
Conference’s majority will have decreased by three seats after Bill
Johnson of Ohio’s resignation on Jan. 21, which was preceded by that
of Kevin McCarthy of California and the expulsion of George Santos of

Republican Rep. Blaine Luetkemeyer of Missouri has announced his retirement from the House of Representatives. The House Republican Conference’s majority will have decreased by three seats after Bill Johnson of Ohio’s resignation on Jan. 21, which was preceded by that of Kevin McCarthy of California and the expulsion of George Santos of New York.

subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47e95ba3223641d5907c6eec794f4e7d&_e=Kut-JAYH5PAOPiL0Mil-wQSaDrex88Cw5TGkTjAU55P2r-2tc-nP86yoHDqv0h1Qx5EWAG6-950fzhM_GHENjyqXd0mha3C2Jg17MaIv_CJq0vnJWSQu0ZsPW559S4htNUQc2c2KMQ2Yp0yYTEgAkysn0YpyV_zPVqTgGFE3MZPtWxdhzqx3cpGqlrl091tmegboVId0oN6EFXSV-UkWZf91FAJkUsds18I1XDAjGJ5xrtIhu-zWHQprj7tMU0MTriRpeuYoV_VyCIbgqjjoh_UyDHsb8DzFB5mRZfMBsv1z0wFELyY60GpyeklItO8q0X5BpFE1DbK9ZpBs2XO9wDD4hqphQmipjI6KhMk-m-dQcM-pSjREnk4Dw3tUQ7UsbhZrnYuotwna8tABudhBX4zqwENnKiJfFl2GfkLab29cLTbAHZEk4FHWjTAs7hds)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47e95ba3223641d5907c6eec794f4e7d&_e=Kut-JAYH5PAOPiL0Mil-wQSaDrex88Cw5TGkTjAU55P2r-2tc-nP86yoHDqv0h1Qx5EWAG6-950fzhM_GHENjyqXd0mha3C2Jg17MaIv_CJq0vnJWSQu0ZsPW559S4htNUQc2c2KMQ2Yp0yYTEgAkysn0YpyV_zPVqTgGFE3MZPtWxdhzqx3cpGqlrl091tmegboVId0oN6EFXSV-UkWZf91FAJkUsds18I1XDAjGJ5xrtIhu-zWHQprj7tMU0MTriRpeuYoV_VyCIbgqjjohw2zQGtQNHPGKRbVQ4UZuWz618C9eZX05D3JJiqRjyx0rTUCsqr3dHFOoKJc01jG2T96pd7KMu3BExgpdS5exSgHAVchxdD2K62NRW53_zb1fTLFEbwy87_9jpxTINn7x3jIeLfokueqbtzz04dCJtOm8m8yiNi3gPvxKBM6wb7A)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47e95ba3223641d5907c6eec794f4e7d&_e=Kut-JAYH5PAOPiL0Mil-wQSaDrex88Cw5TGkTjAU55P2r-2tc-nP86yoHDqv0h1Qx5EWAG6-950fzhM_GHENjyqXd0mha3C2Jg17MaIv_CJq0vnJWSQu0ZsPW559S4htNUQc2c2KMQ2Yp0yYTEgAkysn0YpyV_zPVqTgGFE3MZPtWxdhzqx3cpGqlrl091tmegboVId0oN6EFXSV-UkWZf91FAJkUsds18I1XDAjGJ5xrtIhu-zWHQprj7tMU0MTriRpeuYoV_VyCIbgqjjoh8Mr3qx4PHs336O7P5Tpo9HFzzOr0dt69OJFBR1dg4V9CRAzFMY9rAQMla7N1RGnISIiNTtACjDL6pp-Ir33fgisNmXkj-ylavCsV_kmdMpf_1tR95vF1QnexsvlwQcn99GoTwuDM-SuQqBHrGvWdGNdXc2g0QBhGd9GK4oXrIBD)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47e95ba3223641d5907c6eec794f4e7d&_e=Kut-JAYH5PAOPiL0Mil-wQSaDrex88Cw5TGkTjAU55P2r-2tc-nP86yoHDqv0h1Qx5EWAG6-950fzhM_GHENjyqXd0mha3C2Jg17MaIv_CJq0vnJWSQu0ZsPW559S4htNUQc2c2KMQ2Yp0yYTEgAkysn0YpyV_zPVqTgGFE3MZPtWxdhzqx3cpGqlrl091tmegboVId0oN6EFXSV-UkWZf91FAJkUsds18I1XDAjGJ5xrtIhu-zWHQprj7tMU0MTriRpeuYoV_VyCIbgqjjoh9K_7Jgs6a76Xb5LXlcON1p_Ap4cJZRJM8abvexW6_Je3yCIQeXNPSMrgOQ3NsrhM5804blQ7w4iGCU1XrUbBcQJFe_CgBJoV2ogNq5WgdL8JapwqpB5iYdq0Z0mNyo3ZlHMoA76tUYABgOqoRp1bPZbypU-SA6yE0viT1HrUgy4).

Kyle Murnen, '09

Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . ## Teenager Shoots Students at Iowa High School
A 17-year-old opened fire at a high school in Perry, Iowa, Thursday, [killing one sixth-grader](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OszAQAJ8GOqL1ejGkcPE16fK1VyL_rPGeHIzASpS3P-XqK0fTjObrvtydFNnW_-7BtqW6uNDkyYsaxgFpoT7axIyse7ZqAiKjZ4N9tpTCSJOC4BEMGSLtrt7F2YFPXgfsxSIggYJRwTjCeImToqRm5d0M0V9jR8BRWj0u31W2ljmVd33ycQn10RebW9vPTv_r8Nbhze0bv86P-sDRJBTu8LbzcbyHLGsezpBrLcOZa22yrYPUlxtU5BQMGmCYSBtEAqeVm5KGkJS_9oeN-0tKkdNMHcH6cFJ-A9pfN34CAAD__6J9X18) and wounding five others before killing himself, police said. The gunman was armed with a pump-action shotgun and a small-caliber handgun. Students [hid and fled during the shooting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8GbxcBxjYZPHTxlq4drTMcgQqbCK6x8vdVO3Xo8pa3PL2P23rDlNNxf8edZg5lRcfpSauCAbRZTefnQKSp72hWkzRm7O2ouzij9V4HHK1yXjprvdXODUFf-81NymKXZi21kUoOSg6DHC5-UiYoqza00m9XL4wkn7jUy2dJB0cK-VWeVC-u7F2eI_Ojif5N6EXohSPFlPOPE3qJZaeDzib00hiZ4ER2UejF9Pba9xZSOREaf3k6uIGn5mraCFzE0gADU4UWCzcIqZIHZHhQrS-I6R6huVhKhkz4pL8Ueunq7B9nyjm1cRJG3ndMv1Ed_3fvOwAA___SfnOL) while parents rushed to the school. The town of 80,000 held a vigil that evening for the injured students and the school principal, who was also shot. The suspect's motive remains unknown, police said. They're looking into "a number of social media posts" he made around the time of the shooting.
## New York Sues Texas Bus Firms for $700 Million
New York City Mayor Eric Adams [has sued 17 Texas](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PszAQhH-N6RatjflIQZG3oMvbpkQLXohP2I7wBu7-_Smpr5qRRho9eu638UZ-83H9T4F7WdJIs_iDRw01GDvawvULs-Gq4F63aG1TdY0pHn1bNZVpHXLjaKmoZnTsOmcuZNEQY-F7g8aixlpjXWNdulbbRXd6og7ddHHKIjsvaS-_ko_y4GX7SQfv5ZxCsfUPkWdW1VWZQZnhPM8y5PjelBk4wisrM0Q-3_HpvPsZyFHIkF-cYUk7tIgQ_Lb5FGHZUwDhb8owvTLMKTwpes7gI2wknAVCOhhoJR-zwJoOoGlKIsoMtMP1qoP8q-7F3rvn-T7NTassroH89mGWvwT-BgAA__-MZXOC) charter bus companies for $708 million in the latest effort to block migrants from Texas being bused into NYC. The suit targets only the bus companies and not the state of Texas. The lawsuit accuses the bus companies of illegally transporting [more than 33,000 migrants](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGP4yAUhH8N7p4FGGynoEjjLtedrrSezcPh1oAFJN78-1VW2m6rGWmk0afv322-od993P5gIFNdmnGt_kmzAA1SzaqxxhFJ6hoyYuBK9d3Yy-Zuej52nbOEy8r1gHJxyl7G9WK5QK1xabyRXCouuBZca65bOwjlxCgWHLldLpYpTtbXlNv_ycd6J7e_0pNyu6bQ7OZe61FYd2VyYnI6z7MNJb43JieK8ChMTpHOd_x0eKX8AauvLygPKrA8CqwpHBg9FXApQ80Yy5Fy9XGD4LeMsRZwOQWo9InvH8xwvYpQ01_dZGOP0--7L_3AFN8C-v0br_7m6isAAP__7ZBtWw) to New York and says $708 million is the amount it's spent to provide shelter and services to the migrants over the last two years. The charter bus companies couldn't be reached for comment Thursday. They're generally small businesses without press relations offices who work for the state under contract. _Editor's Note: If you like an entire newsletter dedicated to Texas stories,[sign up for The Texas Flyover with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7tyqzAQANCvkTp7dqUVj0IFMx463_aWjEAr2ESABxQn-fsUaVK4P835fx_uQbJs87-wsi9pH8JU5MkDXtzF0EA6-sRs2Gr2WANRZZvK6MWTCTVyjQlsCw7HiSKmlkNlHJIB1uINGAIEh-AcuGuskRI2OIYG4thGRcBRyn5c33bZysIpf-9PPq7Tvursl1Iep7KdMr0yfVm48Fc4_xhl-jXMMmXZ3pXtWdlbfHxKznJWtSKY1yD5F1YfZVX21nX68K-NLq_2PwEAAP__lnVagg). _
## ESPN Signs $900 Million Deal With NCAA
ESPN and the NCAA signed a new [$920 million media rights deal ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL_GdEZrYx-4cJGG7tKmRIu9HJsY-wTWofv7iNRpRiPNaDR6X_fpjpw4Pz5xI1-XMmGo_KJJSSu1mUwT_UKkqWvIqx6MuXXDTTerd10MSEMPCxpL8-BAIbiwzNbZ2Dto2GvQBhRYBdaCbWOvzKIGNeMAcXZRGKDIteztd-FcV1rSu7xob0PZmuTXWp-H6D6EHoUez_NsQ57DFQo9XtNCj6AuuVwOiBJzlHQ8s-T8Iwf5Jtyl0yA3TolLlhtFRrnzY62HjISpXeuWmt3H53lVjlsvDDw25PR3ov5H5DcAAP__a3FgLQ)that triples the amount ESPN currently pays in return for rights to 40 NCAA championships, including the "March Madness" college women's basketball tournament. The eight-year deal will cost about $115 million annually, up from the current $40 million a year. It includes 21 women's sports championships, bringing new money to those sports. Included are rights to a [variety of women's sports](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2P4yAQQH8N7rBgGH-koLiGLtdeaWFmnHDCxgIUb_79Kltv_fSkp_fvvtx9TPF4_PU727blxYcWX7xoOUjABTuyGzOw6djqSSGOZh6he9pxGo3BYLTBTdNtC0RqWBFH9uus1tBFCwpQaTVoNQxq6GnSuOlZr35WtN5IoGKKLZf-f45He_KW3vnFpQ9575J9tnZWYf4IcALcdV091_P4QAEu5JT4wbKeubQqwNWWy1uAWwS4SAKcuQFqNWkB7gjey48s-avxQXIt2VPwtUlin-Qs91xYvtmX2hVL5xVTinWcBKrH7mP6KWq_7fkOAAD__zBcZgQ), including basketball, volleyball, gymnastics, softball, and baseball. Nearly 60% of the money is earmarked for women's sports, which has seen strong ratings growth. _Editor's Note: The world of college sports is changing, and it's bigger business than ever. If you want to keep up with the Name, Image, and Likeness changes in D1 athletics, sign up for NIL Wire[with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtu6zAQRL-G7CSQy4d4CxYXMNQ5bUqB5K6sDUTLkGkF-fvAiEu3B4ODmfk8T-fEK18vH6lSbPM2pdL4oEl3rgM7WYlxJgIykqIelLXeBA9yiZh8zgBDKOBwUJgoBTTGZU0YDDnJERRYpZXTyjnlehy0nXXQOQWF-R8Kqwi5bXv_tfG1LTSvP9tBe1-2Kte4tHa7C_NfwChgrOnCpc9EC_PxTAgYDy1gRDSYYDCdxwKddQm7lAN1KmBAKsY5n4QZqSZehTnh7ZvXle9-EFZdnvBP5h-tTvftsRcS5vRq8sKVkB9VmNNrkJV7fO-R7d2HvwEAAP__7uJv5A)._

clean_body: A 17-year-old opened fire at a high school in Perry, Iowa, Thursday, and wounding five others before killing himself, police said. | | | | | | FRIDAY, JANUARY 5, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1914, Henry Ford stunned the world by doubling his workers' wages to $5 a day to keep his newly invented assembly line rolling with minimum turnover. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . | Teenager Shoots Students at Iowa High School A 17-year-old opened fire at a high school in Perry, Iowa, Thursday, and wounding five others before killing himself, police said. The gunman was armed with a pump-action shotgun and a small-caliber handgun. Students while parents rushed to the school. The town of 80,000 held a vigil that evening for the injured students and the school principal, who was also shot. The suspect's motive remains unknown, police said. They're looking into "a number of social media posts" he made around the time of the shooting. New York Sues Texas Bus Firms for $700 Million New York City Mayor Eric Adams charter bus companies for $708 million in the latest effort to block migrants from Texas being bused into NYC. The suit targets only the bus companies and not the state of Texas. The lawsuit accuses the bus companies of illegally transporting to New York and says $708 million is the amount it's spent to provide shelter and services to the migrants over the last two years. The charter bus companies couldn't be reached for comment Thursday. They're generally small businesses without press relations offices who work for the state under contract. Editor's Note: If you like an entire newsletter dedicated to Texas stories,. ESPN Signs $900 Million Deal With NCAA ESPN and the NCAA signed a new triples the amount ESPN currently pays in return for rights to 40 NCAA championships, including the "March Madness" college women's basketball tournament. The eight-year deal will cost about $115 million annually, up from the current $40 million a year. It includes 21 women's sports championships, bringing new money to those sports. Included are rights to a , including basketball, volleyball, gymnastics, softball, and baseball. Nearly 60% of the money is earmarked for women's sports, which has seen strong ratings growth. Editor's Note: The world of college sports is changing, and it's bigger business than ever. If you want to keep up with the Name, Image, and Likeness changes in D1 athletics, sign up for NIL Wire. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9af275e41c74419843e3554041e4d30&_e=HfRsHrmg06ds23LCsZgJpzrbwFOpMH0-67hFUJY3uTvmbhFxmmrBZtvgz0ahesRgHjuD35YZq3NozQPlbGiJAryQaZubJgIjWSPPF2fbqIDFafxX8MY_AvZBNPA2sdytcQqSla_20HHrHl52aljCrA98uJmtd83hZUwA3lkjVS4F5Cw4NGLxa5Tup0l-TAC69JMYCJwGQLOAFWtN_sn6Q08MQO3xU-sV9xAjHoteQwZNCaRjTbFFo1UpXLZXDdfUEqi4-3fiBcocopc4ELDBVeUE2ggKEibOyS9H0j_oymLkfz5y6AwqQPvk1XKjRBiM1WkvT3edwzFYpAdIzj1_3OOcDrbOGfPHWVWhHpuaoZuzgs24eHXD5X3oqyGfbrLsrDgWeIO0HcWSryTtw_DDnGuN0dRY0mJ_SHSC4H5d-n7SowImsHMjr1vhyhMsoTk9)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9af275e41c74419843e3554041e4d30&_e=HfRsHrmg06ds23LCsZgJpzrbwFOpMH0-67hFUJY3uTvmbhFxmmrBZtvgz0ahesRgHjuD35YZq3NozQPlbGiJAryQaZubJgIjWSPPF2fbqIDFafxX8MY_AvZBNPA2sdytcQqSla_20HHrHl52aljCrA98uJmtd83hZUwA3lkjVS4F5Cw4NGLxa5Tup0l-TAC69JMYCJwGQLOAFWtN_sn6Q08MQO3xU-sV9xAjHoteQwZNCaRjTbFFo1UpXLZXDdfUEqi4-3fiBcocopc4ELDBVa6_gf0zVlSQXZsSPNTUz92rjNVOZ4xvNXiBhZSVrG4_5LNfhm7U38GTQsI4w5PNtietGu8DHMCW26Dzp0T_yzGLEIXHka2Fq-btuP6Ct8vfrvv8_fLs1ldwfoHXgBYuQR9DV8e8WEgujda7jzTlDw99KHpQRuPejyjN9_qs9Jlg)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9af275e41c74419843e3554041e4d30&_e=HfRsHrmg06ds23LCsZgJpzrbwFOpMH0-67hFUJY3uTvmbhFxmmrBZtvgz0ahesRgHjuD35YZq3NozQPlbGiJAryQaZubJgIjWSPPF2fbqIDFafxX8MY_AvZBNPA2sdytcQqSla_20HHrHl52aljCrA98uJmtd83hZUwA3lkjVS4F5Cw4NGLxa5Tup0l-TAC69JMYCJwGQLOAFWtN_sn6Q08MQO3xU-sV9xAjHoteQwZNCaRjTbFFo1UpXLZXDdfUEqi4-3fiBcocopc4ELDBVU1zrbV33vSoguKBSakzJKvZjFCeo07Qcip7SPIfNhRRbpg9veY66hk_dsFEmbhlVzIDRSbtsOxkzc9xQS3FhnwvNM3Dexx1TxbRY0MSoyyFSa5y0FGlTcjl-BZTveHXJC4d5OkOW1IA-ZA5dOy3t3mJYYpa91Y78aiza8VxkMUP)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9af275e41c74419843e3554041e4d30&_e=HfRsHrmg06ds23LCsZgJpzrbwFOpMH0-67hFUJY3uTvmbhFxmmrBZtvgz0ahesRgHjuD35YZq3NozQPlbGiJAryQaZubJgIjWSPPF2fbqIDFafxX8MY_AvZBNPA2sdytcQqSla_20HHrHl52aljCrA98uJmtd83hZUwA3lkjVS4F5Cw4NGLxa5Tup0l-TAC69JMYCJwGQLOAFWtN_sn6Q08MQO3xU-sV9xAjHoteQwZNCaRjTbFFo1UpXLZXDdfUEqi4-3fiBcocopc4ELDBVa1Cco1z-8gSkbx4IcKWu4CcdBhNgBZFKqCnbds8COxh6tu8Zidzx8hn5gtBL9H7snKh88-lmI7U9hBteSKPLTq6qLZd55an2Fk99woYBvjowvnj7jPo_SRCaBtX8tU_-IPUHe6t2NjKtFk4FH74snqLvWz1kowOOR46GL6PeoRn).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| | Friend - I am making it official: **My choice in the 2024 presidential primary is DONALD J. Brad Finstad [**_STAND WITH BRAD FINSTAD_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/P-VwB-07_kQW/enRxc0x1RUJ0VlpmNDJxVWVVMWNIRFlOV2VHSmRJaVo4MS9ScDU2ckJjSkExY0VOSnhHQlRINU1ZdjZXTXhrTUx3WHhTSzA2N2IzM3hQRit6c2JPT3IrVEgyRWhkamJKNDQ2aUwyNnRtYkpyS2xpSGE3dmtwZz09S0/)

name: Matt McCullough | Team Imer
subject: Become active in the 2024 campaign cycle, be a part of Operation 1876!
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer and is not approved by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
Looking for a way to become involved in the 2024 elections? Look no further! Join the Operation 1876 Team today! See email for details...
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vUqd5YgR1Acm2QBKgWUSq_c6DUuRhSWQLC8Ugj88SjATU_0dds4UpjxpkJTx7a-MZxEC0goqUrbyXI4sD4dkajCslOBFpTFDK1KSGMgILXVSsR8PQ0k3G1CsYGZUKsvJyy7GAHBKLFnNKS_PXPfEjg4uIfrzFaALfg7flOqzn_g=&c=l8Ya6ll4tjmiQkZXQ0bAp_x8vz4KjJM74j58T49EiqnQxETcJ2I0xA==&ch=m8K1vbkFri7NE0JIPWUgwdmOpy-xCBY9KdfekN2l-qUWcLyd6u3VxQ==)

---
| Friend,
My name is Matt McCullough and I am the Outreach Director for Laurel Imer's campaign for Republican National Committeewoman of Colorado.
Laurel has reached out a few times about her race and I hope she can continue to count on your support in the fight to Re-Take The RNC.
I am writing you today to invite you to get involved in the 2024 Election Process at the grassroots level. This election year we will have to fight tooth and nail for every inch of ground we wish to reclaim for Republicans across the state and country.
Here at Team Imer we are doing just that with Operation 1876.
What is Operation 1876? Operation 1876 is an effort to increase participation in our parties nomination and platform making process. This is done by becoming a delegate or alternate at your county precinct caucus in March.
The goal of the Operation 1876 Team is to recruit voters across the state to attend their caucus and seek election to the higher assemblies throughout the months of March and April, culminating with our State Convention on April 6th, 2024 in Pueblo, CO.
What would you do as a part of the Operation 1876 team? You will help with these outreach efforts, whether that is by making phone calls, sending letters to voters, and even texting voters to remind them about their caucus and encouraging them to be active in the party's nomination process.
What work is entailed on your end? Team Imer has worked very hard to make sure your job as an Operation 1876 Team Member is easy and streamlined. We will provide you with all the tools and resources necessary to perform this outreach, whether that is call lists, postage for letters, a platform to send text messages, and even instructions on how to complete these tasks, including scripts and pre-formatted letters.
Operation 1876 depends on people like you stepping up and fighting for our republic.
Simply click the link below to join the team already working to make Operation 1876 a success!
---
