name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: you’ve got to be kidding me. . .
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

The Abortion Lobby’s goal is not only to INCREASE the number of abortions in 2024, but they want you and I to pay for them!

In the battleground state of Michigan, pro-abortion Governor Gretchen Whitmer (D) recently repealed a state law that required women who wanted to have abortions to purchase additional coverage on their insurance plans – _a law she falsely and disgustingly dubbed as “rape insurance.”_

In other words, the deadly abortion referendum that passed last year, enshrining abortion-on-demand in Michigan's constitution, wasn’t enough bloodshed for her.

Now, she’s forcing tax-paying Michiganders to fund healthcare plans that cover the cost of abortions for every woman.

Pro-Life Friend, more taxpayer money going to pro-abortion organizations like Planned Parenthood is an **_OUTRAGE_** and forcing pro-lifers to cover the costs of abortions is downright **_EVIL_!**

If you agree, then I urge you to **[please sign your “STOP TAXPAYER FUNDING OF ABORTION” Petition right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sihtiik-duchtdja-y/)** and let pro-abortion governors like Gretchen Whitmer know that we will not stand to see our hard-earned money being used to kill innocent preborn children!

**[And once you’ve done so, could you please make your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ right away to help us reach more pro-lifers to sign this petition](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sihtiik-duchtdja-j/)?**

If the Abortion Lobby gets their way, it will lead to more heartache, more suffering, and more innocent lives ended by abortionists.

Pro-Life Friend, clearly Gov. Whitmer thinks pro-lifers don’t deserve a say whether their taxes go toward funding abortions or not.

_That’s no secret._

But it’s also no secret as to how the abortion-loving governor got so emboldened to think she could get away with this extremism in the first place. . .

It’s because of weak-kneed Republicans who run away from the issue of abortion instead of standing strong like their pro-life voters want them to!

You see, the Abortion Lobby loves nothing more than when GOP Faux-Lifers who tuck their tail and roll over.

So, it’s up to **_US_** to hold them accountable and **_MAKE_** them stand for Life!

That’s why to start off this year, _Students for Life Action_ will be hosting **Pro-Life Generation Lobby Days** – the largest, simultaneous lobby day effort in the pro-life movement's history – in **17** different states, _pushing strong pro-life bills from** _DAY ONE_!**_

After all, if we’re only playing defense, we’re never going to get the gains we need to SAVE preborn lives.

In each state, we’ll be following up with door knocking in key districts in February & March, even though it will likely be snowing in many states.

Our aggressive plan to engage students, staff, and community activists in grassroots mobilization to advance strong pro-life bills in state capitals is designed to let both pro-abortion politicians like Gretchen Whitmer and cowardly Republicans know that the Pro-Life Generation means business.

**_And I cannot stress this enough_ : This is extremely important since 2024 will be the biggest election year in the history of the Pro-Life Movement!**

But big plans like these cost real money.

>From gas money for traveling and food for our students, to print materials like petitions and legislative one-pagers we’ll be handing to legislators, to the hidden expenses that come from mobilizing at the drop of a hat, we’ve got a LOT of ground to cover.

**[The good news is, with a generous contribution of $250, $100, $75, or $50 to _Students for Life Action_ , you can help us chip away at these costs](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sihtiik-duchtdja-i/).**

**[Heck, even a gift of $25 or even $10 would do our student activists wonders](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sihtiik-duchtdja-d/)!**

So, could you **[please sign your “STOP TAXPAYER FUNDING OF ABORTION” Petition right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sihtiik-duchtdja-h/)** to prove that pro-lifers will not stand for taxpayer funded abortions?

Your **[signed petition](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sihtiik-duchtdja-k/)** and **[generous contribution](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sihtiik-duchtdja-u/)** will go a long way in this fight.

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

P.S. – This year, _Students for Life Action_ will be hosting Lobby Days at the very beginning of legislative sessions in 17 different states – _pushing strong prolife bills from** _DAY ONE_!**_

After each Lobby Day, in each state, we’ll be following up with door knocking in key districts in February & March.

Our aggressive plan is designed to let both pro-abortion politicians like Gretchen Whitmer, who is forcing Michigan taxpayers to fund abortion, and cowardly Republicans, who run away from the fight against abortion, know the Pro-Life Generation means business.

So, could you **[please sign your “STOP TAXPAYER FUNDING OF ABORTION” Petition right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sihtiik-duchtdja-o/)** to prove that pro-lifers will not stand for taxpayer funded abortions?

**[And once you’ve done so, could you please make your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ right away to help us chip away at the costs for our Lobby Days](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sihtiik-duchtdja-b/)?**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sihtiik-026154D2-duchtdja-n) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-sihtiik-duchtdja-p/)
**

**
---

name: Mike Dugan
subject: What I saw at the border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE DUGAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/56ada4c964af330a3947229f28c3afba/14c9b3274d702ed9c3d6b838967d376c/45443)

I'm Mike Dugan, a U.S. Army veteran, conservative businessman, and Republican running for Congress. **I just got back from our southern border. Make no mistake, it’s a catastrophe, and it’s a direct result of the Biden administration’s failed border policies.
** This border crisis is putting the lives of all Americans, and our national security, at risk. **We need new leaders who’ll be part of the solution, not stale politicians who refuse to admit there’s a problem.** **I’ll be part of a solution that secures our borders, enforces our laws, and puts our security — and working Americans — first. ****[**If that sounds good to you, will you chip in *any amount* to my campaign here?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/56ada4c964af330a3947229f28c3afba/3488e6e9eab4e646c3d6b838967d376c/45443)**

Make no mistake, it’s a catastrophe, and it’s a direct result of the Biden administration’s failed border policies. This border crisis is putting the lives of all Americans, and our national security, at risk. We need new leaders who’ll be part of the solution, not stale politicians who refuse to admit there’s a problem. I’ll be part of a solution that secures our borders, enforces our laws, and puts our security — and working Americans — first. Thank you in advance for any support you can send. Joe Biden and the Democrats have allowed an invasion at our southern border. Putting a stop to it has been a top priority of mine and fellow Republicans for months. We know Biden and his Democrats aren’t going to do anything to stop the invasion. They’re more concerned with pushing their radical agenda through all of 2024. **[**Check out what I had to say about this on Fox Business yesterday:**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/9b9d3ed233ea87c33947229f28c3afba/4dfcd6ee41beab94c3d6b838967d376c/37973)**

|

The White House either doesn’t take this crisis seriously, or it’s exactly what they want. **Either way, two things are clear:** Joe Biden doesn’t want negotiations to go anywhere. The border was more secure under President Trump. **2024 is our moment to not only demand border security, but to make it a reality by firing Joe Biden and Senate Democrats in November. ** **[**Step one? Sending a message. SIGN my January Border Security Petition here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/9b9d3ed233ea87c33947229f28c3afba/b8dc2014ee035653c3d6b838967d376c/37973)**

---
I am not going to be silent while the record for illegal border crossings gets broken every single month. I intend to be the loudest voice for border security in the U.S. Senate and on the campaign trail. **[But here’s the thing: I need your voice with me in this fight. Period. So SIGN my petition here and let’s put America FIRST.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/9b9d3ed233ea87c33947229f28c3afba/d1a702dd15094e56c3d6b838967d376c/37973)**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abc95d4bfe5a46509ed40dbbeab48903&_e=G-s-v6sUe2x07faqsn4TqFvQ-udT453Ku_IIZjZs_UT508xwA1UzlEdkHRuVSgEVCeaMcqvTwukRahhnMIPfnzog_iy9rMMjpZEJu7Jeb5KIN2WBzDaFFvM-AI1CCOHn1BZfCaw1naxeXcuqJ5xtSmOP7RQnUJzXRDjmBdMazlISzGubzhj-gy6-wGLn4gj_vxjhP5Gv-TSuG42SMo8HNLK379mvJRAoP_5MkAVB-qmZbq1hO0NLL6AO3chDHNFE-AiTjhT5Dm-lgClhou7RfeBJqXag2oVraQ25Jouu65HacgTXHyAJ3CPQ8czCLQh6ONA8-m8jZvl5gVFTB0TeSzcga5swP1n5wui3aTEiWct5wELDpgBcCa9sz9QURc5X-kEMiQSbyki0tiv7CnInGv16N7jM8hb77sRcfXLRnE69hCWkuEOJgYgE0mx6UICF)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abc95d4bfe5a46509ed40dbbeab48903&_e=G-s-v6sUe2x07faqsn4TqFvQ-udT453Ku_IIZjZs_UT508xwA1UzlEdkHRuVSgEVCeaMcqvTwukRahhnMIPfnzog_iy9rMMjpZEJu7Jeb5KIN2WBzDaFFvM-AI1CCOHn1BZfCaw1naxeXcuqJ5xtSmOP7RQnUJzXRDjmBdMazlISzGubzhj-gy6-wGLn4gj_vxjhP5Gv-TSuG42SMo8HNLK379mvJRAoP_5MkAVB-qmZbq1hO0NLL6AO3chDHNFE-AiTjhT5Dm-lgClhou7RfX3X1y_s1Gh0eSf6QKxSS_SWm31hM6JgzIKfB-Ahh0feoTdoBfPc8fMvREG3JlKKzcVihiigDTco5ql7kTfTZz2ljnZROLyKg5kOnMMxsD-XuI9xsQt_E00-IH5_s-S8KuWnDf9OaIcIKMmG5EQ8PrxCYDW02_Yc8S-VRu2Y498I)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abc95d4bfe5a46509ed40dbbeab48903&_e=G-s-v6sUe2x07faqsn4TqFvQ-udT453Ku_IIZjZs_UT508xwA1UzlEdkHRuVSgEVCeaMcqvTwukRahhnMIPfnzog_iy9rMMjpZEJu7Jeb5KIN2WBzDaFFvM-AI1CCOHn1BZfCaw1naxeXcuqJ5xtSmOP7RQnUJzXRDjmBdMazlISzGubzhj-gy6-wGLn4gj_vxjhP5Gv-TSuG42SMo8HNLK379mvJRAoP_5MkAVB-qmZbq1hO0NLL6AO3chDHNFE-AiTjhT5Dm-lgClhou7RfWE6FQ3AQuNQT-LVGVertwCN66ka7U5CLOJByiQYuR53XAd4MYsnpqUXHrPtm34CCr2qIj1bbdKr_WaN6RW5oPqaGzBeRwJMH0em-oh_utBX-4Mdzeb-2K3uoMqcqtgJYe92t4BPIf3NlkVtlWkxE7zRcukTblDh5_2TFs42qShK)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=abc95d4bfe5a46509ed40dbbeab48903&_e=G-s-v6sUe2x07faqsn4TqFvQ-udT453Ku_IIZjZs_UT508xwA1UzlEdkHRuVSgEVCeaMcqvTwukRahhnMIPfnzog_iy9rMMjpZEJu7Jeb5KIN2WBzDaFFvM-AI1CCOHn1BZfCaw1naxeXcuqJ5xtSmOP7RQnUJzXRDjmBdMazlISzGubzhj-gy6-wGLn4gj_vxjhP5Gv-TSuG42SMo8HNLK379mvJRAoP_5MkAVB-qmZbq1hO0NLL6AO3chDHNFE-AiTjhT5Dm-lgClhou7RfSwUaupWJzucLQ682VsKlMmXNDbywbSHT3DXWQch-Lq7-eGOQ-XT8ByA8hgWb7-eQEZLC3at3-WOBZSSOPrTuN9vtgJ3KTNNLDvIBZ0MmeMIAkstq3TyMEKVYJhqn_iyqhBZGrDUXu9RLp-o438a0I3wrNsmRdNklmJql1ySQ4RW).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Team DeSantis
subject: 🚨🚨 Calendar Alert 🚨🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f0f77e1426b455167231da509ec783fb6d4c62628457af59f116539a304ae6237186d5b8f5add9d9d923594c55eaa92b635f207a1e0ff5d59d550c65a34764d3f29df0f8def82d11127a85ffd4e33db2

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=848d9a541e3fd74b4eed0d31b1352ccba188c6b4af0d30a762baacbb704466ffd248769c7e5fafedb15c008e009cfa5303d824f17ff31a9d

Hi Friend,

We'll cut to the chase. We have just 10 days before we—

-
Prove to the radical Left that we have what it takes to win.
-
Shock every person who has bought into the fake narratives of the liberal media throughout this race.
-
Take a giant leap forward toward winning for the American people.

With your support, we can make sure that January 15th, 2024 goes down as the most incredible day of our campaign yet. But we only have 10 DAYS to do it.

We promise you, that we are putting in the work to win the Iowa Caucus. However, we're fighting against $40,000,000 that has been spent against Ron DeSantis. This is where you come in. What you can give today is what will drive our actions tomorrow and the final 9 days before ballots are cast.

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=848d9a541e3fd74bf45e239347e6e9727381521846438e88cf195a5d1c5d7a1bdbc1fd5b3214d839536d31a6d1010f377b0291ffe9190d88

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=848d9a541e3fd74bf45e239347e6e9727381521846438e88cf195a5d1c5d7a1bdbc1fd5b3214d839536d31a6d1010f377b0291ffe9190d88

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X-HH9SmikT2JC1Oo8IQncg~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X-HH9SmikT2JC1Oo8IQncg~~/AARclAA~~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X-HH9SmikT2JC1Oo8IQncg~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/X-HH9SmikT2JC1Oo8IQncg~~/AARclAA~~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c592e08efcde4ac588fa42dd3131792a&_e=71-cdGMMXc8HQ3JsV_l-5zL5G1flJYkCd5uxk2uE1tFL3ZrwWewS8ddst_4r-1mbmjiEXVgVeORSWUqIZWLhySocYtmlDO1qmhveyjUZ6BqxVzfvxJv1jnrBaOnZdHl4mzhMLH3j0b3q_RycpEDKGj_Z-M8m7s5qWn2EnfCKnxzHN73UrCKKWR0VjgDZuRLY_PWlhR_ua533KgWHZVV64nqhPQ1cQ0vgYRAlZV6w96Cr0_VOhmAFaoQH3cb2DhmXsd3L8fuha6pcNblYr82O2HC9JlowLfPlmGTKRYORY--qcKGlc_0TFN25Pft43rtHqB8hsCqhHG7n5GindM2YbVO04oBAFREMdlW7QnKc49Q161BTh9hsH3kQuZlsn-0prinxIjj3Qkzd8vdyNaUFkdBQFAb37QRZzjN0GTKEqrMl2OEi4uK37yYVsWQVWMxs).

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Alexander Hyatt
subject: Learn why these countries aren't socialism success stories
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWPPczEiNT)
| | | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62654082:WPPczEiNT:m:1:2627245898:193933DE562811E33AE59ADEE2D44C04:r)
---
| Fellow Conservative,

I'm sure you've heard it before.

"Democratic Socialists" are preaching this message to college students and millions of Americans: _" We should be socialist because it's working in Sweden and Norway."_

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62654082:WPPczEiNT:m:1:2627245898:193933DE562811E33AE59ADEE2D44C04:r)Growing organizations like the Young Democratic Socialists of America (YDSA) claim these countries are "proof" that socialism will work for America.

And millions believe them.

But their claims are false. To understand why, I want to send you **three easy-to-understand facts** you need to know.

Get the FREE eBooklet **[_" Why Democratic Socialists Can't Legitimately Claim Sweden or Denmark as Success Stories"_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62654082:WPPczEiNT:m:1:2627245898:193933DE562811E33AE59ADEE2D44C04:r)** from The Heritage Foundation today.

You will know the refutation to the fast-growing socialist myth about Scandinavia. And you'll have a valuable resource to help open the eyes of a young student or others at risk of being deceived.

We're fighting for the future of America with the facts in this well-researched, easy-to read ebooklet. Every American should have this resource and share it!

Please learn and share the truth. Get your free copy of this eBooklet now by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/democratic-socialism/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62654082:WPPczEiNT:m:1:2627245898:193933DE562811E33AE59ADEE2D44C04:r)

All the best,

Alexander Hyatt
Membership Programs

* Securing our Economic independence and putting money back into your pocket.

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db784dd074b84ef4984bb77a9cdcc71b&_e=8pKogIhVARlKGxdk21aPtAcBS0AhD55dT7UI6pMWjrul2Les5KwLdIksL6HuA3P5hpxSiqkr8Jqujq8mk7LRH6VurBoGBp1X85oTTbnJbECn4lflTNAmziUYXf_vjfPhCphPTxOV_DVzDx9MaUGD_vExnmxgtpch31gFR9WAL6UEfeirY7sFfnJPWjQzG7rYqAvWpzcgDW2VDsViS30BDgEbJUEVaT7wt4FmSANh5jGWIeB47lXZ8FpnN57aP-GLoFSzWh0flK834c3AIa57xy9biwA7t7JWKbvfKMHGJbZ-F5qE6dwbiKvRFyAWmguXj9P0j7ve5WxmTnfEMwLIjTyRM4bY8NFnpkoiCZ5b5GF3D4T-5Qyfv5g1a9T1btJXQATEzpegODdPaPuRpXaOhQ3rogpj7bDpeey4DGxkYALoTsYmZsfLgOW0B-ygh2AP)

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=db784dd074b84ef4984bb77a9cdcc71b&_e=8pKogIhVARlKGxdk21aPtAcBS0AhD55dT7UI6pMWjrul2Les5KwLdIksL6HuA3P5hpxSiqkr8Jqujq8mk7LRH6VurBoGBp1X85oTTbnJbECn4lflTNAmziUYXf_vjfPhCphPTxOV_DVzDx9MaUGD_vExnmxgtpch31gFR9WAL6UEfeirY7sFfnJPWjQzG7rYqAvWpzcgDW2VDsViS30BDgEbJUEVaT7wt4FmSANh5jGWIeB47lXZ8FpnN57aP-GLoFSzWh0flK834c3AIa57xy9biwA7t7JWKbvfKMHGJbYt56dDKvGa73zoNTo6nT0ZTm2KQyW0nY10mcSMY6Ft_up3bY16BRojORDLOx9gyQJVHcYT0Vdbhi-T3ykN8r1z8TbMV9Bvh53Rwdbcb2PebNCsAlnjzhtZgHvGz4ZIXxvXxHF-FpK4NIzym_0GYtUz)

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

| | [**I want to talk a little bit about why tomorrow's anniversary of January 6th is so important to me. But first, we're in a fight to restore trust in our democracy, and I need to ask if you would consider chipping in to help my grassroots movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76497751/447692685/-1197072038?refcode=2024-01-05-jansix-b&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b3a95c56-caab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2E5NWM1Ni1jYWFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cZ7XB3zrUY5h4-MmJYs187Z_5eabmYiVddA3R5MS3k=) The most vivid memory I have of Jan 6 is the moment I returned to the House chamber after the riot had been quelled. I stepped over broken glass to get into the chamber. What ensued over the next hour was the most powerful experience of my career. People spoke with hushed whispers. We touched each other's shoulders gently with comfort as if at a funeral. Everyone was still in a daze, swimming in uncertainty of the moment. I took a seat along the center aisle as the speeches began. I glanced around the room. Could it happen again? Would we finally unite? For a brief moment I thought what happened would be a shock to the system, like a defibrillator pulling our country back into rhythm. The speeches were raw, talking about the need to pull together. _But then something changed._ When speeches switched back to the electoral college debate, I felt the energy in the room shift. I watched people pull out the same speech about election fraud they were going to give before, as if the riot never happened. The prospect of unity lasted only a few minutes. That was when I knew the events of the day wouldn't create the unifying moment we needed. The shock of Jan 6 was not enough to shatter the Big Lie. **Many ask me if my colleagues who spout the Big Lie somehow believe what they say. At that moment I knew for certain they did. They believed every single word.** I couldn't watch, and headed for the doors in disgust. While the riot damaged our Capitol, I felt that the scene I just witnessed would ultimately do more harm. The lasting damage of January 6 was not the roaring riot, but the selfish silence and purposeful amnesia afterwards. I walked out the center doors of the House chamber, the same doors that Presidents walk through to give the State of the Union. Just hours earlier, they'd been smashed and barricaded. Security officers had drawn their guns. Again, guns were drawn on the House floor. As I walked the halls away from the chamber I kept thinking, maybe our nation lost its ability to be shocked. After a pandemic and now January 6, could something actually shock us to the point where we rediscover our shared identity and common good, like our nation has in the past? Then I reached the Rotunda. To see that room – the most beautiful room in the most beautiful building in America – desecrated and strewn with trash, broke my heart. I got on my knees and started to pick up. As I cleaned up the debris, I wandered down a side hall and saw a plaque: "Beneath this tablet the cornerstone...was laid by George Washington." I stood there holding a bag of torn flags and broken glass, reminded that this building is bigger than all of us. I realized at that moment that I am but a mere caretaker of this building. **This realization of being a caretaker fundamentally changed the way I see my job. Changed how I see the responsibility of being a citizen. Our democracy was handed to us, and on our watch we must do our best to preserve it and then pass it off to those that follow.** I've been fixated on a singular question: 2024-01-05-jansix-b-b this country? I spent a year searching for the answer, and came to see that it was right above me painted at the center of the ceiling of the Capitol dome. **To heal is "E Pluribus Unum."** E Pluribus Unum. Out of many, one. Phrase expresses our nation's goal but doesn't tell us how. What makes the "many" become "one?" Unity doesn't just happen on its own. We have to put in the work. **Here's what I know: It's not too late to unite this country.** I was wrong to think unity needed a shock to the system to catalyze. We don't need a shock. We need service. Our job now is to be caretakers. Our job is to heal this country and hand it off to our successors. That's why I'm running for Senate. name: American Update
subject: Larry Kudlow Predicts ‘Crisis’ Will Wreck Support For Biden Among Key Voting Blocs
body:
And Nancy Pelosi’s 2023 Stock Performance Was Truly Eye-Popping

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689255%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5b9aFUEAGOx5BDOtBXAHHA&sysid=1 Larry Kudlow Predicts ‘Crisis’ Will Wreck Support For Biden Among Key Voting Blocs

Fox Business host Larry Kudlow predicted that an “affordability crisis” would wreck President Joe Biden’s support among Hispanics and working-class voters. Biden currently has a 37% approval rating on the economy compared to a 60% disapproval rate, according to the RealClearPolitics average of polls between Nov. 1 and Jan. 2. name: Andy Kim
subject: E Pluribus Unum
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta28abe4a-8bc6-4e30-8a49-f6e0680d1cb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter – [**I want to talk a little bit about why tomorrow’s anniversary of January 6th is so important to me. But first, we’re in a fight to restore trust in our democracy, and I need to ask if you would consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help our grassroots movements.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T110ffc00-b3e7-4e4d-abcf-b72dfb4232ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The most vivid memory I have of Jan 6 is the moment I returned to the House chamber after the riot had been quelled. I stepped over broken glass to get into the chamber. What ensued over the next hour was the most powerful experience of my career. People spoke with hushed whispers. We touched each other’s shoulders gently with comfort as if at a funeral. Everyone was still in a daze, swimming in uncertainty of the moment. I took a seat along the center aisle as the speeches began. I glanced around the room. Could it happen again? Would we finally unite? For a brief moment I thought what happened would be a shock to the system, like a defibrillator pulling our country back into rhythm. The speeches were raw, talking about the need to pull together. _But then something changed._ When speeches switched back to the electoral college debate, I felt the energy in the room shift. I watched people pull out the same speech about election fraud they were going to give before, as if the riot never happened. The prospect of unity lasted only a few minutes. That was when I knew the events of the day wouldn’t create the unifying moment we needed. The shock of Jan 6 was not enough to shatter the Big Lie. **Many ask me if my colleagues who spout the Big Lie somehow believe what they say. At that moment I knew for certain they did. They believed every single word. ** I couldn’t watch, and headed for the doors in disgust. While the riot damaged our Capitol, I felt that the scene I just witnessed would ultimately do more harm. The lasting damage of January 6 was not the roaring riot, but the selfish silence and purposeful amnesia afterwards. I walked out the center doors of the House chamber, the same doors that Presidents walk through to give the State of the Union. Just hours earlier, they’d been smashed and barricaded. Security officers had drawn their guns. Again, guns were drawn on the House floor. As I walked the halls away from the chamber I kept thinking, maybe our nation lost its ability to be shocked. After a pandemic and now January 6, could something actually shock us to the point where we rediscover our shared identity and common good, like our nation has in the past? Then I reached the Rotunda. To see that room – the most beautiful room in the most beautiful building in America – desecrated and strewn with trash, broke my heart. I got on my knees and started to pick up. As I cleaned up the debris, I wandered down a side hall and saw a plaque: “Beneath this tablet the cornerstone...was laid by George Washington.” I stood there holding a bag of torn flags and broken glass, reminded that this building is bigger than all of us. I realized at that moment that I am but a mere caretaker of this building. **This realization of being a caretaker fundamentally changed the way I see my job. Changed how I see the responsibility of being a citizen. Our democracy was handed to us, and on our watch we must do our best to preserve it and then pass it off to those that follow. ** I've been fixated on a singular question: how do we heal this country? I spent a year searching for the answer, and came to see that it was right above me painted at the center of the ceiling of the Capitol dome. **To heal is “E Pluribus Unum.”** E Pluribus Unum. Out of many, one. Phrase expresses our nation’s goal but doesn’t tell us how. What makes the “many” become “one?” Unity doesn’t just happen on its own. We have to put in the work. **Here’s what I know: It’s not too late to unite this country.** I was wrong to think unity needed a shock to the system to catalyze. We don’t need a shock. We need service. Our job now is to be caretakers. Our job is to heal this country and hand it off to our successors. That’s why I’m running for Senate. [**Will you join me in the fight to restore unity, integrity, and a commitment to service to Washington by splitting a donation to my campaign and Blue Amp Action today?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3770177d-9c70-429e-88eb-a398b6c09653/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, _Andy_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabefb168-8df4-42be-aea2-90f30b2cfe7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Another one bites the dust
body:
This is a step in the right direction but more work needs to be done

| **Two Down. One To Go.**
---
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689266%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aOwEKpRfXeKYeOoM7n1%2b4Q&sysid=1)
---
Friend, The removal of Havard’s morally bankrupt president was long overdue. Claudine Gay’s blatantly antisemitic remarks and ongoing plagiarism scandal are a stain on our nation’s institutions of higher education. This is without a doubt a step in the right direction but more work must be done. Last month, when I questioned the woke university presidents of Penn, Harvard, and MIT about rising antisemitism on their campuses, all three of them refused to answer if calls on their campuses for the GENOCIDE of Jews constituted harrasment or even a violation of their schools' codes of conduct. _When I confronted them further about their morally depraved answers the best response they could give me was to say “It depends on the context”._ Friend, you and I both know that it does not depend on context. Calling for the Genocide of Jews on these campuses is without a doubt an act of harassment against their school’s Jewish students and most definitely violates the standards for student conduct each one of these universities have created. The right answer is obvious, but it became clear as I was questioning them that all three women were completely unwilling to contradict the woke ideology of intersectionality and terrified to express views not completely in line with the Radical Leftists that have taken hold of their institutions. These acts of cowardice are why the resignation of all three university presidents is necessary! After a public pressure campaign led by me and those who share our resolve, Penn and Harvard finally did the right thing by forcing Liz Magill and Claudine Gay to resign. **But to this day the President of MIT has yet to be removed.** That is simply unacceptable. [**That’s why I am demanding the resignation of MIT President Sally Kornbluth****.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689267%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2baJRzbdhG1%2fsEx50xkXZqg&sysid=1)
| [ **SIGN HOUSE GOP PETITION** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689268%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eSWjJQ2WCDmWC5lrCCCA%2fg&sysid=1)
---
Please add your name to the House GOP petition and stand with me at this moment. The fight to expose and clean up the rot in America’s universities does not end here, and I am proud to lead the charge with patriots like you at my side. _Your fellow patriot,_ Elise M. Stefanik
House GOP Chairwoman
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689266%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aOwEKpRfXeKYeOoM7n1%2b4Q&sysid=1)
---

by employees of the federal government’s 15 cabinet-level departments
flowed to President Joe Biden and other Democrats in 2023, according
to a Daily Caller News Foundation analysis of Federal Election
Commission records.

name: Mary Miller
subject: My message for 2024
body:
Watch my message for you >>>

|
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5d0c0bcj4q8eo2oqhcm8ppjkaeebq78ncipsekg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5jmeor6clh2bs)
---
Friend, I am proud to be one of the most conservative members of Congress, and I am honored to have had your support in the fight to save our country. But our work taking on the Washington Establishment is not finished. Our country is at a crossroads, and only the America First Movement can save it and **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.** **_That's why I'm running for re-election in 2024!_**
| | | [**↓↓↓ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO ↓↓↓**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3j22gk2mj7sb07i81r4jed7d94jtof8v6gln2e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5jmeor6clh2bs)

---
**Now more than ever, I need you to stand with me.** The attacks against me have only intensified since I announced my re-election campaign because Democrats know that I am a thorn in the side of the Biden administration and the Radical Left. Friend, they would love nothing more than to silence me and our movement. I will not back down, but I need resources to fight fire with fire, so it is crucial I do not fall short of my fundraising goals now as we rapidly approach election day. [**I invite you to support my campaign by chipping in whatever you can today and by sharing my announcement video with other grassroots conservatives.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2m7hnpe4er5a40f3sgh3p2hovhnd9coqfkbqok0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5jmeor6clh2bs) Every donation matters, and with the combined support of America First patriots from across the country, my team and I will have the resources to lead the fight to Save America! Your fellow patriot, **Rep. Mary Miller** Congresswoman, IL-15

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d7e30bdcd614bf894213273a9825a42&_e=Ak9RJ-YzQtz42k3QBK5rW9Ir2TGU4bBPAOaYX2zWnmqNI5HFIn-K5Podt1cCzXtdWn7M_QpM2KFcpxQxpyXspqGIq7i-EQL1X3PeknlTpbflRNtiIK8VLS-1h06N8yyyhFu49QEJnV01grzO_yOJyKqPPvDuu-4KB2vEv27xKqR23feD2f-MAj_5tbBTtfEGXVz9q_40lWmI6A5tBhvpetsVdJugXXxtG7X9w4KERYmBbGF_mAuHeecH2kWFZ3cqiDFro_imlfZM9LxolawtuvCrE6J6p-5M4lSv7urMx7-f_qEZ_wMQd0oh3Fhtk8Qijgy_wlm36LLzSq4Dp9kSA6SJPzJiyBmwX42olJNPYjjE_k83ik2a6C5q7mW-HZOVpZ_tpdQiE0uwKG-LwmtqoAKmFync3ulYgSlM32bo4YXzZo2M213ovqa9UKQDz8Rp)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d7e30bdcd614bf894213273a9825a42&_e=Ak9RJ-YzQtz42k3QBK5rW9Ir2TGU4bBPAOaYX2zWnmqNI5HFIn-K5Podt1cCzXtdWn7M_QpM2KFcpxQxpyXspqGIq7i-EQL1X3PeknlTpbflRNtiIK8VLS-1h06N8yyyhFu49QEJnV01grzO_yOJyKqPPvDuu-4KB2vEv27xKqR23feD2f-MAj_5tbBTtfEGXVz9q_40lWmI6A5tBhvpetsVdJugXXxtG7X9w4KERYmBbGF_mAuHeecH2kWFZ3cqiDFro_imlfZM9Lxolawtukaoy0sLQLSUji-0c59sWxZRJE5lP77B8CHGJSP9_sMlJXJrtMqRoK2A9DysggpPe4AtF_eDJWZ8huAQ1GrMWczf7c1fW7nxWJOHlPhCXaWodZxCu_w_MRwx2XXXyH6uBLFzPSercRTbWAofT8SkBi6CBtpvwlfQ6SXwiDtR8PI-)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d7e30bdcd614bf894213273a9825a42&_e=Ak9RJ-YzQtz42k3QBK5rW9Ir2TGU4bBPAOaYX2zWnmqNI5HFIn-K5Podt1cCzXtdWn7M_QpM2KFcpxQxpyXspqGIq7i-EQL1X3PeknlTpbflRNtiIK8VLS-1h06N8yyyhFu49QEJnV01grzO_yOJyKqPPvDuu-4KB2vEv27xKqR23feD2f-MAj_5tbBTtfEGXVz9q_40lWmI6A5tBhvpetsVdJugXXxtG7X9w4KERYmBbGF_mAuHeecH2kWFZ3cqiDFro_imlfZM9LxolawtugUeg7gjMagC36grfchrGLGdyXZTxt2D06JtxoLqX5K_zX0gAFVxXRc53c_ldZ2OGGgiD4Vj3tWMbhJDRLCizu0QVIOo4ujEBju-sBLDYWHpmQiSRAnnQOuB-2l3_JGuGvR5JmpTBUn0B_1wm9Fc5DzgEkKLa_q8_S_plao3VyAF)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d7e30bdcd614bf894213273a9825a42&_e=Ak9RJ-YzQtz42k3QBK5rW9Ir2TGU4bBPAOaYX2zWnmqNI5HFIn-K5Podt1cCzXtdWn7M_QpM2KFcpxQxpyXspqGIq7i-EQL1X3PeknlTpbflRNtiIK8VLS-1h06N8yyyhFu49QEJnV01grzO_yOJyKqPPvDuu-4KB2vEv27xKqR23feD2f-MAj_5tbBTtfEGXVz9q_40lWmI6A5tBhvpetsVdJugXXxtG7X9w4KERYmBbGF_mAuHeecH2kWFZ3cqiDFro_imlfZM9Lxolawtuk0ypERNVPMtjXZOKLl-gIpxNVyQF1hXVqYzuKlAxi-Nz6Fx-E6qaS3whslc_DeHLhy-vgBJoZxxJ565_QUb0EtY2c7GHVYysSJkrELKufatXbe3JfiATyIW0z1TV6394XmoDdgGLUTQJjPjRJBjBK3d5g4FnQCF48-hiYopz2Gt).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c04903a951da431a8bc50c5cbe2219f8&_e=B1Kk9RToKfas5_5rNL8Hussczi03UUl8iD4IHJ-NKFvKZae3BqpjPry9NkPXrF9ZphQh_4MZjkwwqzbOoois0Ut7J9d5w-fqFD4P-Iquoo-H-4S5BxAusiFGvh_xJfbde50xg0KRHBMWaATmNrVoBmND9Zomd8us5uRbX0zl5rYc43PjQdlCBrJfqMh1myIM0IdJXrrqv0Hh1M9kY_ff3fTLJE9IQenAJ6hZd2gGjiDfg9e2eYLYH4eKisM2eBy0s8Uj9YIs3TyiWgAn0l1wArdH1NXd61eiy6IcCSHsm1Z2U35rx7GtYRSSpqXZ95qL1Io-WwwCn3hPUe9iOgwTNu_7OUj3etddWAmZuvfw_S8J1DdQGWIKiv0s5QJRgswwogPHGn9PlXXXZJzY02nC0g%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c04903a951da431a8bc50c5cbe2219f8&_e=B1Kk9RToKfas5_5rNL8Hussczi03UUl8iD4IHJ-NKFvKZae3BqpjPry9NkPXrF9ZphQh_4MZjkwwqzbOoois0Ut7J9d5w-fqFD4P-Iquoo-H-4S5BxAusiFGvh_xJfbde50xg0KRHBMWaATmNrVoBmND9Zomd8us5uRbX0zl5rYc43PjQdlCBrJfqMh1myIM0IdJXrrqv0Hh1M9kY_ff3fTLJE9IQenAJ6hZd2gGjiApvvczak58TP0TbXW_KIcv_aILcbrcp47Nv7-Tg_BxdqAz3lCXEOsD3KIo25TwjUX5OInY3-HPx4qfItlpRS58T-Qow0zQjPNaE_zJIt_ut4DgE7MCb3Z5AvqnYuWMSHXuWHsHzCstjSXDFiS0wL_eA3juWSQ-7qxoo240fLkVSw%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c04903a951da431a8bc50c5cbe2219f8&_e=B1Kk9RToKfas5_5rNL8Hussczi03UUl8iD4IHJ-NKFvKZae3BqpjPry9NkPXrF9ZphQh_4MZjkwwqzbOoois0Ut7J9d5w-fqFD4P-Iquoo-H-4S5BxAusiFGvh_xJfbde50xg0KRHBMWaATmNrVoBmND9Zomd8us5uRbX0zl5rYc43PjQdlCBrJfqMh1myIM0IdJXrrqv0Hh1M9kY_ff3fTLJE9IQenAJ6hZd2gGjiC7U50CzSZJLs4UuSCDgZNqIi6NxkP_JKC5EpYmi1jsV6SyctMBNp-mJ7_No1u4w2K2vb32pq2Q4s-cyFic57YFOSwjpbuf3bKGEhf58GiJYovqrpBnykZKoz5HDtte5s4T68CDsTCtl-VpXpNTTJr9gem3wzvAqTY6q_UYBZDYOg%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. name: Mazi Melesa Pilip
subject: It’s official. I’m the GOP candidate in the 2/13 Special Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The ENTIRE country is watching this single race like a hawk. Republicans are down to a razor-thin Majority in the House

| |

---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38771%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qpncR4JZi0lmhoXWPRJK7Q&sysid=1 "Mazi Melesa Pilip")
---

It’s official.

**I’m the Republican nominee for the NY-03 _SPECIAL ELECTION_ on February 13th.**

The ENTIRE country is watching this single race like a hawk. Republicans are down to a razor-thin Majority in the House. If my Democrat opponent wins this seat, our Conservative Majority could go up in flames!

_**[My Special Election is only a few weeks away and experts agree it's a TOSS-UP. So I’ll cut to the chase - I’m humbly asking EVERY Conservative in America to pitch in a few bucks right here and right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38772%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K4z4ehH0KnQ1JZBKnc8Zfw&sysid=1 "My Special Election is
only a few weeks away and experts agree it's a TOSS-UP. So I’ll cut to the chase
– I’m humbly asking EVERY Conservative in America to pitch in a few bucks
right here and right now.")**_
---
| | | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: DONATE NOW >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38773%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=soTxta9NM2DbHV60pP%2bpJg&sysid=1 "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: DONATE NOW")
---
_I’m Mazi Melesa Pilip. I’d like to introduce myself:_

- I’m a proud Patriot
- I was a soldier in the IDF
- I’ve defended freedom in war zones
- I’m a strong Conservative
- And I am the Left’s WORST NIGHTMARE

That last point is very important. I came to America from Ethiopia, I’m an Orthodox Jew, and I’m a mother of seven - **good luck calling me a racist or any of the other vile names Democrats love to call Republicans!**

_But that doesn’t mean winning this race will be easy._

This was already one of the single most competitive races in the country... But now there’s a Special Election so winning this race will be very expensive. My Democrat opponent is already raising TONS of cash and he has all his Liberal megadonors on speed-dial.

**Luckily, I have you on my side.**

_**[So- with everything on the line - I’m humbly asking you to pitch in a few bucks so I can outraise my Democrat opponent, win this Special Election, and save our House Majority!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38774%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r5uvdl9nrdkll9%2b03xCYlA&sysid=1 "So – with everything
on the line – I’m humbly asking you to pitch in a few bucks so I can
outraise my Democrat opponent, win this Special Election, and save our House
Majority!")**_

Thank you,
Mazi Melesa Pilip
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38785%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cC3Z3mWc6bUehy09YB7uIg&sysid=1 "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

I’m launching my brand new _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38786%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tlh%2fPOiNTXpeprv%2bEAJiFg&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I’m humbly asking you to provide any feedback you’d be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38787%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iqNpIWF%2fMlj4j8cSZDdqNQ&sysid=1 "TAKE THE SURVEY")
---

Thank you,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

subject: Donald Trump will win if we don't take action.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Our democracy is under siege.

name: Mazi Melesa Pilip
subject: It’s official. I’m the GOP candidate in the 2/13 Special Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The ENTIRE country is watching this single race like a hawk. Republicans are down to a razor-thin Majority in the House

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6jh3l5sm8b9oqk2etln3tq208g0niqjtdqpq8g0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8oj4c9h2bs "Mazi Melesa Pilip")
---

It's official.

**I 'm the Republican nominee for the NY-03 _SPECIAL ELECTION_ on February 13th.**

The ENTIRE country is watching this single race like a hawk. Republicans are down to a razor-thin Majority in the House. If my Democrat opponent wins this seat, our Conservative Majority could go up in flames!

_**[My Special Election is only a few weeks away and experts agree it's a TOSS-UP. So I'll cut to the chase - I'm humbly asking EVERY Conservative in America to pitch in a few bucks right here and right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn47vsm5jotpcbmqbbmkesm34f0c498auqc17hho_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8oj4c9h2bs "My Special Election is only a few weeks away and experts agree it's a TOSS-UP. So I’ll cut to the chase – I’m humbly asking EVERY Conservative in America to pitch in a few bucks right here and right now.")**_
---
| | | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: DONATE NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt5iofgrgj1hb5ondiqairlicbdoemmumfiipeg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8oj4c9h2bs "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: DONATE NOW")
---
_I 'm Mazi Melesa Pilip. I'd like to introduce myself:_

- I'm a proud Patriot
- I was a soldier in the IDF
- I've defended freedom in war zones
- I'm a strong Conservative
- And I am the Left's WORST NIGHTMARE

That last point is very important. I came to America from Ethiopia, I'm an Orthodox Jew, and I'm a mother of seven - **good luck calling me a racist or any of the other vile names Democrats love to call Republicans!**

_But that doesn 't mean winning this race will be easy._

This was already one of the single most competitive races in the country... But now there's a Special Election so winning this race will be very expensive. My Democrat opponent is already raising TONS of cash and he has all his Liberal megadonors on speed-dial.

**Luckily, I have you on my side.**

_**[So- with everything on the line - I'm humbly asking you to pitch in a few bucks so I can outraise my Democrat opponent, win this Special Election, and save our House Majority!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8dalcqp80sr4ufuspmujoh0be7nag5qu5akmb28_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8oj4c9h2bs "So – with everything on the line – I’m humbly asking you to pitch in a few bucks so I can outraise my Democrat opponent, win this Special Election, and save our House Majority!")**_

Thank you,
Mazi Melesa Pilip
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ljpg4fr6iuumb386cjeonc9cterpq636n58c1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8oj4c9h2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

I'm launching my brand new _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeesje5cg2qtqopl6omefn8rf1ulujj29ceovn6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8oj4c9h2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me.

This is very important to me.

---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfhv0ldbkat3ghlomv43tg4u3f7n5il6ug7qaf08_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8oj4c9h2bs "TAKE THE SURVEY")
---

Thank you,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

name: Justin Kwasa, LCV
subject: Democracy is on the line in 2024. Take action to protect it today.
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~- ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10432995&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDA4OTk0MwS2&spReportId=MTkwMDA4OTk0MwS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10432995&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDA4OTk0MwS2&spReportId=MTkwMDA4OTk0MwS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdWLgPCy/WU85OWNkUmhhM2NwdnJyd2FocTJJMWNHRmZ2K2I4cGozeExHemVJREJBV2tFVHN5blFMdTlxOTNYMnlCN0hKaS9naWl6Z0JRbDZMQytIVVNNMHVOS2gzYlZKMzlzWEQ2RkNVWnQrWmd6MjA9S0/

subject: BREAKING: BIDEN SUES TEXAS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
The future of our country may depend on it.

| |

---
| | |

**BREAKING NEWS: BIDEN SUES TEXAS**
We need your attention right now:

_Biden 's Department of Justice just filed legal action against Texas Republicans to CANCEL their new illegal immigration crackdown._

Last month, they broke ground by making unauthorized border crossings a _state crime_ - allowing Texas police officers to arrest illegal immigrants. Everyone knows Joe Biden is doing nothing to address this invasion...

**That 's why Texas Republicans took matters into their own hands by making this the law of the land. And that's also why your Conservative Majority in the House passed the strongest border security bill in American history! **

We need to make sure Joe Biden - and all these open-border Democrats - know the American People will never forget what they're doing to our country.

More than 60 House Republicans just took action by flying down to Eagle Pass, Texas. **[Now we're asking YOU to take action too by endorsing our border plan before the end of the day today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1svb9uold3ds8k45t59ecnfmrbfq0u3o4l9kh4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8o72c1h2bs "Now we’re asking YOU to take action too by endorsing our border plan before the end of the day today.")**

Our bill slashes illegal immigration, ends catch-and-release, staffs up Border Patrol, and helps resume construction of The Wall. _Time is of the essence - please endorse our plan NOW:_
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbtq3a67lh41onr15abde34e24u4f9c2tcfote7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8o72c1h2bs "ENDORSE OUR BORDER SECURITY PLAN")
---
As you're reading this, Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden are saying this bill is dead in the water.

**They must not think the American People have strong feelings about border security... They think our plan is too harsh ... They must think they can wait out this issue until after the election...**

_Have they seen the UNPRECEDENTED CARAVAN heading toward our country???_

**[The best thing you can do to help ramp up the pressure is to endorse our border security plan and help House Republicans defeat these open-border Democrats once and for all!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8lallghu9qh1ve0uab2j54f19p0kedihslpj7ug_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8o72c1h2bs "The best thing you can do to help ramp up the pressure is to endorse our border security plan and help House Republicans defeat these open-border Democrats once and for all!")**

The future of our country may depend on it.

---
For America,
House GOP

---

---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1kh7eqtloqkmkdbf7ghft2gbd1v5635ugv3f9g0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge8o72c1h2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_

name: Lucy McBath
subject: this is disastrous for Georgia voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I refuse to let Republicans remove me from Congress
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc62c9f51-bd33-4980-af4c-1b62da90b964/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d4840e1-482d-4ea0-be2d-487238174698/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Peter, a federal judge just ruled in favor of the new Georgia Congressional maps moving the district I represent over 20 points to Trump.** _This will be a longer email as I explain how we got here and what this means._ [**If you don’t feel like reading the whole thing, you can click here to support my campaign and Blue Amp Action as I’ll need all the help I can get to return to Congress.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cedb220-e83d-4dd3-8788-c3352f426a3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Earlier in December, the Republican-controlled Georgia state legislature redrew our Congressional maps. _In a blatant attempt to force me out of my seat, they gerrymandered the district I represent to favor the GOP by +20 points._ Alongside many voting rights organizations and activists, I vowed to fight against these new maps passing. **But on 12/28, the federal court made its ruling in favor of these maps.** I won’t sugarcoat it, Peter: this is a disastrous outcome for voting rights and democracy. However – I refuse to sit back quietly and let Republicans get their way. _I made a promise that I won’t stop fighting in Congress until my communities are kept safe and protected._ I won’t let the GOP decide when my time in Congress is over. Let’s recall that this is the _**second time**_ Georgia Republicans have drawn a district I represent over 20 points to Donald Trump. **I’m fully prepared to return to Congress in 2024.** [**But Peter, I’d be lying if I told you it’s an easy path ahead of me. I only have a few months before this next election, and we need to put my campaign into overdrive. Can you rush a donation ASAP to Blue Amp Action and myself before the end-of-year deadline on Sunday to help make sure I can continue leading the gun safety movement in Congress?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf36d7ea3-8236-49e9-af9a-bf919eef3fff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T514bf7d7-9211-4c29-8f0e-16a2968a4bca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Now more than ever, I need my grassroots movement behind me. The stakes are high and I hope I can count on your support.
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Let's do this, Lucy McBath [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8245ca7-31c1-4438-adbc-75ca068b9163/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Millions will now pay less for insulin
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
That matters.
#

A quiet (but really important) thing happened the other day, Peter.
Insulin prices skyrocketed over the last decade — a life saving medication that is more than one hundred years old. It was price gouging directed at some of the neediest Americans, forced to pay hundreds of dollars or miss a critical dose.
Until now.
[](https://twitter.com/RubenGallego/status/1742316490890846592)
Ruben delivered for Arizona and helped get this bill across the finish line. Millions will benefit from it. That matters.
But not a single Republican in Congress voted to support this legislation. Republicans in the House have repeatedly voted to repeal the bill and drive up costs for seniors. Kari Lake attacks it on a regular basis.
For this, and for so many reasons, it is absolutely essential that we defeat Kari Lake and hold the Senate in 2024. To do it, we’re going to need the support of a huge team.
Can we count on you to have Ruben Gallego’s back?
[**If you’re with us, add your name and personally endorse his campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_jan24/?source=em240105-1-30&refcode2=1652.734936.QTS_i-&akid=1652%2E734936%2EQTS_i-)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_jan24/?source=em240105-1-30&refcode2=1652.734936.QTS_i-&akid=1652%2E734936%2EQTS_i-)
Thank you,
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=1652%2E734936%2EQTS_i-). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1652%2E734936%2EQTS_i-). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1652_734936_QTS_i-&akid=1652%2E734936%2EQTS_i-)

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: How campaigns make (strategic!) budget decisions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40)

Hey there – we wanted to share some insight into where things currently stand with Elissa's campaign for Senate in Michigan.
Right now we're preparing our campaign's spending priorities in 2024. It’s quite a balancing act, and full of strategic choices, starting this month in January.
It's very important that we keep building our coalition all across the country. And that means investing in things like voter outreach, advertising, staffing, satellite offices, and campaign travel across the state.
As our team reviews our budget projections for the year ahead, we're thinking about all we'd be able to accomplish if we were able to have a big fundraising day today.
Because the truth is that donations made earlier on in the race allow us to make much more strategic spending decisions than money that comes later on: when and how will we hire more staff? When will our mailers hit people's inboxes? How many TV ads can we run – and when do we air them? Pretty much all of these decisions are made by early summer – months before lots of donors check in and finally decide to give.
So we were willing to bank on the fact that if we explained why early investments in our race are so critical, then you, the thoughtful citizen that you are, would chip in to help create more room in our campaign's budget so we have the resources required to win this race.
[**With that in mind, can you make a $3 contribution to Elissa's campaign for U.S. Senate today? Every donation will help us make critical investments in this campaign.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240105-1-tt&t=2&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-jan24.707QlD&refcode=em240105-1-tt&t=21&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-jan24.78xAF-&refcode=em240105-1-tt&t=22&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-jan24.hMhQIv&refcode=em240105-1-tt&t=23&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-jan24.mji4rh&refcode=em240105-1-tt&t=24&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-jan24.xeo9Lh&refcode=em240105-1-tt&t=25&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-jan24.OTW_eo&refcode=em240105-1-tt&t=26&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40)**
---
****
If there’s one thing that sets us apart from everyone else in this race, it’s the fact that this campaign is powered by lots and lots of people contributing what they can over time.
All our best,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=28&akid=940%2E135344%2ETNjx40)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.
