name: Geoff Diehl & KathyJo Boss
subject: Republican State Committee
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dn70dge7k3015VZqr1k25wF2g_mWTCxi5enGLd3xAu0oCNFyH047K8nfhdQELc4WJATQCz7O1ymUSUKYMw6cQb6tuBh9FuZT-J11oQXVVpFlqoQG8wVV5xL_gyi9tsg6kzpBnPrpSn5ZYYoWqNlq3MVcUoncRykpnpT3_NMgHGfajR_7MMibGgdUzqyn64BfNlKwgkcSgtS1-vV826SGww==&c=IzUavzc5-eB6uNG6WQoqXE8KLt4WHzO9Xxjv8smZJ1gIB8Stc4A6NQ==&ch=47rSly3zPY6KvB_Dg-SfvNc3Du_aXIj-XMfBppAcu-PpwITyRGzzaA==)
---
| January 5, 2024
Friend,
Thank you for your continued support. We wanted to share some exciting news with you. We have decided to run for re-election to the Republican State Committee.
We will continue to be your conservative voice in the Massachusetts Republican Party. We will never cave to the establishment. The establishment knows this and that's why they recruited opponents against us.
That's why today we are asking for your support. Would you be willing to make a donation to our State Committee campaigns? You can make a donation by clicking here: [https://secure.winred.com/diehl-boss-for-state-committee/donate-today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dn70dge7k3015VZqr1k25wF2g_mWTCxi5enGLd3xAu0oCNFyH047K8nfhdQELc4WJATQCz7O1ymUSUKYMw6cQb6tuBh9FuZT-J11oQXVVpFlqoQG8wVV5xL_gyi9tsg6kzpBnPrpSn5ZYYoWqNlq3MVcUoncRykpnpT3_NMgHGfajR_7MMibGgdUzqyn64BfNlKwgkcSgtS1-vV826SGww==&c=IzUavzc5-eB6uNG6WQoqXE8KLt4WHzO9Xxjv8smZJ1gIB8Stc4A6NQ==&ch=47rSly3zPY6KvB_Dg-SfvNc3Du_aXIj-XMfBppAcu-PpwITyRGzzaA==)
State Committee campaigns are not governed by OCPF, and candidates can raise unlimited funds so anything you are willing to give would be greatly appreciated.
If you are unable to donate, please consider endorsing us, or volunteering with our race.
Together, we will win this fight, and we will continue fighting for you.
As always, thank you for your support.
Geoff Diehl and KathyJo Boss
---

name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: thank you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I'm counting on you
| | |
---
Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76509169/447718552/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4700-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjUyNzhiMS1kOWFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OS_FhvXl5CCZX7JKaAyEHW9M-x36apo6OUNrbmv0BI=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 14 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York in 2022. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before, and I'm counting on you to have my back again. Will you chip in before midnight tonight to join me in this fight for progress and defend our Senate majority? Your support would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76509170/447718560/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4700-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjUyNzhiMS1kOWFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OS_FhvXl5CCZX7JKaAyEHW9M-x36apo6OUNrbmv0BI=)**

clean_body: I'm counting on you | | | Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. = Thank you for having my back when we fought for health care coverage for 9/11 first responders and expanded benefits for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need. Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that empowers survivors of sexual assault in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members. Thank you for never giving up the fight to make gun trafficking a federal crime. After 14 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York. Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for national paid family leave for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country. My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support. But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York in 2022. Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat. I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. **But some MAGA Republicans conducted their own sham “audit” of the 2020 election in an attempt to overturn the results of a free and fair election.**
Today, they continue to spread their conspiracy theories far and wide – and it’s a real threat to our democracy.
Anyone who has supported throwing out election results doesn’t deserve to hold elected office–certainly not the chief law enforcement officer in the commonwealth!

name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: NEW AD: Skittering Josh Hawley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Keep on running, Josh... We’re coming for you.
#
Peter,
When Josh Hawley thought he could get more power for himself, he raised his fist to incite the crowd outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6th.
**Then, when sh*t got real, he skittered out the back door like a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42251?refcode=em20240105-4538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4538%2E614464%2EOFF_gm)
**_[Watch our brand new ad to hold Josh Hawley accountable, then please rush a donation of any amount to help us get this message in front of voters »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42251?refcode=em20240105-4538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4538%2E614464%2EOFF_gm)_**
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42251?refcode=em20240105-4538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4538%2E614464%2EOFF_gm)**
When Josh Hawley was sworn into the U.S. Senate, he took an oath to do his duty and protect our democracy — and January 6th wasn’t the first time we saw him break that oath or run away from his duty to Missourians.
With freedom to control our own bodies and lives under attack, Hawley has turned his Senate office into a family business dedicated to criminalizing abortion nationwide.
When veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits were counting on Hawley to vote for critical health care we’ve earned, he turned his back on us.
And as our communities were getting gutted by outsourcing and corporate consolidation, Hawley cut overtime pay for hundreds of thousands of Missouri workers.
**Our state deserves a U.S. Senator who we can trust will stand up and fight for working people, not for himself.**
That’s why I’m running against Hawley this year — and it’s why I’m asking you to join our grassroots movement today. **[Will you rush a donation of any amount right now so we can keep holding Hawley accountable and get this message in front of voters across the state? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so I’m counting on your support to flip this seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42251?refcode=em20240105-4538&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4538%2E614464%2EOFF_gm)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Keep on running, Josh... We’re coming for you. Peter, When Josh Hawley thought he could get more power for himself, he raised his fist to incite the crowd outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6th. Then, when sht got real, he skittered out the back door like a coward. When Josh Hawley was sworn into the U.S. Senate, he took an oath to do his duty and protect our democracy — and January 6th wasn’t the first time we saw him break that oath or run away from his duty to Missourians. With freedom to control our own bodies and lives under attack, Hawley has turned his Senate office into a family business dedicated to criminalizing abortion nationwide. When veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits were counting on Hawley to vote for critical health care we’ve earned, he turned his back on us. And as our communities were getting gutted by outsourcing and corporate consolidation, Hawley cut overtime pay for hundreds of thousands of Missouri workers. Our state deserves a U.S. Senator who we can trust will stand up and fight for working people, not for himself. That’s why I’m running against Hawley this year — and it’s why I’m asking you to join our grassroots movement today. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: This is our shot to take back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and put working people in charge of our country. Now let’s get to work. — Lucas ** | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Update from yesterday's eBlast; HBG event cancelled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
Reaching out with a quick update from yesterday's eBlast.
Due to inclement weather, the "We Won't Forget!" event previously scheduled for Saturday in Harrisburg has been cancelled. In lieu of attending, we are asking individuals to talk to a young person they know about voting in both 2024 elections. If you need a resource to get someone registered to vote, click here [https://vote.pa/?org=npp] .
Additionally, check below for other events happening around Pennsylvania in the coming weeks, as well as some talking points on the Jan. 6th insurrection anniversary.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Image_3.jpeg]
Upcoming Events
Harrisburg (CANCELLED)
What : "We Won't Forget!" January 6th Commemoration and Condemnation Rally
When : Saturday, January 6 from 2-3PM
Where : Capitol Steps (501 N 3rd St, Harrisburg, PA 17101)
Details : We'll be joining our friends from the PA 10th District Network for a peaceful rally of remembrance that will highlight the rights we have lost since January 6, 2021, the rights needing protection, and the laws that need to be enforced to protect those rights.
For additional details and to RSVP, click here [https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/595689/] .
---
Philly
What : Reflective Democracy -- an event hosted by affiliated organization New PA Project Education Fund
When : Wednesday, Jan. 10th, 6:30-8pm
Where : Teamsters Local 623 (4369 Richmond Street, Philadelphia, PA 19135)
Details : An interactive presentation and discussion around how we achieve a more representative democracy that reflects all the people of Pennsylvania -- come have your voice heard! Includes free food, free parking, and is free to attend.
For additional details and to RSVP, click here [https://forms.gle/ekJQsCGxBWbXWdy38] .
---
Lancaster
What : Women Empowerment Day 2024
When : Saturday, January 13 from 1-4PM
Where : 515 Hershey Ave, Lancaster, PA 17603
Details : We'll be speaking at Lancaster's Women Empowerment Day event that will serve as a tribute to Martin Luther King, Jr. and feature vendors, food, performers, and is free to attend! For additional details, see the flyer below:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_2436.jpg]
2024 PA ELECTION DATES:
Primary Election: April 23, 2024
Last day to register to vote: April 8, 2024
Last day to request mail-in ballot: April 16, 2024
General Election: November 5, 2024
Last day to register to vote: October 21, 2024
Last day to request mail-in ballot: October 29, 2024
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]
The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible.
https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject] https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania [https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania] https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project [https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project] https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania [https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania]
Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
New Pennsylvania Project
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States

Friend,

This final Republican presidential primary debate before the critical Iowa Caucus is GUARANTEED to be a showdown.

Who do you think is going to win: the strong conservative Governor who has led his state to unprecedented economic, education, and low-crime success, or the liberal-in-disguise who sells out to big donors and wants the government to track your identity online?

> ENTER NOW <

This is the first highly anticipated political event of election year and YOU could be in the crowd experiencing it all with us. Make sure to do everything it takes to win your chance at attending this incredible event ASAP!

Hope to see you soon!

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9b7fca05400a1ef4a624c39f619d7e57d61da9cc82e58d88cd48e4c1c786ff31bba0e39c4b072e2af89e0cd7ad2cf8f9f52e6e093f2d89fe

here.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9b7fca05400a1ef40bf16202383fcf63dcd5a5217ece8b50fcce55e42f6d51b40719930edf63592f989c402b69d0ea44cf76f05757629003
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9b7fca05400a1ef4a624c39f619d7e57d61da9cc82e58d88cd48e4c1c786ff31bba0e39c4b072e2af89e0cd7ad2cf8f9f52e6e093f2d89fe

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9b7fca05400a1ef4a624c39f619d7e57d61da9cc82e58d88cd48e4c1c786ff31bba0e39c4b072e2af89e0cd7ad2cf8f9f52e6e093f2d89fe

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9b7fca05400a1ef4798b7abbd4880f502336d4b14d09a9809de8748800317744623e480135d7d82c37a3d725a0fe28d4da1a3a1ca1a28ed5

Our contest closes in... 🔻🔻 READ MORE ON HOW TO WIN BELOW 🔻🔻 --------Forwarded Message-------- From: Team DeSantis Subject: Did you get our invite? Last day to accept 🔜 Friend, This final Republican presidential primary debate before the critical Iowa Caucus is GUARANTEED to be a showdown. Who do you think is going to win: the strong conservative Governor who has led his state to unprecedented economic, education, and low-crime success, or the liberal-in-disguise who sells out to big donors and wants the government to track your identity online? You could see it all go down FIRST HAND in the audience with us by submitting an entry today: Your ✈️ to Iowa 2 free 🎟️ to the debate A 2-night 🏨 stay A 🤝 with Governor Ron DeSantis and First Lady Casey DeSantis! ENTER NOW < This is the first highly anticipated political event of election year and YOU could be in the crowd experiencing it all with us. Make sure to do everything it takes to win your chance at attending this incredible event ASAP! Hope to see you soon! Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. You can read the full contest rules here . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form . To enter without making a contribution, click here. Void where prohibited or otherwise restricted by law. The Promotion begins on December 8, 2023 at 12:00 AM and ends on January 5, 2024 at 11:59 PM Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 PM Eastern Standard Time on January 5, 2024. One winner and a guest will receive the following Prize: Up to $1,500 total towards roundtrip airfare to Des Moines, Iowa, two nights of hotel accommodations, two tickets to the CNN Iowa Presidential Debate, and a meet and greet with Governor Ron DeSantis and First Lady Casey DeSantis. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is Ron DeSantis for President, PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: Alliance Defending Freedom
subject: Sign the Pledge: Stand with this Courageous Student
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA1LWUyZGZjMDEyNTVjYjRhYzZiODJmNTVjNDIxZTNhMDY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkZPNDU0NTUifQ/b0zJXhRjmXl9V-z7B6SRtQ)
---
Fellow American: A Massachusetts school has censored a seventh grader for wearing a shirt that expresses biological truth. Throughout the entire nation, a debate is raging on the very nature of what it means to be human. What makes a person a man? A woman? Our Constitution guarantees freedom of thought—the freedom to share your beliefs. **Twelve-year-old Liam Morrison’s school has decided that debate is out—and government orthodoxy is in.** Liam, a 12-year-old student at Nichols Middle School in Middleborough, Massachusetts, quietly observed how the school proclaimed loudly that a person’s feelings, not their biology, determines their sex and gender. Liam holds different beliefs. Informed by a scientific understanding of biology (and backed by millennia of human history), he believes that there only two sexes (male and female) and that a person’s gender is inseparable from their sex. **So, one day Liam wore a shirt to school that says, “There are only two genders.”** The principal of the school, along with a school counselor, pulled Liam out of class and ordered him to remove his shirt or go home. Liam politely declined and was sent home. **Public school officials cannot censor a 7th grader’s speech by forcing him to remove a shirt that states scientific fact. This is a gross violation of the First Amendment.** **[Please stand with this brave 7th grader as he challenges his school’s violation of free speech. Sign our pledge to show that Liam isn’t the only one who is standing up for these truths.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA1LWUyZGZjMDEyNTVjYjRhYzZiODJmNTVjNDIxZTNhMDY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkZPNDU0NTUifQ/7x3iokjahh6gEhWylJzTsQ)**
---
| | [**Sign the Pledge**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA1LWUyZGZjMDEyNTVjYjRhYzZiODJmNTVjNDIxZTNhMDY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkZPNDU0NTUifQ/ixalleVVJ1jdmY85Kicfog)
---
**“They completely took away my ability to have a different opinion than they wanted me to have,” Liam says.** This case isn’t just about a shirt.
* **It’s about a public school telling Liam** —and thereby all other students—that he can’t wear a shirt with a message that’s important to him unless it’s the same opinion as the government’s.
* **It’s about a public school trying to force a student** to forfeit his free speech when he walks into the school building.
* **It’s about a public school imposing its view on students** —and censoring students who disagree.

“The school is talking about this issue all the time,” ADF Senior Counsel Tyson Langhofer, who is defending Liam, says, “and all Liam wanted to do was express his opinion, which is actually shared by a lot of his classmates.” After the school punished Liam for wearing the shirt, he wore another shirt to protest the school’s censorship that said: “There are censored genders.” Again, the school told him to take off the shirt. That’s when Liam and his family decided to ask Alliance Defending Freedom and the Massachusetts Family Institute to take legal action.
---
[**Sign the Pledge**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA1LWUyZGZjMDEyNTVjYjRhYzZiODJmNTVjNDIxZTNhMDY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkZPNDU0NTUifQ/rI93-aOjR3BEoqHEnZEL5A)
---
“I don’t complain when I see pride flags and diversity posters hung throughout the school,” Liam told a meeting of the Middleboro School Committee in April, after he was punished the first time. “Others have a right to their beliefs just like I do.” **The First Amendment protects people of all beliefs, especially people that disagree with the government. If you only have freedom to agree with those in power, you don’t have freedom at all.** Across the nation, government officials are trying to silence views that differ from radical gender ideology. And it’s falling to brave 12-year-olds like Liam to stand in opposition and not affirm lies when school officials, who should be modeling adulthood, have failed students. **[Will you join Liam today?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA1LWUyZGZjMDEyNTVjYjRhYzZiODJmNTVjNDIxZTNhMDY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkZPNDU0NTUifQ/1vsdX56l2s7_L6dRR_hpmA)**
---
[**Sign the Pledge**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA1LWUyZGZjMDEyNTVjYjRhYzZiODJmNTVjNDIxZTNhMDY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkZPNDU0NTUifQ/DCHm17fGf-XVkkPV54Wh2A)
---
—Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. Liam isn’t the first student to be censored—and he won’t be the last. **[Stand with him today and send a message that government censorship cannot be allowed.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA1LWUyZGZjMDEyNTVjYjRhYzZiODJmNTVjNDIxZTNhMDY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvaHV0dXFsaGZ1Zj9zcmM9RkZPNDU0NTUifQ/hT0VL8ZDk-zGyPQ3eC5e4w)**
---

All donations are secure, private, and tax-deductible. Member ECFA.
---

Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA1LWUyZGZjMDEyNTVjYjRhYzZiODJmNTVjNDIxZTNhMDY1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/fsNhSqPyKN4VBBJ_xJfUjA) to unsubscribe.

Trump is taking the stage TWICE in Iowa today, rallying his base to defeat President Biden and Democrats.

We know from experience that every time Trump gives speeches like this, money**pours in** to elect Republicans, and today that effect could be _doubled._

With the Iowa caucuses just around the corner and the 2024 race ramping up, Democrats can’t afford to fall behind -- so we've initiated a one-day-only TRIPLE-IMPACT MATCH to answer Trump's lies and supercharge our Democratic Senate majority.

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38796%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=46j%2beqABUgUYXFnXEPY4tQ&sysid=1 "This is a longer email but
I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden’s former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _“Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson.”_
* And I can’t even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I’m bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don’t intimidate me. _But I’ll let you in on a little secret: that’s not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It’s about power and money. Nothing else.**

That’s why it’s mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian- Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38797%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yRRioLZZYXWB4WOjSHtsUw&sysid=1 "So as one of my first
moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority
Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between
now and the end of the month.")**_

It’s ambitious. I get it. But that’s the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we’ll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here’s my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not next month - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can’t-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I’m not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38798%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wpvQ1JqXgtP6dmoju1Wc2g&sysid=1 "The ONLY thing I ask is
for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38799%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hq1LAdqDFIzHZILJaH1v2A&sysid=1)[**YES >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38790%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MM9nTgTUZD4Tacq1IBuihw&sysid=1)_[**NO >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38791%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JTRWoAV%2bW6pBwB79oqBUgQ&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38792%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SDGL69K3TQB3OQQvr1o9ng&sysid=1 "Speaker Mike Johnson")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38793%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3vu13nXco5EOcccHpGBWdQ&sysid=1 "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38794%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iJNf9BCj9jeWhf1Bn04Bow&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38705%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y9BHif4gN%2fX1CGSJuLcnGA&sysid=1 "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")
---

But all kidding aside, I want you to know that I _truly_ am **humbled** by the amount of support I have from the American people.
Even during the darkest moments, your support serves as a powerful motivator to keep fighting the good fight to save our country.

Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. clean_body: | | | | SPECIAL EDITION: Mike made it to the BORDER! MAJOR ANNOUNCEMENT: Peter, Congressman Lawler got to visit our southern border this week and saw our immigration crisis firsthand. Check out this special edition of The Lawler Ledger below and hear what Mike has to say about Joe Biden's inexcusable failure to protect our country. Check out the detailed report BELOW. | REP. LAWLER IN THE NEWS | Mike Lawler for Congress The Hill News Nation via TheMessenger Politics. | TOP SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS | | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | \- =

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: This team continues to prove it’s anything but ordinary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Friend, Happy New Year! I hope you were able to take a few days to relax and spend some quality time with friends and family. I had a _fantastic_ break. First, I had the chance to watch our very own Michigan Wolverines defeat the Alabama Crimson Tide in the Rose Bowl — and I can’t wait to watch them win on Monday and bring the championship back to Michigan. And to make things even better, my team just informed me that we reached our final fundraising targets for 2023. It’s ordinary for political fundraising to slow down during the holiday season — **but this grassroots team continues to prove that it’s anything but ordinary.** At a time when people usually aren’t fully tuned in to politics _and_ where we see declines in fundraising, this team went above and beyond to help us head into Election Year 2024 in the best position possible. The fact that we _exceeded_ even our most optimistic projections in a non-election year gives me hope for the upcoming election. **So from the bottom of my heart, thank you.** President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot are counting on support from groups like ours to provide them with the resources they’ll need to fight like hell to defend working people and protect our fundamental rights. And you all have continued to prove that Michigan will _always_ have their back. You’ll hear from us again soon, but for now, let’s celebrate what we just accomplished. Thanks for all your support and Go Blue! — Gretchen | ** ** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76519874/447746750/232286791?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk4MGU5NzgtZTNhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4N8CJZch76WcgrPjrjRPU1C4vNFC5Pv101A51WYnDr0=)**

Hi Peter: My name is Mike Honda, and for nearly 20 years I served my fellow Californians in Congress.

During my time in Congress, I was a leader in the Progressive Caucus, the Asian Pacific American Caucus, and I was a founding member and Vice Chair of the LGBT Equality Caucus. So I know a thing or two about building community and power for good.

I’m writing to you today about my friend Jirair Ratevosian who is running to represent CA-30 in Congress. I met Jirair back in 2011 when he worked as a senior staffer for my dear friend, Congresswoman Barbara Lee. I knew, even then, that Jirair would go on to do great things. I wanted to drop you a quick note today [to ask if you’ll help Jirair.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76519928/447746952/1757406733?refcode=JR_EM_FR_010523_1_1_HondaRe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFjZmQwOTEtZTNhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eMgLwk54nfBZjlmcLcLcQFojmo0pdbckZ9JoJd8azuM=)

The fact of the matter is that Jirair is facing an extremely crowded primary. And right now, Congress is at a crossroads. After one of the most dysfunctional and least productive years in Congress in decades, we need real advocates in Congress who will actually work for us. **And out of all the candidates in this race, I truly believe Jirair is the only candidate in the race with the needed professional and life experience to deliver for Californians.**

Jirair’s experience as senior congressional staff and training as public health doctor make him exceptionally prepared to deliver for all our communities. And I couldn’t be prouder to know him.

[But there are less than 10 weeks left until Jirair’s critical election, and he needs your support. I’ve got Jirair’s back, do you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76519929/447746955/1757406733?refcode=JR_EM_FR_010523_1_1_HondaRe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFjZmQwOTEtZTNhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eMgLwk54nfBZjlmcLcLcQFojmo0pdbckZ9JoJd8azuM=)

This newsletter will keep you up to date on all the things Jen Kiggans is up to around town on the Campaign side of the house. We look forward to sharing stories around the district and keeping you up to date with all the happenings on the campaign trail! This newsletter is for unofficial campaign activities; not official U.S. House of Representatives updates. MARK YOUR CALENDARS! Jen Kiggans will kick off her campaign for Congress on Sunday, January 7th, with special guest Congresswoman Elise Stefanik! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c79cc2d842f8325267b70e399468d972d5cbedcf822874e6f7c5502046fad7467ddb22968bfe81f5d832f9627b644c257fc60df396be693a To RSVP to this event, please https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c79cc2d842f8325267b70e399468d972d5cbedcf822874e6f7c5502046fad7467ddb22968bfe81f5d832f9627b644c257fc60df396be693a CLICK HERE ! A NEW YEARS WRAP UP See all that Jen accomplished in 2023! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c79cc2d842f83252e777e9348337fad219eb51d6c498f8f067239e44e59f8e51a18222010de94f0fdfde8e17ad7442d4e59d548a72a5c56e FACEBOOK https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c79cc2d842f83252405fae69961266be4703d79c217778ee4992c67e9ee0798ac4659a769fa8363a0ee1ffeec33566fc4ed53d0372de3d09 TWITTER WHAT JEN WAS UP TO IN DECEMBER… Jen laughed the night away at the RPN Christmas/Hanukkah party! Jen left with a new American flag scarf! Jen had the honor of lighting the Menorah at the 42nd annual Menorah lighting ceremony at Mount Trashmore! Jen had the honor to lay wreaths on gravesites at Albert G Horton Jr Memorial Veterans Cemetery to honor those who have served our great nation. Jen had a blast at the FIL-AM CAG holiday party! So much good food and so many great friends! Jen spoke at RPVB breakfast and answered end-of-the-year questions about what's happening in Washington! Jen went to the Green Run Homes Association Holiday Bonfire and got a picture with Santa! Despite the rain, Jen had a great time walking in the City of Virginia Beach Holiday Parade! Bad weather never gets in the way of connecting with voters! Jen attended the City of Suffolk's holiday celebration! It was great to spend time in Suffolk! Jen joined Senator-elect Emily Brewer at the Smithfield Holiday Parade! Can't wait to see what she does in the Senate! Jen attended the Marion Manor Christmas party! So many great people said hello! Jen met so many voters at the Suffolk Christmas Parade! The Christmas spirit was strong in Suffolk! Jen had an excellent time as the RPVB Holiday Party! The ham we brought was a huge hit! Jen spent an evening at the Republican Party of Chesapeake Holiday Party! So many smiles! Jen had an awesome day in Smithfield, visiting the Smithfield Farmers Market and seeing the World's Oldest Ham! Jen attended the FACT (Families of Autism Coming Together) Family Fun Day holiday party! Jen saw so many old friends at the Central Chesapeake Republican Women's Club holiday party! Jen joined Senator DeSteph and many volunteers at the Judeo-Christian Outreach Center in Virginia Beach to help prepare meals for those in need on Christmas Eve! name: Mazi Pilip
subject: If we hold this seat, Pelosi will be furious!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Democrats are spending $10+ million to destroy me. Can you help me keep this seat RED?

|
---
| | |
Hi Friend,

This is Mazi Pilip, and I am running for Congress in the Special Election for New York's 3rd Congressional District.

I'm a county legislator, former soldier in the Israel Defense Forces Paratrooper Brigade, immigrant, and mother to 7 beautiful children.

_**If we keep this seat RED we will send a message to Joe Biden and the entire Democrat Party that Americans are fed up with their socialist agenda.**_

Liberal mega donors from all across the country are pouring money into New York to flip this seat because they are terrified of a black, immigrant mother who supports conservative policies and believes in the goodness of America.

**[Chip in any amount tonight, and together we can make the liberal establishment's worst nightmare come true.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zulamoqc8d4dcr1mdk5n8fv2jmfbnlg7km6ok2n8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge1ob2c3h2bs "Chip in any amount tonight, and together we can make the liberal establishment’s worst nightmare come true. ")**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbiiu756h9k2254t0p1fv4dpjise20absfe4efc8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge1ob2c3h2bs)

**SUPPORT MAZI IN THIS CRITICAL SPECIAL ELECTION**

In my time as a county legislator, I have consistently fought for commonsense, conservative solutions like _**fighting for taxpayers and standing up to the radical leftists who want to defund the police. **_

And with your help, I will keep fighting every day for these conservative values in Washington, D.C.

**[Chip in ASAP, so we can HOLD this seat and let the Democrats know America won't stand for socialism.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeod5pgl79uhovtg65vjb8hr0tnhb9j1lcbqhl3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge1ob2c3h2bs "Chip in ASAP, so we can HOLD this seat and let the Democrats know America won’t stand for socialism. ")**

Friend, any amount you can give, whether it's $5, $50, or $100, will go a long way in our mission to keep this seat _**RED**_!
_**KEEP THIS SEAT RED**_
---
| | | [SUPPORT MAZI FOR CONGRESS](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zce1l7ijjl6qk4dvk0jb20varnejmk6ebjqk0nho_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge1ob2c3h2bs "Generic Button")

With a razor-thin margin in the House, EVERY single Special Election (like mine in New York) has the potential to set the tone for a Republican victory in 2024.

Mazi Pilip

**Our backyard is FLOODING with illegal immigrants.**

This invasion is **unprecedented.**

Never before have we seen so many illegals entering our country, and NEVER before has an administration cared so little.

**Over 500,000 have illegally crossed our southern border since October.**

**_Rapists, murderers, human traffickers_ ,** and **_TERRORISTS_** are among them.

And they’re being bussed directly into OUR cities.

While our families are put at risk from THOUSANDS of unknown individuals entering our communities, the Democrat establishment couldn't care less.

**This is INSANE.**

Our nation has NEVER been more at risk than it is right now. COUNTLESS dangers are entering our country every day, and **[unless we take action RIGHT NOW, our country will become unrecognizable.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkjior45qmc9qcgadqs8la00eevv24tb0q37gkoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ge1ob2cph2bs)**

name: Padora for CO
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw our important email from yesterday. Lauren Boebert has officially been endorsed by Speaker Mike Johnson.
__ | | | Folks, We wanted to make sure you saw our important email from yesterday. Lauren Boebert has officially been endorsed by Speaker Mike Johnson. Johnson is endorsing this carpetbagging campaign because he is desperate to hold the House majority in hopes that Republicans will be able to pass a national abortion ban in 2025. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The clock is ticking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — Today
marks one month from voters beginning to receive their ballots in the
mail.

The clock is ticking. The time to reach undecided voters across the state
is right now.

My team and I are doing all we can to contact voters from San Diego to
Siskiyou and talk about our priorities for California and the nation in
the Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1004&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]But running for office in California is not easy — or cheap. In the
most populous state in the country, our media markets are some of the most
expensive, and every dollar of support helps. Will you pitch in
$5 or
anything you can spare to help us contact voters in the final month before
early voting begins?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1005&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1007&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1008&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1009&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

In this final month, we’re buying television, radio, and digital ads.

We’re holding more volunteer events and meetings across the state.

I’m sharing my message of a brighter, safer, stronger future for us all.

But while we’re uplifting our positive vision for California, the GOP is
coalescing behind my Republican opponent Steve Garvey — and recent polls
show him neck and neck to advance through our primary to the general
election in November. If that happens, I am the best candidate to beat
him.

While Trump rallies his base to vote in massive numbers in California’s
March 5 Super Tuesday presidential primary election, he’ll also be
encouraging them to vote down the ballot — and if Garvey advances, we can
expect national Republicans to get even more engaged.

Derek, in
order to contact the voters we need to make it to the General Election and
to withstand the Republican attacks, we need this grassroots team to step
up.

With one month until early voting begins, [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1011&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]please chip in
$5 to
help me reach undecided voters as Election Day approaches.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1012&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1013&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1014&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1015&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1016&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your ongoing support. With Californians voting in a month,
I’m incredibly proud of the campaign we’ve built, and I’m excited about
what’s ahead.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jan2024_abs_em.PW8mTI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240105_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=4972%2E5257348%2EmDpT4r ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

subject: Trump thinks he WILL be president in 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟰 no matter what!?

body:
MAGA Republicans are making voters lose faith in every last democratic institution...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20601%2E4449941%2E_Pz1-c)

**Donald Trump said he WILL investigate media outlets like _MSNBC_ for TREASON if he retakes the White House in 2024!** _He thinks they should be PUNISHED for following the evidence and reporting truthfully about our democratic elections!_ | **So we’re conducting an _URGENT_ poll to see how Democrats feel about news outlets' performance under the pressure of Trump’s RELENTLESS ATTACKS:**

**[_How would you grade _MSNBC_?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20240105_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20601%2E4449941%2E_Pz1-c)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20240105_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20601%2E4449941%2E_Pz1-c) | [A: ABSOLUTELY TERRIFIC! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20240105_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20601%2E4449941%2E_Pz1-c)

[C: ADEQUATE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20240105_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=20601%2E4449941%2E_Pz1-c)
[D: UNSATISFACTORY »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20240105_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=20601%2E4449941%2E_Pz1-c)
[F: TERRIBLE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20240105_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=20601%2E4449941%2E_Pz1-c)
****__500 POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM__ TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE FOR REFERENCE IN OUR 2024 ELECTION STRATEGY. _ONLY MAGA REPUBLICANS HAVE GIVEN MSNBC AN F RATING AS OF YET._ ****
_Listen, Donald Trump and his MAGA army are trying to make voters lose faith in every last democratic institution!_

...and media watchdogs like _MSNBC_ are just their latest target!

We need to know that their plan to overtake this country is NOT impacting the minds of our most loyal Democratic supporters!

[_**So PLEASE: submit your poll response quickly! »**_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade_msnbc?source=FFR_20240105_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=14&akid=20601%2E4449941%2E_Pz1-c)
**500 POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM**
Thank you for your commitment to upholding democracy,

-FFR Polling Team

name: Roland Gutierrez
subject: what side of history are you on?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=ArcxKNxrIyCcdqEFhrhuaB3QrtUf4s7EumyCoLkKQdv%2FXotD%2ByKXrQkFL3TMidpNWKsEM65wRQ8%2FCuzZLG1BYiw%2F5PtP403rwPTBqqWitlXmtCJ0uSjRsLg%2FI6jniMM0gLs1wFvpWAwC9ohzkMuSYH1holOS98pQQHKVA4OLBQTARuAtky%2BGi%2F2AnbUpMn4KBI4YmEr4Ec9K%2BiONUPJ%2BqH47dQMDTT45gm8XFKtsVwBlG1rQqgjU6p0KIHmDEhBLaW2G3cVMyxWjgiCa1O7WtdYFTVa4IUUOx4xZfh6a0zCsKobxO5dPPaE8fgPUO4Ccj9Q5BZCzHXNhXK8eQ%2FYuJGz2AYUODqsnkjWJEAA%2BmRM3E%2Fs1aIAA1QXpQ4WFsVAgTLT6sqHx5%2Fg4r8N58WT7BIVYUjlsHzc1LxNJaLQGixsaMOIcTMh36w3r9jgtLa7p .
secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25 [secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez — the Democrat running to defeat Ted Cruz.
This year, Americans will be asked a very important question:
Which side of history are you on?
I know where Ted Cruz stands, Peter.
In just the past few years, he helped incite an insurrection.
He obstructed progress on gun control even after 21 people lost their lives in Uvalde.
He fled our state for a luxury vacation in the midst of a horrific winter storm.

Thank you for joining me in this fight.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76525339/447755682/1820369458?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk594-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmUxOGY5ZjUtZTZhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HkLf45REdYVeAL7cWssly_NgKSvni1eZmgxpChaWVjk=)

Friend, happy new year! Now that 2024 has officially started, I want to take a step back and share why I'm running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator. Please, will you let me explain?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76525340/447755683/1820369458?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk594-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmUxOGY5ZjUtZTZhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HkLf45REdYVeAL7cWssly_NgKSvni1eZmgxpChaWVjk=)
_My husband, our three children, and our dogs._
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.

We made a new home here in a small, one room apartment. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider, and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I got a job at the local doughnut shop. My minimum wage checks helped us make ends meet and keep our heads above water in those early days.
My mother raised me to work hard, give back to others, and fight for the life I dreamed of. Thanks to her sacrifices and courage, I was able to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. **She showed me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we _never_ give up. This is the promise of America.**
**_And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better — but we’ve got to fight for it._**
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable among us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why his approval ratings are totally underwater.

**Polling data has shown that this race is already a statistical tie.** But Rick Scott is a megamillionaire who**has already spent millions of his own money to defeat us.****** And now that the election year is officially underway, he won’t pull any punches.
**I know that we can defeat Rick Scott and restore the promise of America – but not without all hands on deck. ****[So please, will you join the fight for a better future by donating $5 to my campaign? Winning in Florida could be the only way to save our fragile Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76525341/447755684/1820369458?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&&&&refcode=jtk594-fr-nd&&&&amount=5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmUxOGY5ZjUtZTZhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HkLf45REdYVeAL7cWssly_NgKSvni1eZmgxpChaWVjk=)**

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: File to Run!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
# **A Message from the Chairwoman**
---
| | ** _File to Run!_**
---
Friends, The first date to file to run for public office opens next Wednesday, January 10th. The best way to get involved at the grassroots level is to run for precinct committeeman and state delegate! This is YOUR chance to be an active member of the Republican Party, have YOUR voice heard, and make a real difference. We all have a responsibility and a duty to make sure we are nominating the best of the best for our party to dominate in the General Election in November, and IT STARTS HERE! 2024 is one of the most important elections of our lifetime, we have critical races up and down the ticket, including Governor, U.S. Senator, and President of the United States. As we move forward this year, there will be ample opportunity to get involved. Please don't miss this chance to make a real impact on the future of our party by filing WEDNESDAY to run for precinct committeeman and state convention delegate!!! For more information on filing, click [HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/962b9c94a3632183c3d6b838967d376c/40313). The 2024 elections will be here before we know it. Get involved NOW! Thank you for all that you do.
---
---
Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway
---
| |
# **Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review**
---
| |
# _Gov. Holcomb Announced a New Round of Grants to Support Child Care_
---
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/4dcceb130021322ac3d6b838967d376c/40313)**Governor Eric Holcomb** , [announced](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/2fb5d563090ca652c3d6b838967d376c/40313) that $18.1 million in employer-sponsored child care grants will be awarded to 64 businesses, community groups and school corporations. This is the first of two rounds to be awarded, totaling $25 million! **What he’s saying** : "We wanted those who know first-hand the critical needs of their employees, and those who are best positioned to partner in their communities, to create child care solutions for their workforce, and they delivered,” **Gov. Holcomb** said. “This effort harnesses the combined efforts of businesses, community groups, and schools that want to support working Hoosiers’ careers and our youngest learners across the state.”, **Gov. Holcomb** shared in a [press release](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/accc977307f98729c3d6b838967d376c/40313). **What else happened this week?[Gov. Holcomb](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/797c473b0e19de2ac3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/aa3840c23aba9e73c3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/f7f397a241339f75c3d6b838967d376c/40313)** announced that he will unveil his 2024 Next Level agenda on Monday, January 8th at 10am ET, and you can watch live [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/7e77aab77573442fc3d6b838967d376c/40313). Additionally, [**Gov. Holcomb**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/05f1936ea6b46991c3d6b838967d376c/40313) will give his 8th and FINAL State of the State address on Tuesday January 9th. The address will begin at 7pm ET and can be viewed live [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/1bc9ac415318b126c3d6b838967d376c/40313).
* To stay up-to-date, follow **Gov. Holcomb** on [Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/6268fa8f66afefa3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) or [Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/2114d66db30b5fd2c3d6b838967d376c/40313).

---
|
---
# 👏 _Meet Our Newest Republican Lawmakers_ ⚖

---
| | As we enter the 2024 legislative session, let's take a moment to get to know our newest members! We have 4 new Republicans starting their first session on Monday. For more information, read this article in [The Indiana Lawyer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/91682bec488b548bc3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
| | State Senator [Cyndi Carrasco](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/0372fa09c3386686c3d6b838967d376c/40313) will be serving the remainder of the late Jack Sandlin's term in the Senate, representing senate district 36, which covers portions of Johnson and Marion counties. Senator Carrasco earned her law degree from the Indiana University Robert H. McKinney School of Law and currently serves as vice president and general counsel at the University of Indianapolis. Senator Carrasco was also the first female Indiana Inspector General and has served as Gov. Holcomb's deputy general counsel.
---
| |
---
|
---
State Senator [Greg Goode](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/a63a82dc2e3a5810c3d6b838967d376c/40313) will serve senate district 38, which covers Vigo and Clay counties and a portion of Sullivan County. He has a bachelor's degree in political science and a MA in history from Indiana State. Senator Goode spent over 10 years as the Executive Director of Government Relations and University Communications for Indiana State University. He is currently the state director for U.S. Sen. Todd Young.
---
---
|
---
State Senator [Randy Maxwell](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/107285011707544ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) will serve senate district 43, which covers Dearborn, Jefferson, Ohio, Scott and Switzerland counties, and portions of Jennings County. He earned his degree in finance-real estate and entrepreneurship from the Kelley School of Business at Indiana University, where he was also a member of the football team. Senator Maxwell is currently the CEO of Maxwell Construction, a family-owned Southeast Indiana general contractor and development company.
---
---
|
---
State Representative [Alex Zimmerman](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/71ffe128340e2544c3d6b838967d376c/40313) will serve house district 67, which covers portions of Decatur, Jefferson, Jennings and Ripley counties in southeast Indiana. Rep. Zimmerman is an attorney and owns a private law practice in North Vernon. He earned his bachelor's degree from Franklin College and his Juris Doctor from the Indiana University Robert H. McKinney School of Law. He previously served in several roles with the Indiana Senate, including as legislative assistant, majority legal associate and deputy majority attorney.
---
---
|
---
# 📱 _News You Can Use_

---
**Governor Eric Holcomb** [announced](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/6baa9d8f4c47e685c3d6b838967d376c/40313) judicial appointments for Daviess and Wayne Counties. **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** [celebrated](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/4f81c74a4af8aa47c3d6b838967d376c/40313) a Department of Agriculture record13,980 members of Indiana FFA. **Secretary Diego Morales** [travelled](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/cf229da3489fbde3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the state all week as part of his 92 county trip to deliver election improvement grant money to county clerks. **Attorney General Todd Rokita** [shared](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/284dd7d8c09201a7c3d6b838967d376c/40313) some of his office's biggest achievements in 2023. **Treasurer Daniel Elliot** [spent](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/52a2753dd2037c80c3d6b838967d376c/40313) time with family as we started the New Year. **Senator Mike Braun** [called](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/ff5cb2446cbbab58c3d6b838967d376c/40313) on fellow Republicans to stand strong on protecting the southern border. **Senator Todd Young** [shared](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/22679eb0660bfecac3d6b838967d376c/40313) some of his favorite books from 2023. **Congressman Rudy Yakym** [called](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/a950f935972bcdedc3d6b838967d376c/40313) on 2024 to be the year we restore fiscal responsibility. **Congressman Jim Banks** [shared](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/b475899656338b4ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) his favorite reads from 2023. **Congressman Jim Baird's** [returned](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/19ff125148eac3edc3d6b838967d376c/40313) more than $2 million to Hoosier taxpayers. **Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [visited](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/d2f34b262207a595c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the southern border to hear from border control and law enforcement. **Congressman Greg Pence** [wished](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/ffd94c4f286334d1c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Hoosiers a happy New Year. **Congressman Larry Bucshon** [spoke](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/d953a16a7fccbffac3d6b838967d376c/40313) with The Hill about physician reimbursement. **Congresswoman Erin Houchin's** [spoke](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/225b0b19806778f63947229f28c3afba/212a51376bf6213fc3d6b838967d376c/40313) with Fox and Friends about her visit to the southern border.

The best way to get involved at the grassroots level is to run for precinct committeeman and state delegate! This is YOUR chance to be an active member of the Republican Party, have YOUR voice heard, and make a real difference. We all have a responsibility and a duty to make sure we are nominating the best of the best for our party to dominate in the General Election in November, and IT STARTS HERE! 2024 is one of the most important elections of our lifetime, we have critical races up and down the ticket, including Governor, U.S. Senator, and President of the United States. As we move forward this year, there will be ample opportunity to get involved. Please don't miss this chance to make a real impact on the future of our party by filing WEDNESDAY to run for precinct committeeman and state convention delegate!!! For more information on filing, click . The 2024 elections will be here before we know it. Get involved NOW! Thank you for all that you do. Chairwoman Anne F.
