name: Team Haley
subject: If you watched last night…
body:
You saw a winner.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689276%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DQmM4nQL1uLwzLMYSUh%2bdw&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

If you watched Nikki on stage last night, you saw a fighter.

You saw a winner.

You saw a candidate Americans can be PROUD to call their president.

We’ve got a country to save, and we need your help. We can win this fight, but in order to do so, we need every American on board.

**[If you’re reading this email, that means YOU-- we need YOUR support to help Nikki win this race.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689277%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FWVpp0QocO82FD2C3NEDvg&sysid=1 "If you’re reading this
email, that means YOU — we need YOUR support to help Nikki win this
race. ")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689278%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z1NQt81c1F84lrC%2brTqBJQ&sysid=1)
---

Nikki Haley answered every question, offered real solutions, and never wavered in her fight for America’s future.

She’s the only one who can defeat Biden and Harris and get our country back on track.

But, winning this election will require us to fight for that inch every single day.

That means pouring in everything we have into making sure Nikki Haley is our next president.

We have 10 days left until the Iowa caucuses.

We have 18 until the New Hampshire primary.

There is still a lot of work to be done.

We can’t take our foot off the gas. Nikki’s full steam ahead, working to earn every vote.

Nikki’s putting in the work, and we need to make sure she has the resources needed so she can continue to get her message out and win!

**[YOUR support makes that happen. Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689279%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VMLlZSyS7OnmjPNbHV6eSw&sysid=1 "YOUR support makes that
happen. Even $5 or more makes a difference. Will you chip in today? ")**

Team Haley

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689278%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z1NQt81c1F84lrC%2brTqBJQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689270%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pP00KZNK0lFVPE4mEjX6zA&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689271%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XTvc4nVRweF73qo1GrWEUg&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689272%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1oFB58V0U%2bJSvt3ZcYXOOQ&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689273%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tmM6zEAnE36rqqdPH%2fjQVg&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689274%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2%2fyaFl7z4DvP7Ox4OC3ATw&sysid=1 "DONATE")

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: I support law and order. Do you?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend,

I am so grateful for our police officers.

As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and
justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect
our communities.

Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing
our 'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave officers know that
we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.

Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'

Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling
criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "defund the
police."

I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator
of our society and that the black community must fight and scream
and demand support for the people in our community who are up to
no good.

That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization
focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as
educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs
and acts of community service.

Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local
officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those
who serve our communities.

To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please
sign the national petition today.

Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'

This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the
Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the
city's police force.

The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit
to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with
thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's
appreciation.

If you 'Back the Blue' - and believe that we must support local
heroes - please sign the national petition right away.

While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think
minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of
black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same
or even increase.

We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those
lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country
as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every
day.

We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities
and demeaning police around the nation.

If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you
should want law and you should want order. That is the way
forward.

Join me in letting our police officers know that you support
law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our
communities safe.

Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'

Candace Owens

Chair of BLEXIT

Powered by Turning Point USA

Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our 'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice. name: Nikki Haley
subject: An incredible night
body:
Last night I had a town hall on CNN

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z75835stb10dvacsvlmem0799gft6s07r6a8hm50_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs)
---

Friend,

Last night I had a town hall on CNN and it was an incredible night answering questions from voters in the audience and sharing my vision for our future!

Whether it was discussing my plans to restore our economy, secure our border, and make America strong and proud again - I made sure to have an honest discussion with the people in the audience and Americans across the country.

Thanks to people like you, I know we can win this race and save our country. But I need your help to make it happen.

**[Can you rush a donation so we can reach every American with my message, win the White House, and SAVE our future?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeiukhc40rd2iibt0o3hgcpmoun86m424h8t89c8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs "If you’re reading this email, that means YOU — we need YOUR support to help Nikki win this race. ")**

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn0ovp06blidu7fd70dra1vec4tktn0dnrbk0gq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs)
---

Just like I did last night, I will continue to fight for our future and share my plans for tackling the real issues Americans care about.

Americans are ready for a candidate who can win and right this ship, and I'm ready to get to work as your next president!

But with just 10 DAYS until the first votes take place, I need your help right now to reach every voter with my message of strength and truth.

**[Will you rush a donation to keep the momentum SURGING and amplify my message across America?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd14mnb3rphpp9n554fp1e0oho49pd4vc6ihkl0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs "Will you rush a donation to keep the momentum SURGING and amplify my message across America?")**

Even a $5 donation today makes a difference.

Let's make history!

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z437c3fhcbsnndekr5ucd9np82vqo45jhmv15se0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs)
---
Nikki R. Haley

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl31qmvs12odcg0mm1n6oe1i9irtm2mj611f35p0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6hal140j6egpj6dcbecs03r08ivtk1r16i99ab0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zht2sf9phcqg891nuuh6l117kc07vtoc16o7cj0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo8psh39ju0uo4dccbei4j5qmpvcm5mti0pkbmb8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zim00uiu0854ji59jpkju9cciibv4hf3m9aabr3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgjk70vf79djr1nne0m8vmggi9gusfknlstco708_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs "DONATE")
---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj4hrb4oomi4vkh6lbc1q3p6gotm41evihi7f9r0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie0oj4clh2bs)

name: Lorinser for Congress
subject: Photo-ops at the border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
We need a bipartisan effort on immigration reform, not grandstanding or party politics
After generations of inaction on immigration, America is being held hostage by hard-line House Republicans who refuse to compromise, including my opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Sixty Republicans grandstanded with a border visit this week. Their mission appeared to be purely political posturing. They gained no substantial new information or insights. Meaningful, bipartisa n discussion was absent.
I need your help getting to Congress [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] to fight for commonsense, humane immigration reform.
A contribution from you can help our campaign advocate to improve immigration issues. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Friend,
Democracy works through cooperation and negotiation. House GOP leadership refuses to do either. Instead, they wage war with Democrats. Unacceptable.
Democrats and Republicans agree we have an immigration and border crisis. Neither party wants open borders. We differ on solutions, including the Republican Secure the Border Act of 2023 (HR2), passed by the House without one Democrat vote.
Inaction is neither safe for the national security of the United States nor for the migrants and asylum seekers.
The Senate is moving forward in a bipartisan way – Democrats and Republicans. Why can’t the House?
President Biden requested $13.6 billion in emergency funds to hire 6,000 immigration and border security employees. We need border patrol agents, asylum officers, immigration judges, improved technology to detect fentanyl, and community grants to help with the cost of migrants. Until Congress develops a comprehensive plan, these are necessary interim steps.
Republicans in the House rejected the effort.
Immigration courts are a disaster. They are underfunded and understaffed. Most cases take five years to be heard. Unauthorized border crossings are surging, yet House Republicans proposed spending cuts that would decrease Border Patrol by 2,000 agents.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Meuser-Border-visit.jpg]
Rep. Jack Bergman and the GOP smiling for a photo-op at the border.
The House GOP is scared. If they make border concessions, they will lose Donald Trump’s support. Trump is exacerbating these divisions to prop up his presidential campaign. Trump’s immigration plans for 2024 are even more radical.
Extreme MAGA House members indicated that they are willing to shut down the government unless Democrats meet their uncompromising demands. They are willing to risk our national security and economic growth to create more photo ops versus working on solutions.
Immigration has been an unaddressed problem for generations. It is time to move forward.
The US needs workers in every facet of our economy. Michigan’s 1st District needs agricultural, construction, hospitality, and healthcare workers. Representative Bergman’s clear lack of concern for the needs of our businesses is shameful.
To solve serious issues, leaders must reject partisan politics, bickering, and power brokering. Democracy depends on compromise.
Our immigration and border security is in a crisis. The situation on our border is also a humanitarian crisis. Both need urgent, careful, and humane bipartisan action and serious leadership.
Sincerely,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan, Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

name: Cori Bush
subject: It’s time the unhoused have their own bill of rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
A safe place to live is a human right that has been undermined by intentional policy decisions. | |
---
Peter, **** **** **** **Last year, the number of people without housing in our country increased by 12%** due to soaring rents and increased cost of living. That’s 653,000 people in our country who do not have a roof over their head and a safe place to sleep. It’s unacceptable. And it doesn’t have to be this way. As a single mother, I experienced the trauma, stress, stigma and pain that comes with being unhoused while sleeping in my car with my two kids. It was cold. It was isolating. Fixing this crisis is a top priority of mine. A safe place to live is a human right that has been undermined by intentional policy decisions. That is why, as co-chair of the Congressional Caucus on Homelessness, **I reintroduced the Unhoused Bill of Rights, legislation that commits the federal government to addressing the root of our nation’s housing crisis.** Corporate interests and GOP billionaire-backed super PACs are set to spend millions against me this year and hinder the progress we’ve made for people’s right to housing. clean_body: A safe place to live is a human right that has been undermined by intentional policy decisions. | | Peter, ** Last year, the number of people without housing in our country increased by 12% due to soaring rents and increased cost of living. That’s 653,000 people in our country who do not have a roof over their head and a safe place to sleep. It’s unacceptable. And it doesn’t have to be this way. As a single mother, I experienced the trauma, stress, stigma and pain that comes with being unhoused while sleeping in my car with my two kids. It was cold. It was isolating. Fixing this crisis is a top priority of mine. A safe place to live is a human right that has been undermined by intentional policy decisions. That is why, as co-chair of the Congressional Caucus on Homelessness, I reintroduced the Unhoused Bill of Rights, legislation that commits the federal government to addressing the root of our nation’s housing crisis. Corporate interests and GOP billionaire-backed super PACs are set to spend millions against me this year and hinder the progress we’ve made for people’s right to housing. The unhoused crisis continues to ravage our communities, claim lives, render people permanently disabled, force people into the criminal-legal system, and create barriers to employment, education, and civic participation. I am committed to ensuring that the Unhoused Bill of Rights is adopted towards helping to keep people permanently housed. In the richest country in the world, we all deserve to have a place to live. Anything other than that is unacceptable. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Together, we can end the unhoused crisis by 2027. A world where everyone has a bed to sleep in, a place to return to at the end of the day, and a safe haven is possible if we work together. With love and humanity, Cori Bush ** Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Dan Crenshaw was MIA...
body:
I wasn't.

| | | |

**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
Last night's Montgomery County Eagle Forum was a crucial moment for voters to see the stark contrast between myself and my no-show opponent, Dan Crenshaw... as well as a chance for us to hear directly from you, the voters.
I showed up, but Dan's empty seat speaks volumes.

You can [click here](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZmYi53YXRjaCUyRnBvZkJkOXFpeVQlMkY=&sig=H6YXcve3ommtUQhJWSegWAGNBUsCaCgT97SXaUCH7qxo&iat=1704494499&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=VOWvVqcmWsx8kW6GpjpxI9mlnRU7CfktbK4cGh2lJNtKOcZm%3ApnCKT1EiG%2BEujNVT4MZB92jeEFgG7cCe&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=219A246A1A1949) to watch and share on Facebook and/or watch below on YouTube.

This might surprise you, but $3 goes a long way toward winning this race. That’s because we’re powered by folks just like you and I’m damn proud of that. I don’t answer to super PACs or special interests.
We’ve got what it takes to defeat Mitch McConnell and his cronies, but the truth is that they’re already pouring truckloads of money to defeat me.
They’re trying to turn me into something I’m not, because **they can’t beat who I am.**
I’m a farmer. I’m a senator. And I’m a Montanan til I die.
I’ve never let my time in Washington change me. I’m not about to start now.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Just a couple of months away
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter -
Our primary election here in Texas is just a couple of months away in March, and I need your help to be successful in this first step of my journey towards re-election.
[If you're willing to send even a small contribution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001psV6jIt07v6tzuu1uUoVj5v9T4Y0C_ZN7N8SjdDRU9r_hSynDp4AFjn4nZufhmxoorxV_Z-y5EuBwgxqVkdiTrUrgqH6cgvBmTuch7yIRb0EftVm3UKn4jvOqSbW4p_GN0sofS8g47_PZk0HKwP_trPVttqSoufVGWOzDWiTw22MsnssBlzjn0qNc2o0kJORZOInYgIXbIqEDpgHXn9dq8BYQTRomktXdze7N4G3HDBysAROb6nk6wQEAXUnknqDkheUz5-UHQSuzpCUpbmSU4UTWruJ-y27ckF3I3xZHXtRWuqu61qLGIJZYGuIVgW1Eoqqkga42VYun1VjDGRhgYe6P8NNd5j2BzdzaM2UEWF9xBCR6bTAyw==&c=6973lETa328jmLEleb_gldGQbw345XJqCpKlPto9rX-eMCevobyHGQ==&ch=ezt1PMs2fYK52hICmwUke833IDobCzqb0uQWnkwGDU6Vdy6Katk3vQ==), it will go a long way to help ensure I am re-elected to Congress and continue to fight on the issues that matter most to you.
First, I want to explain to you why I am running for re-election.
Many are choosing not to, for understandable reasons. Congress has become a toxic place, with an incentive structure that makes it more rewarding to be a provocative performance artist than an actual legislator. This disappointing moment in our politics is causing many people to retire from Congress and choose not to seek re-election.
But, to me, that is all the more reason to stay in the fight.
At a time when it seems Congress is devoid of real, principled conservative leaders it's more important than ever that serious people remain in public service. And that's what I've tried to provide since being elected to Congress in 2018 - principled, conservative leadership and a focus on the hard but important work of policy making.
We've made a lot of progress together since then. I sit on the Energy and Commerce Committee, one of the most powerful committees in Congress, and fight every day to protect our vital oil and gas industry and restore American energy independence. As Chairman of the Task Force to Combat the Mexican Drug Cartels, I'm developing concrete solutions to destroy the people responsible for the tens of thousands of Americans who are killed every year with fentanyl poison. And I'm leading the effort in Congress to pass needed policy changes into law to secure our southern border.
I take my job as a lawmaker and representative for Texas's Second Congressional District seriously. It has been an honor to serve my state and country these past few years, and I am excited to continue that service even in the face of this challenging political environment.
But I cannot win re-election without resources. That's why I am asking committed patriots like you from across the country to please stand with me as I seek re-election and make a small donation to my campaign. You can do so at the link below.
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY 2024 RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001psV6jIt07v6tzuu1uUoVj5v9T4Y0C_ZN7N8SjdDRU9r_hSynDp4AFjn4nZufhmxoorxV_Z-y5EuBwgxqVkdiTrUrgqH6cgvBmTuch7yIRb0EftVm3UKn4jvOqSbW4p_GN0sofS8g47_PZk0HKwP_trPVttqSoufVGWOzDWiTw22MsnssBlzjn0qNc2o0kJORZOInYgIXbIqEDpgHXn9dq8BYQTRomktXdze7N4G3HDBysAROb6nk6wQEAXUnknqDkheUz5-UHQSuzpCUpbmSU4UTWruJ-y27ckF3I3xZHXtRWuqu61qLGIJZYGuIVgW1Eoqqkga42VYun1VjDGRhgYe6P8NNd5j274zFDZM_GSY=&c=6973lETa328jmLEleb_gldGQbw345XJqCpKlPto9rX-eMCevobyHGQ==&ch=ezt1PMs2fYK52hICmwUke833IDobCzqb0uQWnkwGDU6Vdy6Katk3vQ==)
---
| Thank you for our continued support.
In Service,
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter - Our primary election here in Texas is just a couple of months away in March, and I need your help to be successful in this first step of my journey towards re-election. ==, it will go a long way to help ensure I am re-elected to Congress and continue to fight on the issues that matter most to you. First, I want to explain to you why I am running for re-election. Many are choosing not to, for understandable reasons. Congress has become a toxic place, with an incentive structure that makes it more rewarding to be a provocative performance artist than an actual legislator. This disappointing moment in our politics is causing many people to retire from Congress and choose not to seek re-election. But, to me, that is all the more reason to stay in the fight. At a time when it seems Congress is devoid of real, principled conservative leaders it's more important than ever that serious people remain in public service. And that's what I've tried to provide since being elected to Congress in 2018 - principled, conservative leadership and a focus on the hard but important work of policy making. We've made a lot of progress together since then. I sit on the Energy and Commerce Committee, one of the most powerful committees in Congress, and fight every day to protect our vital oil and gas industry and restore American energy independence. As Chairman of the Task Force to Combat the Mexican Drug Cartels, I'm developing concrete solutions to destroy the people responsible for the tens of thousands of Americans who are killed every year with fentanyl poison. And I'm leading the effort in Congress to pass needed policy changes into law to secure our southern border. I take my job as a lawmaker and representative for Texas's Second Congressional District seriously. It has been an honor to serve my state and country these past few years, and I am excited to continue that service even in the face of this challenging political environment. But I cannot win re-election without resources. That's why I am asking committed patriots like you from across the country to please stand with me as I seek re-election and make a small donation to my campaign. You can do so at the link below. | | | == | Thank you for our continued support. In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | P.S. If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

Team Gloria
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

---
Here's the thing Peter, I _never_ thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (_I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!_)
But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.
So when I put on my Capitol Police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, _it felt right_.
But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: _**we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists.**_
I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn.
[_**Please, can you chip in $10 or $20 split between Upset the Setup to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? clean_body: = Hey Peter, it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol Police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee. I've got an important announcement: I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Here's the thing Peter, I never thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!) But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself. So when I put on my Capitol Police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, it felt right. But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol. I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists. I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn. = Let's do it, Harry Dunn | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. | | BRIEFING FOR: TOP SUPPORTERS

---
I am writing to you from about 41,000 feet in the sky – from Trump Force One.
---
I’m flying to Iowa – where the _FIRST_ _VOTE_ OF 2024 WILL BE CAST IN ONLY **10** **DAYS**.
---
**Democrats recently launched a series of sinister attacks to try and stop us right before the Iowa Caucus begins.**
---
_They removed my name from the ballot in 2 states and even tried to get the Supreme Court to intervene in the D.C. witch hunt to rob me of my basic rights._

---
God only knows that the Left is plotting something else to try and stop us at the final hour.
---
But I trust you know that your favorite president leaves _NOTHING_ TO CHANCE.
---
_That’s why I’m making a trip to Iowa to ensure that our campaign can prevail against ANY acts of Election Interference that may come from the Biden White House between now and Caucus Day._
---
**NOTHING CAN STOP THE GREATEST POLITICAL MOVEMENT IN HISTORY!**
---
As I love to say, _if it’s not close, they can’t cheat!_
---
_So, with exactly 10 DAYS to go until the first vote is cast in the 2024 election, I’m asking you to make a contribution before I land in Iowa to show just how powerful our movement has become._
---
But, as I so often say, please do not make a contribution if you’re doing poorly right now due to Crooked Joe’s policies. I truly mean it.
---
We are just now passing over the great state of Tennessee. That gives us just under 2 hours until touchdown.

---

If you want to ensure our emails always go to your inbox, please add [contact@support.donaldjtrump.com](mailto:contact@support.donaldjtrump.com) to your address book.
Thank you for joining Team Trump. It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.
**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.
It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedConfirmUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=9b7607751b884599989cee6fa3b00407&_t=RtUO-XvmCQdKcKfDFd6ZuK9OcMQlHXEZ4-m5Vq72FZK4J5ufZMgj-uPOkbxjV5D8vDN7kJ9qrDDktfKMmGICoctGkzWXl0J2moYkwlxt2aIfK8QaTiDAFxGlay1ZhDMWEzDoRAqng0t4BCzBDp6-DzjzMHDm0dpb_i5lV9ZH--4%3D)

clean_body: * CRUISING ALTITUDE: 41,000 FT. | | | | | BRIEFING FOR: TOP SUPPORTERS I am writing to you from about 41,000 feet in the sky – from Trump Force One. I’m flying to Iowa – where the FIRST VOTE OF 2024 WILL BE CAST IN ONLY 10 DAYS. Democrats recently launched a series of sinister attacks to try and stop us right before the Iowa Caucus begins. They removed my name from the ballot in 2 states and even tried to get the Supreme Court to intervene in the D.C. witch hunt to rob me of my basic rights. God only knows that the Left is plotting something else to try and stop us at the final hour. But I trust you know that your favorite president leaves NOTHING TO CHANCE. That’s why I’m making a trip to Iowa to ensure that our campaign can prevail against ANY acts of Election Interference that may come from the Biden White House between now and Caucus Day. NOTHING CAN STOP THE GREATEST POLITICAL MOVEMENT IN HISTORY! As I love to say, if it’s not close, they can’t cheat! So, with exactly 10 DAYS to go until the first vote is cast in the 2024 election, I’m asking you to make a contribution before I land in Iowa to show just how powerful our movement has become. But, as I so often say, please do not make a contribution if you’re doing poorly right now due to Crooked Joe’s policies. I truly mean it. We are just now passing over the great state of Tennessee. That gives us just under 2 hours until touchdown. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Counting on you to defend Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Senate Republicans confirmed megamillionaire Eric Hovde will run against Tammy.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1818%2E35263%2ElYDSEz)
Peter — Last month, **Senate Republicans confirmed megamillionaire Eric Hovde will run against Tammy.** The California bank owner is trying to buy Wisconsin's Senate seat, and he'll have the full support of Senate Republicans in his pursuit to defeat Tammy. Republicans spent **_$77 million_** in 2022 to reelect Ron Johnson to Wisconsin's other U.S. Senate seat by just one point. After their narrow victory, _there’s no telling just how much the GOP will spend to flip Tammy’s seat and take back the Senate this time around._ Tammy doesn't have a virtually unlimited campaign war chest like Hovde, so she's counting on grassroots donations to defend Wisconsin's toss-up Senate seat. **[Will you add a donation of any amount to help Tammy keep Wisconsin blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority? The California bank owner is trying to buy Wisconsin's Senate seat, and he'll have the full support of Senate Republicans in his pursuit to defeat Tammy. Republicans spent $77 million in 2022 to reelect Ron Johnson to Wisconsin's other U.S. Senate seat by just one point. After their narrow victory, there’s no telling just how much the GOP will spend to flip Tammy’s seat and take back the Senate this time around. Tammy doesn't have a virtually unlimited campaign war chest like Hovde, so she's counting on grassroots donations to defend Wisconsin's toss-up Senate seat. name: JoeBiden.com
subject: "Rot in Hell"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We’re asking you to do something that may seem strange: believe Donald Trump. | | |
---
Peter -- Donald Trump is telling the truth about his plans for a second term. He’s proudly bragging about being the one who “got rid of” _Roe v. Wade_ and has backed a national abortion ban. He said he would be a dictator on “Day One.” He promised to seek revenge on his enemies and wrote (in a Christmas Day message!) that those who oppose him should “rot in Hell.” Donald Trump is telling us who he is. _We should believe him._ We need all hands on deck to make sure voters across the country understand the choice in 2024. name: Nikki Haley
subject: An incredible night
body:
Last night I had a town hall on CNN

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb8boeubin92enhml7m8b4b1qvfp7ug1tarl86f0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie4o36cth2bs)
---

Friend,

Last night I had a town hall on CNN and it was an incredible night answering questions from voters in the audience and sharing my vision for our future!

Whether it was discussing my plans to restore our economy, secure our border, and make America strong and proud again - I made sure to have an honest discussion with the people in the audience and Americans across the country.

Thanks to people like you, I know we can win this race and save our country. But I need your help to make it happen.

**[Can you rush a donation so we can reach every American with my message, win the White House, and SAVE our future?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7m9t9efs8dmi8kmsm9qa2e7csetmr92vq2co5ro_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie4o36cth2bs "If you’re reading this email, that means YOU — we need YOUR support to help Nikki win this race. ")**

---

Just like I did last night, I will continue to fight for our future and share my plans for tackling the real issues Americans care about.

Americans are ready for a candidate who can win and right this ship, and I'm ready to get to work as your next president!

But with just 10 DAYS until the first votes take place, I need your help right now to reach every voter with my message of strength and truth.

**[Will you rush a donation to keep the momentum SURGING and amplify my message across America?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcts0cmb1bl4a52gfodepk6ae7mbscqtuvp1ni28_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie4o36cth2bs "Will you rush a donation to keep the momentum SURGING and amplify my message across America?")**

Even a $5 donation today makes a difference.

Let's make history!

My very best,

| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0jd0dvnfjukmkmnnro9kkmtiaml6don0tgqic4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie4o36cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zif8hrc22ulva6g9e7d1u573vgol0nf79no1t14g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31c5ie4o36cth2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Last night I had a town hall on CNN | | | | | | Friend, Last night I had a town hall on CNN and it was an incredible night answering questions from voters in the audience and sharing my vision for our future! Whether it was discussing my plans to restore our economy, secure our border, and make America strong and proud again - I made sure to have an honest discussion with the people in the audience and Americans across the country. Thanks to people like you, I know we can win this race and save our country. But I need your help to make it happen. "If you’re reading this email, that means YOU — we need YOUR support to help Nikki win this race. " | | Just like I did last night, I will continue to fight for our future and share my plans for tackling the real issues Americans care about. Americans are ready for a candidate who can win and right this ship, and I'm ready to get to work as your next president! But with just 10 DAYS until the first votes take place, I need your help right now to reach every voter with my message of strength and truth. "Will you rush a donation to keep the momentum SURGING and amplify my message across America?" Even a $5 donation today makes a difference. Let's make history! My very best, | Nikki R. Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Shamaine Daniels
subject: Do you remember January 5th?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Daniels For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Dear Friend
Most Americans learned about Rep. Scott Perry and his participation in the January 6th insurrection during the January 6th Committee hearing conducted during the summer of 2022. But for those of us in the District, not only were we aware of his ineffectiveness as a Representative, we had already begun experiencing his violent side months earlier.
Starting on November 5th, 2020 when he and Rep. Jim Jordan from Ohio came to our Capitol steps to try to stop the counting of our votes, seeing Scott Perry anywhere near the PA Capitol was never good news.
Once we welcomed 2021, there were rumblings that Scott Perry would be escalating his efforts to help Donad Trump overturn the election. With a little over a month until I was due to deliver my daughter, I was very pregnant when we started to get news that there were bad actors coming into the City.
As an elected official, I had insight into what we were expecting while also reassuring Harrisburg residents that we could manage what was coming. Our City police, State Police and Capitol Police did amazing work making sure that we did. As tensions mounted, my blood pressure had risen to such a point that my doctors asked me to consider inducing labor right away. I asked them to wait for the protests to come to an end before we made the call about whether I was truly developing preeclampsia or whether the stress of keeping my constituents safe was elevating my blood pressure.
Before there was January 6th, there was the January 5th “hear us roar” rally in Harrisburg, a hell for residents and leaders in the District alike. Rioters shootings guns into the air , Confederate flags speeding through residential City streets, and the harassment of service workers were all a part of the show orchestrated by Perry and Jordan as the rioters terrorized PA-10 before continuing south to D.C.for the main event.
On January 6th, dictators around the world would mock American Democracy insisting that we did not in fact have one, or that whatever we did have was in no way more legitimate than what they had. On this January 5th please remember those of us in PA10 who experienced first hand the chaos and violence meted out by unscrupulous and self-serving individuals who claim to be leaders in our community and our country.
Alternate text [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/I%20like%20this%20one.jpg] A few days after January 6th my vitals would go back to normal, and I would soon deliver that precocious little girl many of you have come to love. The January 6th insurrection shook this country and this world, the events of January 5th highlighted how little Scott Perry cared about the safety of his own constituents, much less their votes.
In 2024 you get to choose between sending Scott Perry back to Congress or supporting the woman who has been standing up to him. I believe I know which one you choose, and that’s why I’m asking you to make a contribution to our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
- Shamaine
Donate Now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Paid for by Daniels For Congress
Daniels For Congress
2018 North 3rd Street
Harrisburg, PA 17102
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/myLsy9UwwUCp-IA3Ji37qA2?unsubscribedata=lJTz3oqBDo4wNpUwF4%2BeArh%2FX2G30l44rW8JtWgD6WBtaaydrKcbKTv2odcS4wdP9G0qOxXoKBf08I%2F%2FvaJcjsmW%2F4hG8wpw9JH0rqV6uH6xRfP%2BhWrCOJqG45ApFjgSrDKijEYlpxFEXry57BYDOfLoKHWFEw%2BIL2Djhm5I5f7b46mxame7TyXaho3jBRHorE6MAhBL3Y%2B38Of6n6cQW6JWBnDxPmZO8LaAE7AHqLIkroMzL69uSfttVfZzMk3qhqrn%2BuMaYc2rpcv1DLSM%2FM9RaoIT4eBgTqSGu6%2BDQfe0BXwpCSkYjHh7WXm0jKxudKPiDvZnaYhRr4ZCSUncs7ySs%2BQhh03e3A2mLqhLkJ4cxLapt9M9102e%2B%2B3xSifgyKqWnkJoTj%2FE3PwEgLdL0xEIZ%2Bt790ETL1CIiAzd3Pg%3D .

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Ilhan just introduced bills to block U.S. arms deals
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In her continued fight for the human rights of all people, Justice
Democrats incumbent Rep. Ilhan Omar just introduced two resolutions in
Congress to block U.S. arms sales to Saudi Arabia and the United Arab
Emirates (UAE).

This is Ilhan’s latest effort to hold these countries accountable for
their horrific human rights abuses, including the murder of Washington
Post journalist Jamal Khashoggi in 2018, the imprisonment and execution of
political dissidents, the supply of weapons used in war crimes, and the
modern-day enslavement of migrant domestic workers.

Despite these atrocities, the Biden Administration has continued to sell
hundreds of millions of dollars worth of weapons and military supplies to
the two nations. It should be commonsense at this point that the US should
not fund ANY country committing crimes against humanity.

These resolutions are part of the Squad’s broader fight for human rights
worldwide, including their calls for a permanent ceasefire in Gaza and
their delegation to South America.

In spite of their moral courage to fight for humane foreign policy, Ilhan
and other Squad members are facing tough primary challenges this year. We
simply can’t afford to lose their pro-peace leadership in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240105.l2snRv&refcode=em20240105-32680&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32680%2E1203867%2EDSOYpv ]Fuel Justice Democrats’ work to re-elect the Squad and support their
ongoing fight against human rights abuses here and abroad: pitch in
$3 or more today!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240105.l2snRv&refcode=em20240105-32680&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=32680%2E1203867%2EDSOYpv ]Contribute $3

Know that your grassroots contribution will truly make a difference as our
people-powered organization does everything we can to protect our
progressive incumbents and expand the bloc in 2024.

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=32680%2E1203867%2EDSOYpv ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=32680%2E1203867%2EDSOYpv ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240105-32680-footer&t=1023&refcode2=32680_1203867_DSOYpv&akid=32680%2E1203867%2EDSOYpv

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=32680%2E1203867%2EDSOYpv

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

We're just months away from the 2024 elections, and we already have special elections right around the corner. As a member of our pro-choice community, you know how critical the year ahead will be — and you know that our work is only possible because of _your_ support.

**One of the best ways to make lasting change in the fight for reproductive rights is to commit to a monthly donation to EMILYs List.** Your recurring support allows us to give our endorsed women a clearer picture of the support they can count on each month. And in a big election year like this, the ability to plan ahead is more important than ever.
****EMILYs List candidates are counting on your support, Peter. Will you commit to supporting Democratic pro-choice women month after month this year?****

clean_body: One of the easiest New Year's resolutions you can make! | = Peter, this new year, commit to supporting Democratic pro-choice women! | = We're just months away from the 2024 elections, and we already have special elections right around the corner. As a member of our pro-choice community, you know how critical the year ahead will be — and you know that our work is only possible because of your support. One of the best ways to make lasting change in the fight for reproductive rights is to commit to a monthly donation to EMILYs List. Your recurring support allows us to give our endorsed women a clearer picture of the support they can count on each month. And in a big election year like this, the ability to plan ahead is more important than ever. **EMILYs List candidates are counting on your support, Peter. Will you commit to supporting Democratic pro-choice women month after month this year?** = If you can't commit to a monthly donation at this time, no worries! You can make a one-time donation by clicking here: = Thank you for your support, the EMILYs List team EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. But I’m going to need you this year more than ever before. = | **= = = = = =** Thank you, Raja | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. We set an ambitious goal, and WFP members like you answered the call. | | | Happy New Year, Peter! When we announced a few days before the New Year that a generous (real) individual donor would match up to $30,000 in online contributions, we knew we were setting an ambitious goal. But WFP members like you answered the call. **And we are happy to report back that, thanks to you, we not only met but _exceeded_ our goal!** Deadlines and goals like these are important because grassroots contributions from members like you are what fuels so much of our organizing work. And just a few days into 2024, we are already seeing the impact of that work across the country: **This week, Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke were sworn into office as WFP members of the Philadelphia City Council!** Following their historic victories in November, there are now NO at-large Republicans on the City Council. Philadelphia is now a two-party town: Democrats, and the Working Families Party. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUdhSabb5RCSporqTlMZe5xk73v3QVkj0_50bJ4fOjLMvkaqn-Y7i2PPI9dULYz_VQZg4X_IZm6dKg3T_BQQp5By5p06vEjgMOngiI-yPHMV6NFN2J7JwUK6AI_TBDaEMwlkFBjujuSKPPEDiEixFHkGZZXVgnNrCz8X5HcvAPOWKkU1YkB0qMwoYgaS-DvqzE-84lZCCsItQ7mnq1tSQyBXLOgqOl3iLKPMphdORUc8xxti8BBhccagNWSo3u7LYVbWKmb5h1LQyOwCVMA_DPaxX8YKwdS0MzRAe8mamI86BnQMWE_UE3aqab8LqYE0Z7zTriA4ky4a_cXHvFOLdSbJIBem3cPt-3XNEG6ZvWKcU/42q/ypaGQEzSRPaOA5Voo07hig/h0/W8mGB--_gkV4SJd_x69OBi5H-xMGhwsz_fOLQhov3Cc) **Next week, new Virginia state legislators will be sworn into office** including WFP-endorsed State Senators Danica Roem, Aaron Rouse, and Stella Pekarsky, and Delegates Nadarius Clark, Josh Thomas, Josh Cole, Michael Feggans, and Kelly Fowler. Their victories along with others helped flip full control of the state legislature to Democrats — and will help put a stop to Governor Glenn Youngkin’s anti-abortion, right-wing agenda in 2024. **And right before the new year, a majority of the Wisconsin Supreme Court struck down Republicans' heavily gerrymandered legislative maps,** a huge win for democracy in a key battleground state. WFP members helped get out the vote for Justice Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin last year, and she ended up providing the decisive vote in a 4-3 decision that will help ensure fair representation for Wisconsinites. All of these victories will have a real impact on people's lives, and none of them would be possible without you. But as we begin a new year, we know even tougher fights lie ahead. **We have a bold agenda for 2024: doing our part to end Republican control of Congress, defending and electing our champions, and continuing to build and win governing power by and for working class people of all races, all while blocking the authoritarian right from power.** Thanks to your generous support, we’re entering the new year better equipped and better prepared to get the job done. Thank you again Peter, from the bottom of our hearts, for being a part of this movement and for all that you do. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran
body:
We want to hear from you →

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76534971/447776039/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240105_team_2024poll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWY1NmFkMC1mM2FiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OmOw9bn-X7xN5W4ttoTFJCm8CmGBOwJeJfabBHZX1Bo=)

Chris is in this race for you, Derek. He's running for reelection without taking a dime from corporate PACs or dark money interest groups. That means that his sole focus is on fighting to protect the Common Good and listening to voters – including you. [_**At Team Deluzio, we want to know what your top priorities are for 2024.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76534972/447776040/-607488706?ms=240105_team_2024poll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWY1NmFkMC1mM2FiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OmOw9bn-X7xN5W4ttoTFJCm8CmGBOwJeJfabBHZX1Bo=&emci=01a4d219-eaab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b9f56ad0-f3ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13185894) Whether you're concerned about the price of food and gas, ready to volunteer for Democratic candidates, or don't want to see another Republican House majority – we want to hear your thoughts. **[TAKE OUR 2024 PRIORITIES SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76534973/447776041/-607488706?ms=240105_team_2024poll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWY1NmFkMC1mM2FiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OmOw9bn-X7xN5W4ttoTFJCm8CmGBOwJeJfabBHZX1Bo=&emci=01a4d219-eaab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b9f56ad0-f3ab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=13185894)** **[PROTECT PA-17](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76534974/447776042/-1807168276?refcode=240105_team_2024poll_b1&ms=240105_team_2024poll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWY1NmFkMC1mM2FiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OmOw9bn-X7xN5W4ttoTFJCm8CmGBOwJeJfabBHZX1Bo=)** **Derek, this poll is critical in letting us know what you are worried about or prioritizing this year, and it just takes a minute to fill out. ** We're looking forward to reading your responses and continuing to fight alongside you to protect the Common Good in 2024. – Team Deluzio
| Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country.

Friend, I am proud to be one of the most conservative members of Congress, and I am honored to have had your support in the fight to save our country. But our work taking on the Washington Establishment is not finished. Our country is at a crossroads, and only the America First Movement can save it and **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.** **_That's why I'm running for re-election in 2024!_**

**Now more than ever, I need you to stand with me.** The attacks against me have only intensified since I announced my re-election campaign because Democrats know that I am a thorn in the side of the Biden administration and the Radical Left. Friend, they would love nothing more than to silence me and our movement. I will not back down, but I need resources to fight fire with fire, so it is crucial I do not fall short of my fundraising goals now as we rapidly approach election day. [**I invite you to support my campaign by chipping in whatever you can today and by sharing my announcement video with other grassroots conservatives.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=063740d980ae4c9e9e25bfd4e370d284&_e=sjYL7OS37uPpPzUwll9k2SGHIWTSF5DChjq5E0DnhBjdasxQCYwd_gPg-ZP6WGI4qBcdlfDTt6ca05KyHH6aNkLwJwDHbbfro4AJNbXJtKLepKpxhHC3MrnqpoKIcX0vdp7hnH_Pev-ykuS0YO-nHWLxv850XELARIyXosI6TcCd-4PlhKSibOA5QsZPvP0PLmBPnCByjX5tMX_PytBJz1_v8Yym2V8n5KlpTukMXy8JqScl4g5qT66Ddr_YefP-o3uHRqqOMuOAojKSjzBnrlvUKwnuSnbEHEQQFMF43EqG752BN6qbHFsZhy9TDtkmnQZ9ChmDIelC3sb4tvG68Q%3D%3D) Every donation matters, and with the combined support of America First patriots from across the country, my team and I will have the resources to lead the fight to Save America! name: Mark Kelly
subject: The real threat in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Team: We’re gearing up for one of the toughest election cycles in our nation’s history here in Arizona.
Across my home state, MAGA candidates like Kari Lake are running to tear our democracy apart, and we have to take this threat seriously.
In 2022, Kari Lake came within 17,000 votes of becoming Arizona’s next Governor after running a campaign that fully embraced MAGA lies, disinformation, conspiracies, election denial, and far-right policies.
Since that campaign, she’s dug even deeper into the dangerous rhetoric.
You name it, Kari Lake’s done it. Simply put, her candidacy is a danger to our democracy. But she’s not alone. More MAGA-right candidates — including Blake Masters, Abe Hamadeh, and the “Q-Anon Shaman” — are running for federal office in Arizona, too.
Arizona is the frontline of this fight, and we’re not going to shy away from it.
We’re working to make sure pro-democracy candidates win in Arizona and beat Kari Lake and the other MAGA-Republicans. But we can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking:
[**Can you make a contribution of $3, or whatever you can afford, to help power our campaign as we prepare for this important fight in Arizona?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan24.HePNUs&refcode=em240105-1-450&t=1&akid=5690%2E6688874%2E0OZZAN)

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Is the Constitution “trash?!"
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://trk.libertyledger.)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://trk.libertyledger._1lbaIPBIIYIg)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://trk.libertyledger.) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA1LTI4NGRmYzA4ZWIzYjQxYjk4ZjhmZTE1ZDg2OWY3NDI3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/1WckheQa4p1SxXdjPJSQnA) to unsubscribe.
---

As Michelle told Roll Call, “We’re not talking about hypotheticals anymore. This is a very real issue that is directly putting women and families in danger.” Kate Cox’s story of being forced to flee the state to seek care elsewhere after being denied a potentially life saving abortion is proof of that.
Nobody but a woman and her healthcare providers should be involved in any decision around healthcare. Politicians like Monica De La Cruz, Ted Cruz, and Greg Abott have no place in those decisions.
**This is not a controversial take, Peter. It’s one that is shared by the majority of Americans.**
All over the country we are seeing wins for reproductive rights — even in states where Trump won in 2020. Ballot initiatives protecting access to abortion have passed in states like Ohio, Kansas, Montana and Kentucky and if we can win there, we know a pro-choice candidate can win in South Texas too!
**[TX-15 doesn’t need extremists like Monica De La Cruz interfering in women’s private healthcare decisions — please chip in now to elect a pro-choice champion for South Texas!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76537255/447781265/-125991864?refcode=em20240105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODgwZmRjYS1mNWFiLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rYBcHZnQnaNtmZvoJ2TJvKoK7PNWHw-a8NedzE-pdKw=)**

clean_body: This is a winning issue, Peter. Peter, did you see from Roll Call highlighting Michelle as one of seven pro-choice Latina candidates running for Congress this year? Michelle has been running on a strong pro-choice platform from the very beginning and this article confirms what we already knew — that abortion is not just on the ballot in 2024, but that it is a winning issue. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: = = = = = = As Michelle told Roll Call, “We’re not talking about hypotheticals anymore. This is a very real issue that is directly putting women and families in danger.” Kate Cox’s story of being forced to flee the state to seek care elsewhere after being denied a potentially life saving abortion is proof of that. Nobody but a woman and her healthcare providers should be involved in any decision around healthcare. Politicians like Monica De La Cruz, Ted Cruz, and Greg Abott have no place in those decisions. This is not a controversial take, Peter. It’s one that is shared by the majority of Americans. All over the country we are seeing wins for reproductive rights — even in states where Trump won in 2020. Ballot initiatives protecting access to abortion have passed in states like Ohio, Kansas, Montana and Kentucky and if we can win there, we know a pro-choice candidate can win in South Texas too! = ¡Vamos Por Quince! name: Tony Evers
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
| Derek,

Thanks to your surge of grassroots donations, we closed 2023 strongly and reached our ambitious end-of-year fundraising goal!

With so much at stake, I can't thank you enough.

Wisconsin will likely be the closest swing state in the country, and with Donald Trump promising to end fair elections and become America's first dictator, the stakes couldn't be higher.

3 years after Trump's violent insurrection at the Capitol, American democracy remains in grave danger, and we owe it to all current and future generations of Americans to fight back with everything we have.

Thanks to your generosity, we can make critical early investments in building the infrastructure we need to win in November.

Together, we will get through these hard times and emerge stronger.

Onward,

Tony

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Another one bites the dust
body:
This is a step in the right direction but more work needs to be done

| **Two Down. One To Go.**
---
| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2d90862ba514e26936fea805ce9fd1b&_e=xLHeMsK-QikuEn_f0GTXpkUkTL9AP9HYxhynkXy0_FVHS9DV0V2qOolcsmKBiMQoVmgpaqFzboQ_j3_Xt5kAfn2OMjXOquVikMsx6oKcUDmpN-B67RbuI9tpPZRsez-fcH1WH4Ty3sdcrFTenMhwNa6dDzKKuy-bB2Qwko7w4UZhKAb9WbVKgUZMbJ1B9fA5qN1eiHu4FZS1J0gvfkfsYQlGpRuj2GFmwyhLBnkjwpTYCA22VNs6vEMxEyvl03sBDt21t1pqOw_zdAM5Qcdcmd6YFkY-6Fo0q-peTIm3-PK3DH71zMqjizpR0l0RDVyb-yCHnPkpfVW4GiIwDEVuIg%3D%3D)
---
Friend, The removal of Havard's morally bankrupt president was long overdue. Claudine Gay's blatantly antisemitic remarks and ongoing plagiarism scandal are a stain on our nation's institutions of higher education. This is without a doubt a step in the right direction but more work must be done. Last month, when I questioned the woke university presidents of Penn, Harvard, and MIT about rising antisemitism on their campuses, all three of them refused to answer if calls on their campuses for the GENOCIDE of Jews constituted harrasment or even a violation of their schools' codes of conduct. _When I confronted them further about their morally depraved answers the best response they could give me was to say "It depends on the context"._ Friend, you and I both know that it does not depend on context. Calling for the Genocide of Jews on these campuses is without a doubt an act of harassment against their school's Jewish students and most definitely violates the standards for student conduct each one of these universities have created. The right answer is obvious, but it became clear as I was questioning them that all three women were completely unwilling to contradict the woke ideology of intersectionality and terrified to express views not completely in line with the Radical Leftists that have taken hold of their institutions. These acts of cowardice are why the resignation of all three university presidents is necessary! After a public pressure campaign led by me and those who share our resolve, Penn and Harvard finally did the right thing by forcing Liz Magill and Claudine Gay to resign. **But to this day the President of MIT has yet to be removed.** That is simply unacceptable. [**That 's why I am demanding the resignation of MIT President Sally Kornbluth****.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2d90862ba514e26936fea805ce9fd1b&_e=xLHeMsK-QikuEn_f0GTXpkUkTL9AP9HYxhynkXy0_FVHS9DV0V2qOolcsmKBiMQoVmgpaqFzboQ_j3_Xt5kAfn2OMjXOquVikMsx6oKcUDmpN-B67RbuI9tpPZRsez-fcH1WH4Ty3sdcrFTenMhwNa6dDzKKuy-bB2Qwko7w4UZhKAb9WbVKgUZMbJ1B9fA5koWLMN-IC7wKznuxQnjeki-MH0AgtFkKbinjcTEtbSQ69469Vr7RjTQEVUVwfplmrZgIVKznTfmDBj5yEWbHS_DSW-B7WA93WeJeQJPIrbeicaRNALZqKYydmzVqS6OJSLj5KmxmNrBj2J4jWR6YGQ%3D%3D)
| [ **SIGN HOUSE GOP PETITION** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2d90862ba514e26936fea805ce9fd1b&_e=xLHeMsK-QikuEn_f0GTXpkUkTL9AP9HYxhynkXy0_FVHS9DV0V2qOolcsmKBiMQoVmgpaqFzboQ_j3_Xt5kAfn2OMjXOquVikMsx6oKcUDmpN-B67RbuI9tpPZRsez-fcH1WH4Ty3sdcrFTenMhwNa6dDzKKuy-bB2Qwko7w4UZhKAb9WbVKgUZMbJ1B9fA5kh6-oW0V5QB1gzVer-QCgr5H4RkxNuc0QbS2NhWS7GOxJ4DFARkFkLdxjIuXDGCJWjI_GYRoM7ZjR5RVcbE6LAPQBOtNrJP-LY_GmOOS7WT_HDR-yuwxLysVQAkqvIsz2_cjDjKzB6BeY8M0MUBRCw%3D%3D)

There's no beating around the bush.

This has been a tough month for Republicans.

We've lost a lot of ground fighting back against the radical ideologies and manifestos from my far-left colleagues, and it seems as if every time they open their mouths, money pours in from their base.

We've been presented with a serious opportunity to make up some ground...._I 'm talking as seriously as the business end of a .45._
