disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
Support the Search for Truth

I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

---
| | | | | |
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fbe86e7b54345bbb7ab8b09b71f1156&_e=2lzs82uY4EEUksWo1QrU7AcZhL2LHGbeyLwGjJt_j3qIwc0Guw3fARmCLPVb28wJhySeRPzjDBXROHiQh_h6Ze6KZVhClu2cIQq2bHz2kM9LWmLpq0vk1glAlTt2fnSHt5yMk78NUSW3gKGw8Wb_BULEXlNyXW_o2C7yG3cW0FZ7265hvqfHWRCufB1Pe75Hw61AhLmzp41R9BZbR_nh1HiK4xnVtA6LmqAQBSpg1-qqtNcy4P0421KcI7uORzfnHXScArp_4CA0O49jg5nUWqrF5HlyCTlrPxL23jo1M2gi9iAsinuYzqj5xosutvhkL16gp8Wamuk-wc-sWZN3kIo94wdh1bMAOBDFMJX2Xk_3h5EGTotUt24a_B01Mb1AtcYHvU7lrAp_KezE3K0JUbrg27uK6ZDrB7iIluX3z8kchEPg5O1YBbI_PPZiy4Fg)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Patriot,
AOC lied about January 6th.
Chuck Schumer lied about January 6th.
Liz Cheney lied about January 6th.
EVEN the FBI lied about January 6th.
Politicians, the deep state, and the fake news media have spun tales for 3 years too long... I am committed to exposing the TRUTH.

| | | [HELP ME EXPOSE THE TRUTH](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fbe86e7b54345bbb7ab8b09b71f1156&_e=2lzs82uY4EEUksWo1QrU7AcZhL2LHGbeyLwGjJt_j3qIwc0Guw3fARmCLPVb28wJhySeRPzjDBXROHiQh_h6Ze6KZVhClu2cIQq2bHz2kM9LWmLpq0vk1glAlTt2fnSHt5yMk78NUSW3gKGw8Wb_BULEXlNyXW_o2C7yG3cW0FZ7265hvqfHWRCufB1Pe75Hw61AhLmzp41R9BZbR_nh1HiK4xnVtA6LmqAQBSpg1-qqtNcy4P0421KcI7uORzfnHXScArp_4CA0O49jg5nUWqrF5HlyCTlrPxL23jo1M2g5xWKq7_hh2C-XoC-oobwyVz7sdtic7wz6P8RQc0rGmf39kQC2puusZegd9J8UCTZUxssz_Rvbp7UudODTp2rXsfU83cNKkmUPAr_eNN1AoH01CEEVNLCKezQWUCw4L9jSyOoQQCGOX--5cEU2dBHN)
---
**Here are the facts...**

* We marched peacefully to the Capitol

* After arriving there, the Capitol Police **LET** us in

* President Trump called the national guard to calm the crowds, he was **DENIED**

* The FBI "does not know" how many feds were in the crowd creating chaos

* Everyone there and the American people were lied to

The real instigators, _those who twisted facts and fanned flames,_ are the ones we must expose.

**[That's why I'm stepping into the fray, not just to speak but to act, not just to promise but to deliver.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fbe86e7b54345bbb7ab8b09b71f1156&_e=2lzs82uY4EEUksWo1QrU7AcZhL2LHGbeyLwGjJt_j3qIwc0Guw3fARmCLPVb28wJhySeRPzjDBXROHiQh_h6Ze6KZVhClu2cIQq2bHz2kM9LWmLpq0vk1glAlTt2fnSHt5yMk78NUSW3gKGw8Wb_BULEXlNyXW_o2C7yG3cW0FZ7265hvqfHWRCufB1Pe75Hw61AhLmzp41R9BZbR_nh1HiK4xnVtA6LmqAQBSpg1-qqtNcy4P0421KcI7uORzfnHXScArp_4CA0O49jg5nUWqrF5HlyCTlrPxL23jo1M2gFF9EgKd5InbuwUItRfJ3t-2FCsWhpQkFf9D_MRv-QCHph3r7dTbRT-PR4T5SVfLPym4j8R7WhHCJgiF0h0_I9aDLOg5sBcS0fK-eoJ88aONWkjld5ZeFumAlkSwTW0OxXGg6oqifZKeK8Cqdh78V0)**

I am deeply committed to uncovering the truth of what really happened on that day. The Left's constant lies and coverups have completely destroyed the public's trust in government and the media.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fbe86e7b54345bbb7ab8b09b71f1156&_e=2lzs82uY4EEUksWo1QrU7AcZhL2LHGbeyLwGjJt_j3qIwc0Guw3fARmCLPVb28wJhySeRPzjDBXROHiQh_h6Ze6KZVhClu2cIQq2bHz2kM9LWmLpq0vk1glAlTt2fnSHt5yMk78NUSW3gKGw8Wb_BULEXlNyXW_o2C7yG3cW0FZ7265hvqfHWRCufB1Pe75Hw61AhLmzp41R9BZbR_nh1HiK4xnVtA6LmqAQBSpg1-qqtNcy4P0421KcI7uORzfnHXScArp_4CA0O49jg5nUWqrF5HlyCTlrPxL23jo1M2jdFfrBcLJFbuJShiQppASgBRgKdBp0Sj170TL2l1KMED-8MGY1htOLTaZhjYzHl0ubBzijBn_eXYhVzv4R9z2I7GLVd8FH9DakOMg91jXomx1Eq2WLqyy0i2o1i_XrZhxMb2fnSByiSxkU5w8MF4D7)

The Left, in their relentless pursuit of power, has not only attempted to rewrite history but has also manipulated the facts surrounding January 6th to further their own agenda.

Once elected, I am going to create a NEW January 6th commission that finds the TRUTH about what happened on that day 3 years ago... but I need your help to get to Congress.

**[Join me in this crusade for transparency before the Left and the Deep State silence us all>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fbe86e7b54345bbb7ab8b09b71f1156&_e=2lzs82uY4EEUksWo1QrU7AcZhL2LHGbeyLwGjJt_j3qIwc0Guw3fARmCLPVb28wJhySeRPzjDBXROHiQh_h6Ze6KZVhClu2cIQq2bHz2kM9LWmLpq0vk1glAlTt2fnSHt5yMk78NUSW3gKGw8Wb_BULEXlNyXW_o2C7yG3cW0FZ7265hvqfHWRCufB1Pe75Hw61AhLmzp41R9BZbR_nh1HiK4xnVtA6LmqAQBSpg1-qqtNcy4P0421KcI7uORzfnHXScArp_4CA0O49jg5nUWqrF5HlyCTlrPxL23jo1M2j7l0dk7ufHWdMYH5hvxtLDFrcBPJg7hhtepJaQG793eDdOqDmxVvDjLi-tOkV-sOxSRyJBEvK4mOgXAt5SZxqc4xCKRkWb9oyuTvsD-FEp3PXZmzvrF4Ftg_V96-EJv-wSpwR8UhnO-jq6NcQSJKXq)**

| | | [SEND ME TO CONGRESS](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fbe86e7b54345bbb7ab8b09b71f1156&_e=2lzs82uY4EEUksWo1QrU7AcZhL2LHGbeyLwGjJt_j3qIwc0Guw3fARmCLPVb28wJhySeRPzjDBXROHiQh_h6Ze6KZVhClu2cIQq2bHz2kM9LWmLpq0vk1glAlTt2fnSHt5yMk78NUSW3gKGw8Wb_BULEXlNyXW_o2C7yG3cW0FZ7265hvqfHWRCufB1Pe75Hw61AhLmzp41R9BZbR_nh1HiK4xnVtA6LmqAQBSpg1-qqtNcy4P0421KcI7uORzfnHXScArp_4CA0O49jg5nUWqrF5HlyCTlrPxL23jo1M2hMNBFVENf1x_3TKzQcAbASzOuBADex9ukeeWuPgSZBJg53h1RJr0bWk6YhdloWDRBryfcxEOviEEJEfG7K7wgIDzStCWX6MWjvn8qDC-zXJmc7x5n9_vncOmQx8Ooh8V0nG9NnPzMH9fRGdYCv_cFJ)
---

We will find and hold those responsible who mislead the public about what _really_ happened.

God bless America,

Chuck Hand
America First Candidate for Congress, GA-2

clean_body: I endorsed Trump, and I was wrong. | | | | | I have an admission to make: Eight years ago, I endorsed Donald Trump because he was winning. I was wrong. And unlike everyone else in this race, I can admit when I make a mistake. Now it's 2024 and we are confronted with the same choice again. See my new ad about this choice HERE: In the end, the most important characteristic of any candidate for president of the United States is simple: Character. Neither Joe Biden or Donald Trump are acceptable to me. With your help, the Jan 23rd primary will be the first day of our new path forward for America. Sincerely, Governor Chris Christie | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

Dear Peter,
Happy 2024! I want you to know how grateful I feel for your support!
There is a rush at the end of every quarter to show that we can turn out our grassroots dollars, and so many of you answered our call:
☎️ So many answered our phone calls–giving for the first time or returning for a couple more times
💬 Many of you responded to our text messages and contributed
📧 So many of you responded to our emails
Our team reached out, and you responded! We don’t have big corporate backers or a long list of wealthy friends, but we have a coalition who reached out to their communities to multiply support, and for that, our team and I are GRATEFUL.
We have a grassroots foundation and strength, and every three months, we have demonstrated that we can turn out strong in money, too.
With a whole lot of gratitude,
Raquel
P.S. A special shout out to our staff, volunteers, and Eddie, who spent the end-of-the-year holidays celebrating every dollar that came in.
I took this picture of them as we were crunching numbers the last days.

And Biden Will Be The Only Democratic Primary Candidate In Three States After Parties Exclude Primary Challengers

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689217%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DSqYCkpLIZgHU8aU0BRGpQ&sysid=1 Media Matters Appears To Have Unintentionally Revealed Its Confidential List Of Donors

Media Matters for America mistakenly leaked its confidential donor list containing funding from major Democratic megadonors, according to documents obtained by the Washington Free Beacon. Media Matters is not legally mandated to publicly reveal its donors because of its status as a 501(c)(3) charity organization and the documents state they are “Not Open to Public Inspection.”

list containing funding from major Democratic megadonors, according to
documents obtained by the Washington Free Beacon. Media Matters is not
legally mandated to publicly reveal its donors because of its status

subject: The latest blow to abortion access:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76550385/447795179/1436736915?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTY1Y2YxYWQtZmVhYi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pJrCvwkmB9zancVap4SYYaiYgoycOXqbceFkkFwIx-M=)
Peter,

**A right-wing court recently ruled that Texas can ban emergency abortions despite federal guidance.** Because of this far-right appellate court ruling, women in Texas are again at-risk of being denied life-saving care.

This is just the latest blow to reproductive rights across the country. Republicans have made it clear: Their top priority is a national abortion ban with zero exceptions – even if it saves the life of the mother, and even in cases of rape or incest.

I am horrified by the anti-abortion trend in this country. No woman, no matter their zip code, should be denied care. These decisions should be between a woman and her doctor, not MAGA Republicans.

**[That is why we must codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law to make abortion safe and legal nationwide. clean_body: | = Peter, A right-wing court recently ruled that Texas can ban emergency abortions despite federal guidance. Because of this far-right appellate court ruling, women in Texas are again at-risk of being denied life-saving care. This is just the latest blow to reproductive rights across the country. Republicans have made it clear: Their top priority is a national abortion ban with zero exceptions – even if it saves the life of the mother, and even in cases of rape or incest. I am horrified by the anti-abortion trend in this country. No woman, no matter their zip code, should be denied care. These decisions should be between a woman and her doctor, not MAGA Republicans. | ** Safeguarding women’s reproductive rights is one of my top priorities as I run for office. Fellow Conservative, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=989bdfb3bd67481f82f3cb146b8430ea&_e=YqxC3W0QU167QrMOyXhVmBxnPRARc99GWC54hKqijUjPRLrTVybUcDQRF89OPYZPiVNeUqt2LSd4fiExrKsmdVuOOryPYj7PVVbHPNJIBU3QP48Y4F1L2M24jIVjOGjQTXc_QEXw0H7A_7f8TieHxrqqQ0K9N6EH5Y40US81f0CmJDbuCRFvEZsyhiXLp-xfkN_CDPXVft-Y71uTbjNJPt9BPRUDfUPTClUENo6_faH0KmVQXpcB9RbL8ClDwsX-KepF5fcVGpjudzrTjsMRsmA_heNNnULGzbFAy0i9boHLY4pAmJDmotFrXGPTPolD3gYMaV1jEa3ZKT-27eRgX4y4KleSAYbbQbjwviAF6lMvFjfhYRsHDNEluBjzACg-)

It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight.**

I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens.**

clean_body: In the Biden Family | | | Fellow Conservative, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | - It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight. | I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY. As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens. | With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress ../../../private/var/folders/r/prmwhjj3zq7czqp52lmjdcw0000gn/T/com.microsoft.Outlook/Outlook Temp/%unsubscribe_url%

body:
At every turn, Joe Biden has let the American people down and fallen short of expectations.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69b103279b5448e8a6c04dc31fcac037&_e=yC_Q0bg-B3Qm_a_0VT6Wtj9adbF8l3QTzRR6T-if_hoJxlXar9dgzH7QdlyeOZO9qE9--9l-6vCKcEb-xgwxKZPNxk5RBOW6bU9KcD9mglKevtgt1Ywwrop9jYu36Uoma-SkdY8lr0mN06mq4_d_63JnNvCQcBWKkScgilPXuWDa8HLkC758wvOb8SwTKK1f356KxCA1c53_8MrjeRnOhYDYjs451pCjovKOsN8rAf42MACNeXTWf_Vf5yvOLLKiY5wokGbr0M7B3fC0Gl7vN8TW9pRl2oCcglmP6yPs2YnAH-RSW7VRsw36VdDttGz86PhisVZbW-vArODNEVVW1dswCARTP3X5HOcnzXc6YjNXlzEZdNjeMqL3HDWQlSJA42ixLH1O9XJSrJQQZtjD5CkOERqCbIzlBiLJt8DaJL9RPZbG5-YbPnN_Y-ZoVd55qIAwFFbKbMRnjV9EvUQNaw%3D%3D)
---

At every turn, Joe Biden has let the American people down and fallen short of expectations.

**As we kick off 2024, we wanted to take just a few minutes to share with you our list of[the top 10 Biden foreign policies failures](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69b103279b5448e8a6c04dc31fcac037&_e=yC_Q0bg-B3Qm_a_0VT6Wtj9adbF8l3QTzRR6T-if_hoJxlXar9dgzH7QdlyeOZO9qE9--9l-6vCKcEb-xgwxKZPNxk5RBOW6bU9KcD9mglKevtgt1Ywwrop9jYu36Uoma-SkdY8lr0mN06mq4_d_63JnNvCQcBWKkScgilPXuWDa8HLkC758wvOb8SwTKK1f356KxCA1c53_8MrjeRnOhYDYjs451pCjovKOsN8rAf42MACNeXTWf_Vf5yvOLLKiY5wokGbr0M7B3fC0Gl7vN8TW9pRl2oCcglmP6yPs2YnAH-RSW7VRsw36VdDttGz8aIXb6nKxvcG3NpXaGvmMZ-m15q6xnw7F6pyjkG15eIVRzxCUFk2iItJU1j1tZGKelzIC8UX20nlj00UjV33yoBUSi5wN_UCm9JRuuQNQHyOK70AmrtIWL7Ji7MJtvY3KmbCXOCM4iZ2Wu0EOKjKPuA%3D%3D "the top 10 Biden foreign policies failures"), not just from his time in the Oval Office, but over his lifetime of political service.**

---
| | | [STAND UP TO BIDEN'S FAILURES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69b103279b5448e8a6c04dc31fcac037&_e=yC_Q0bg-B3Qm_a_0VT6Wtj9adbF8l3QTzRR6T-if_hoJxlXar9dgzH7QdlyeOZO9qE9--9l-6vCKcEb-xgwxKZPNxk5RBOW6bU9KcD9mglKevtgt1Ywwrop9jYu36Uoma-SkdY8lr0mN06mq4_d_63JnNvCQcBWKkScgilPXuWDa8HLkC758wvOb8SwTKK1f356KxCA1c53_8MrjeRnOhYDYjs451pCjovKOsN8rAf42MACNeXTWf_Vf5yvOLLKiY5wokGbr0M7B3fC0Gl7vN8TW9pRl2oCcglmP6yPs2YnAH-RSW7VRsw36VdDttGz8k6ZzK573yNxjjPOVbS2fYoKo5f_YfpNHMWlCoAEp8qFSlFZ6kO3abMsbAbCmwngScvnyKTE3vMrThzAChoJxdizzc1Wa86qupMDgzBlfxukXsnM_aG_OudcN7A5SR4hjutyABgvzF8cAyzIQbrswCA%3D%3D "STAND UP TO BIDEN’S FAILURES")
---
|
**_FAILURE #1_ - In 1987, just two weeks before Reagan's famous speech calling to tear down the Berlin Wall, Joe Biden called the President's foreign policy "too controversial."

_FAILURE #2_ - Biden voted against the First Gulf War targeting Saddam Hussein, a murderous dictator who ruled through violence, torture, executions, and unlawful detention.

_FAILURE #3_ - Under his tenure as Vice President in the Obama Administration, Biden oversaw the withdrawal of troops from Iraq.

_FAILURE #4_ - In 2011, Joe Biden told then-President Barack Obama that he did not approve of the raid that ultimately killed terrorist Osama bin Laden.

_FAILURE #5_ - In the midst of the 2012 election, Biden downplayed Mitt Romney's "Cold War mindset," once again underestimating Russian aggression.

_FAILURE #6_ - Turning to his Presidency, six days after being inaugurated Joe Biden conceded to Vladimir Putin an unconditional five-year extension of the New START treaty, which over two-thirds of republican Senators rejected in 2010.

_FAILURE #7_ \- President Biden then put his trust in the Taliban and presided over the disastrous withdrawal of troops from Afghanistan where the US put $7 billion of high-tech military equipment into the hands of terrorists.

_FAILURE #8_ - Biden has continued calls to revive Obama's "Iran Nuclear Deal," giving billions of dollars to the Iranian mullahs who call for the destruction of America.

_FAILURE #9_ - As China steals American intellectual property, flies spy balloons over our country, and builds fake islands as naval bases in the South China Sea, Joe Biden has refused to draw a hard line on the communist state.

_FAILURE #10_ - While our ally Israel faces the greatest terrorist threat they've ever seen, Joe Biden is attempting to play both sides, supporting retaliation publicly, but lecturing the Israeli Prime Minister on the need for an inadequate response privately.**

---

| | | [STAND UP TO BIDEN'S FAILURES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69b103279b5448e8a6c04dc31fcac037&_e=yC_Q0bg-B3Qm_a_0VT6Wtj9adbF8l3QTzRR6T-if_hoJxlXar9dgzH7QdlyeOZO9qE9--9l-6vCKcEb-xgwxKZPNxk5RBOW6bU9KcD9mglKevtgt1Ywwrop9jYu36Uoma-SkdY8lr0mN06mq4_d_63JnNvCQcBWKkScgilPXuWDa8HLkC758wvOb8SwTKK1f356KxCA1c53_8MrjeRnOhYDYjs451pCjovKOsN8rAf42MACNeXTWf_Vf5yvOLLKiY5wokGbr0M7B3fC0Gl7vN8TW9pRl2oCcglmP6yPs2YnAH-RSW7VRsw36VdDttGz81kZVc2DjZup3DfghPbZmz3oX9NZz-QjkQTEOCrr2XIGqAbybxQBJZ40Kn6grBiiigBczJZWAhlXQa_UKAfU8bDfQ_eTfYOzAdEYml9hWLjBDXPJrUEQQxcV1mm2z8fyYnPKxVbIYR_q_oORT3FTIsw%3D%3D "STAND UP TO BIDEN’S FAILURES")
---

We must stand together and end the reign of Biden's policies this November if America has any chance of restoring its respect on the international stage, Friend.

**Do your part to support strong national security candidates who will work to repair the damage done by Joe Biden by[CLICKING HERE](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69b103279b5448e8a6c04dc31fcac037&_e=yC_Q0bg-B3Qm_a_0VT6Wtj9adbF8l3QTzRR6T-if_hoJxlXar9dgzH7QdlyeOZO9qE9--9l-6vCKcEb-xgwxKZPNxk5RBOW6bU9KcD9mglKevtgt1Ywwrop9jYu36Uoma-SkdY8lr0mN06mq4_d_63JnNvCQcBWKkScgilPXuWDa8HLkC758wvOb8SwTKK1f356KxCA1c53_8MrjeRnOhYDYjs451pCjovKOsN8rAf42MACNeXTWf_Vf5yvOLLKiY5wokGbr0M7B3fC0Gl7vN8TW9pRl2oCcglmP6yPs2YnAH-RSW7VRsw36VdDttGz8u6JaQ1-PntmcMUdA3ubRH3EwTyQJul08Ibx5Dcs9t9bYbz5TJgDO5GEROb9mbLdzA-ktLgNwCeBx3HqqWviiuYaBPlZwXKhVVw3iEnRDKtgP2eYn-nJencVwbrXmijlR4Qf26qWOuosYtjNh1vuJFQ%3D%3D "CLICKING HERE") to chip in a donation as small as $1 before the day is over.**

name: George Whitesides
subject: We need a change.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76553409/447797219/-46109959?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyMTAxNy0wMWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCinsY7xQfFg5XZbUKbWTnT4wtfT0S5k1lst4PPWnrs=)
Peter, we had quite the year in 2023!

From launching our grassroots campaign to flip CA-27 blue, to being ranked one of the “most competitive” toss-up races in the country, to meeting thousands of voters – we’ve truly laid the groundwork for success in 2024.

This is an important year for our campaign and, frankly, the entire country. What happens in November will shape our society and our children’s futures for years to come. That’s why I’m determined to keep our strong momentum as we look toward our election.

[**So today, instead of asking you for your hard-earned dollars, I’m asking for your personal endorsement of our movement. Will you click here to sign on to Team Whitesides? Your support will help us build upon our progress in 2023.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76553410/447797221/1559156873?refcode=em-1.5.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyMTAxNy0wMWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCinsY7xQfFg5XZbUKbWTnT4wtfT0S5k1lst4PPWnrs=&emci=fa4b1ffe-00ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=76221017-01ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36198509)
| ****[Endorse George for CA-27](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76553418/447797224/1559156873?refcode=em-1.5.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyMTAxNy0wMWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCinsY7xQfFg5XZbUKbWTnT4wtfT0S5k1lst4PPWnrs=&emci=fa4b1ffe-00ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=76221017-01ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36198509)****
---

The final months of 2023 also proved Mike Garcia’s vulnerability.

Thanks to his lurch to the extreme far-right reaches of the Republican Party, Garcia’s approval rating among our CA-27 community plummeted by nearly 10%!

_It’s clear that local voters are ready for a change. That’s why I stepped up._

I’m not a career politician, I’m running a local-focused, grassroots campaign to bring a new perspective to Congress. **The people of the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys have been ignored for too long by Mike Garcia. It’s time to put an end to extremism, and get back to doing substantive, meaningful work for the community.**

[**The national GOP is going all in to keep Garcia in power, and the best way to overcome that is with widespread grassroots support. I’m not asking for a donation, only that you add your name to our endorsement petition to send a message about how strong this movement is.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76553420/447797231/1559156873?refcode=em-1.5.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyMTAxNy0wMWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCinsY7xQfFg5XZbUKbWTnT4wtfT0S5k1lst4PPWnrs=&emci=fa4b1ffe-00ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=76221017-01ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36198509)
****[Endorse George](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76553422/447797233/1559156873?refcode=em-1.5.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyMTAxNy0wMWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCinsY7xQfFg5XZbUKbWTnT4wtfT0S5k1lst4PPWnrs=&emci=fa4b1ffe-00ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=76221017-01ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=36198509)****

clean_body: | = Peter, we had quite the year in 2023! From launching our grassroots campaign to flip CA-27 blue, to being ranked one of the “most competitive” toss-up races in the country, to meeting thousands of voters – we’ve truly laid the groundwork for success in 2024. This is an important year for our campaign and, frankly, the entire country. What happens in November will shape our society and our children’s futures for years to come. That’s why I’m determined to keep our strong momentum as we look toward our election. | ** The final months of 2023 also proved Mike Garcia’s vulnerability. Thanks to his lurch to the extreme far-right reaches of the Republican Party, Garcia’s approval rating among our CA-27 community plummeted by nearly 10%! It’s clear that local voters are ready for a change. That’s why I stepped up. I’m not a career politician, I’m running a local-focused, grassroots campaign to bring a new perspective to Congress. The people of the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys have been ignored for too long by Mike Garcia. It’s time to put an end to extremism, and get back to doing substantive, meaningful work for the community. Thank you, GW =** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Beware of “Evil Elmo”
body:

Sandler is also known for running a website called “Welcome to the Rape Camp.” He also **pleaded guilty for trying to extort millions from the Girl Scouts of America.** Apparently he has since moved to the West Coast and now dresses as the Cookie Monster. (No, that’s not a joke, we wish it was.)

Of course, we’ve already told you that Sinema also takes money from Hitler-admirer, Nazi memorabilia collector Harlan Crow – who made yet another contribution to her campaign this quarter.
Sinema really will take money from ANYONE. And then use it to fund her luxury lifestyle, of course. How else do you expect her to foot the bill for all those trips to Paris, Barcelona, and London - and all those five star meals and hotel stays?
**Time and again, Sinema proves she’s going to put herself and her donors – the ones footing the bill for her vacations – above the needs of hardworking, everyday Arizonans.****_[We’re going to make sure she’s held accountable for it in 2024, chip in now to help >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xsJ8JJQGQFyd7rVJiU8YxH0K1IzGeeDqfPbVzjkVq-DNPpxvlhX_tDpd_EMIzmczmpEtctY5glvEgLx5gY5SPy8xNBnVPzwhO-R_Y3Vd1NnyRh_P1KXXQ71c02MGbdlJPrbJ5IDuwE0xEitGBNPqdrKGforAsPsVzSwzrnlSaoib5NDJTytPHhQCuYBRQrODkBj7tGmR2D9MNl3u2nFuGgtvPKDxOs3tGMrdz8PZaucYcG37U1HJtpPryDm_IWbbFAyFm1U3wGh3yFq3KlgEBD/42q/X8iPUAvHTHG_EZwO99eNtQ/h8/IwDiN_mDBmpkWcVvF_t4Im9rsCm2SQrrXe0s82EGmxM)_ **

name: Chuck Hand
subject: January 6th: uncovering the Real Story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
Support the Search for Truth
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

---
| | | | | |
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uigghu_WEc3OGiT1HE199Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnewS-P0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jaHVjay1oYW5kLWZvci1nZW9yZ2lhL2NoZmdfZG9uX3BvcF9wYV9qYW4tanNpeF9yc18yMDI0MDEwNi8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDEwNSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9MTcuNzYmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wdHImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1ycyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249amFuLWpzaXgwMTA1MjAyNCZ1dG1fdGVybT1wYVcDc3BjQgpllJVamGXWhxukUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Patriot,
AOC lied about January 6th.
Chuck Schumer lied about January 6th.
Liz Cheney lied about January 6th.
EVEN the FBI lied about January 6th.
Politicians, the deep state, and the fake news media have spun tales for 3 years too long... I am committed to exposing the TRUTH.
| | | | [HELP ME EXPOSE THE TRUTH](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uigghu_WEc3OGiT1HE199Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnewS-P0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jaHVjay1oYW5kLWZvci1nZW9yZ2lhL2NoZmdfZG9uX3BvcF9wYV9qYW4tanNpeF9yc18yMDI0MDEwNi8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDEwNSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9MTcuNzYmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wdHImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1ycyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249amFuLWpzaXgwMTA1MjAyNCZ1dG1fdGVybT1wYVcDc3BjQgpllJVamGXWhxukUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
**Here are the facts...**

* We marched peacefully to the Capitol

* After arriving there, the Capitol Police **LET** us in

* President Trump called the national guard to calm the crowds, he was **DENIED**

* The FBI “does not know” how many feds were in the crowd creating chaos

* Everyone there and the American people were lied to

The real instigators, _those who twisted facts and fanned flames,_ are the ones we must expose.

**[That's why I'm stepping into the fray, not just to speak but to act, not just to promise but to deliver.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uigghu_WEc3OGiT1HE199Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnewS-P0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jaHVjay1oYW5kLWZvci1nZW9yZ2lhL2NoZmdfZG9uX3BvcF9wYV9qYW4tanNpeF9yc18yMDI0MDEwNi8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDEwNSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9MTcuNzYmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wdHImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1ycyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249amFuLWpzaXgwMTA1MjAyNCZ1dG1fdGVybT1wYVcDc3BjQgpllJVamGXWhxukUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

I am deeply committed to uncovering the truth of what really happened on that day. The Left’s constant lies and coverups have completely destroyed the public’s trust in government and the media.

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uigghu_WEc3OGiT1HE199Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnewS-P0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jaHVjay1oYW5kLWZvci1nZW9yZ2lhL2NoZmdfZG9uX3BvcF9wYV9qYW4tanNpeF9yc18yMDI0MDEwNi8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDEwNSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9MTcuNzYmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wdHImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1ycyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249amFuLWpzaXgwMTA1MjAyNCZ1dG1fdGVybT1wYVcDc3BjQgpllJVamGXWhxukUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

The Left, in their relentless pursuit of power, has not only attempted to rewrite history but has also manipulated the facts surrounding January 6th to further their own agenda.

Once elected, I am going to create a NEW January 6th commission that finds the TRUTH about what happened on that day 3 years ago... but I need your help to get to Congress.

**[Join me in this crusade for transparency before the Left and the Deep State silence us all >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uigghu_WEc3OGiT1HE199Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnewS-P0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jaHVjay1oYW5kLWZvci1nZW9yZ2lhL2NoZmdfZG9uX3BvcF9wYV9qYW4tanNpeF9yc18yMDI0MDEwNi8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDEwNSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9MTcuNzYmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wdHImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1ycyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249amFuLWpzaXgwMTA1MjAyNCZ1dG1fdGVybT1wYVcDc3BjQgpllJVamGXWhxukUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

| | | [SEND ME TO CONGRESS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uigghu_WEc3OGiT1HE199Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnewS-P0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9jaHVjay1oYW5kLWZvci1nZW9yZ2lhL2NoZmdfZG9uX3BvcF9wYV9qYW4tanNpeF9yc18yMDI0MDEwNi8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDI0MDEwNSZyZWN1cnJpbmc9dHJ1ZSZhbW91bnQ9MTcuNzYmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wdHImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1ycyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249amFuLWpzaXgwMTA1MjAyNCZ1dG1fdGVybT1wYVcDc3BjQgpllJVamGXWhxukUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---

We will find and hold those responsible who mislead the public about what _really_ happened.

God bless America,

Chuck Hand
America First Candidate for Congress, GA-2

PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Stop AIPAC via Our Revolution
subject: This is an unavoidable story for 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1011?refcode=email-20240105&akid=5148%2E5885482%2EBc-j9l ][IMG]

Peter Willis, we know
this is going to be a major part of our work in 2024:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13125?t=1052&akid=5148%2E5885482%2EBc-j9l ][IMG]

AIPAC, a right-wing special interest group that supports insurrectionists
and corporate Democrats, is ready to spend $100 million this election year
against Progressives who criticized Israel’s relentless bombing campaigns
against the Palestinian people in Gaza.

We’ve seen this before,
Peter Willis. Groups aligned with AIPAC,
like DMFI, spent millions to stop Bernie Sanders in the 2020 Democratic
presidential primary. These groups spent millions more to support
corporate Democrats against Progressives in the 2022 primaries — but we
overcame it to elect 9 new Progressives to Congress that year!

And all this money is spent against Bernie and other Progressives because
of their support for Palestinian human rights, conditioning aid to Israel,
and calls for peace in Gaza.

Progressive champions like Barbara Lee, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman,
Ilhan Omar, and others have bravely spoken out against Israeli war crimes
in Gaza. Now, AIPAC is readying their $100 million against them and the
races are already heating up — early voting will start in a few short
weeks for Barbara Lee’s race against corporate Dems for the U.S. Senate
seat in California!

They’ve got money, but we’ve got people. Our Revolution is a major part of
this fight to support Progressive champions against the massive amount of
anti-peace, anti-progressive money in 2024. Are you with us?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240105&akid=5148%2E5885482%2EBc-j9l ]Chip in now to directly support our work to defend and expand the
Progressive caucus against $100,000,000 of AIPAC spending. As the largest
grassroots-funded progressive political organization in the country, we’re
counting on your support in this critical election year.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240105&akid=5148%2E5885482%2EBc-j9l ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240105&akid=5148%2E5885482%2EBc-j9l ]CHIP IN $27
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1037?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=email-20240105&akid=5148%2E5885482%2EBc-j9l ]CHIP IN $35 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1038?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email-20240105&akid=5148%2E5885482%2EBc-j9l ]CHIP IN $50
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240105&akid=5148%2E5885482%2EBc-j9l ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240105&akid=5148%2E5885482%2EBc-j9l ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

We must never become comfortable with an American campaign finance system
where the slightest advocacy for peace or criticism of a bombing campaign
killing tens of thousands of civilians leads to $100 million lined up
against Peace candidates. That’s not democracy, it’s big money trying to
silence the voices of peace in Congress.

We can’t allow a repeat of what happened to Bernie in 2020 when big money
and the party machine coalesced to stop him. We can’t lose our Progressive
advocates for peace in Congress as AIPAC looks to target Bowman, Tlaib,
and others. And we must elect one of our strongest Peace candidates,
Barbara Lee, to the Senate.

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Peter Willis, we know this is going to be a major part of our work in 2024: [ ][IMG] AIPAC, a right-wing special interest group that supports insurrectionists and corporate Democrats, is ready to spend $100 million this election year against Progressives who criticized Israel’s relentless bombing campaigns against the Palestinian people in Gaza. We’ve seen this before, Peter Willis. Groups aligned with AIPAC, like DMFI, spent millions to stop Bernie Sanders in the 2020 Democratic presidential primary. These groups spent millions more to support corporate Democrats against Progressives in the 2022 primaries — but we overcame it to elect 9 new Progressives to Congress that year! And all this money is spent against Bernie and other Progressives because of their support for Palestinian human rights, conditioning aid to Israel, and calls for peace in Gaza. Progressive champions like Barbara Lee, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan Omar, and others have bravely spoken out against Israeli war crimes in Gaza. Now, AIPAC is readying their $100 million against them and the races are already heating up — early voting will start in a few short weeks for Barbara Lee’s race against corporate Dems for the U.S. Senate seat in California! **BREAKING:** CNN is attempting to rig the Iowa GOP Caucus!

**Censorship, cherry-picking polls, and legal threats are just the mainstream media’s latest tactics to prop up their favorite pick-of-the-month puppet.**

They have disgracefully, cherry-picked arbitrary poll parameters to favor requirements. Morning Consult recently had me polling ahead of Nikki Haley in one of the largest-conducted Iowa polls. This is of course, after they cut my Iowa town hall short after I pointed out uncomfortable truths about January 6 and related topics, which CNN instantly and desperately covered up as "conspiracy theories.”

[**You know it and I know it, the TRUTH is: CNN is afraid of open dialogue on the issues and allowing a perspective they disagree with.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=52f28d1135444dbdb373d4e832814046&_e=hP6iQuvbABi1Q7NbQ-YkBPcoGP1XMK5GXnDqIlXkyMYclvT08YfxD3NxvJAToaSUWI3k8mmPNHC5FRX9urMpcZ-oIW_zp6Qv8SlC8BIqwC1sETJI8ZX-CxIuSNxltFv6lvT1IXzPjZJipBknZ5qy_lfNw_ZB-WgIkjJEbF9Hok_TgcTiuh8X85EsUVQZEzcwRRl4RIWEMD6DtjR2gWyQ7CVEQ5L3Cxwhwtzd2lE4WgkND8Ce9k_AgV3GINmY4idP8j43ZKnr4eElbzZgAXQAw4Wn4h-OEcQrnSTkm1J3HKBGXvomMkBPJu_v1s-in5_jP-9h92BclcnTOAPiXWpKooOj8d384xipHay4wCPzj8NzQStpj7LfmcBZeLvqoRvK5VOJvDRByuilJ3xttb3tJg%3D%3D) Their floating head talk show hosts have never missed an opportunity to to slander me saying, I’m “infecting the public with conspiracy,” “one step away from Nazi propaganda,” and “selling sinister lies.”

[** SHUT DOWN THE CORRUPTION **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=52f28d1135444dbdb373d4e832814046&_e=hP6iQuvbABi1Q7NbQ-YkBPcoGP1XMK5GXnDqIlXkyMYclvT08YfxD3NxvJAToaSUWI3k8mmPNHC5FRX9urMpcZ-oIW_zp6Qv8SlC8BIqwC1sETJI8ZX-CxIuSNxltFv6lvT1IXzPjZJipBknZ5qy_lfNw_ZB-WgIkjJEbF9Hok_TgcTiuh8X85EsUVQZEzcwRRl4RIWEMD6DtjR2gWyQ7CVEQ5L3Cxwhwtzd2lE4Wgmcb52_2269d6qyy5dQ1h__kbv0_L8tkC7t3eZQpmuiLwb1iTQRnXnWWt7oxGGQvT2Z0GTlWNE4BU0a-AFMeGsg680MNdZCj21xcULQV1n70U6gli5b7KLob8i1T23tqC8W_kioQ0G6UwGEdJks5MwuF86OX8b3RF0HQkx0bqcBSQ%3D%3D)
---

Open your eyes and see what CNN and other mainstream media outlets are trying to do: implement a plot to prop up the establishment-approved GOP puppet. Don’t let them get away with it. This is an insult to GOP caucusgoers in Iowa and the American people.

While the mainstream media desperately tries to count me out, we’re bypassing them and _**going straight to you, the people,**_ to expose a new layer of media corruption. On Wednesday, January 10, at 8 PM EST/7 PM CT, podcast host Tim Pool will host a live-studio audience town hall with me.

I hope you’ll tune in for the TRUTH.
[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=52f28d1135444dbdb373d4e832814046&_e=hP6iQuvbABi1Q7NbQ-YkBPcoGP1XMK5GXnDqIlXkyMYclvT08YfxD3NxvJAToaSUWI3k8mmPNHC5FRX9urMpcZ-oIW_zp6Qv8SlC8BIqwC1sETJI8ZX-CxIuSNxltFv6lvT1IXzPjZJipBknZ5qy_lfNw_ZB-WgIkjJEbF9Hok_TgcTiuh8X85EsUVQZEzcwRRl4RIWEMD6DtjR2gWyQ7CVEQ5L3Cxwhwtzd2lE4WgkOpxjcU8eucBXoYcD2WSTcbt9D2aufDc5ASQ03pCei41WyP2AvNMDDCLOQDeMi4vcMP8sqwRUB0ikrHGMRT6GMvfSa9MHafC9E5JWC6-Vb1M5Jk1Vrrulkj31VhHzdvGiIVKzDXqm4UNdb30h8XUo0hhkQuC_fiF7_-2iiuutG-g%3D%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1684.1.6320c7664c208f0bb3672e2bbcc7294a) |
---
## This Will Benefit You More Than You Know!
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers. In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1685.1.54b1a7ea2ed317d3372d21e449840125). I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1686.1.7e24088542a73f0ed08d13f679f20123) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple. [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1687.1.9d4471eea08672f14601cda520e085ac) is a 2 year intensive program consisting of 24 courses divided between 4 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online (you can LITERALLY watch anytime from anywhere). _"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15** Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1688.1.3f02df63bba2e3f7ef28877cd966d2ad) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester. **Spring 2024 Semester Courses** :
\- Hebrews & The General Epistles
\- 5-Fold Ministry
\- 7 Churches Of Revelation
\- Pentateuch (First 5 Books of the Bible)
\- Johannine Literature (Gospel & Letters of John)
\- Helps Ministry Classes for the Spring 2024 Semester begin January 18. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1689.1.4c5461bb3bdf6727cab480bb234b9c60) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1690.1.7a6f1780346ac95e715b5fe418454ab7), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1691.1.515b5ee179859194428112e25698e90a), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1692.1.87cab8a77264dead9f1b60ce36c917ed), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1693.1.330720012a08c0f2ede68b700b5f202c), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1694.1.e78d9769077f3d28e32491bae2ff3312), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5022715.1695.1.005901a4ca0b1b46309453ad8d905b52)). Friend,

Last night I had a town hall on CNN and it was an incredible night answering questions from voters in the audience and sharing my vision for our future!

Whether it was discussing my plans to restore our economy, secure our border, and make America strong and proud again - I made sure to have an honest discussion with the people in the audience and Americans across the country.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7709f492d6044a54b39e109a24bb6ef1&_e=qYOAExtIT0uS8FiTDmf5CXWCN6gqGE4KLL4XqhFj1F8QTGngHmuGjBfA6qxWzEk51MMz1_bJdE-nxfXQRXa68YFIvY8NYRs2B_NWJJthttIjPweZ5NTFN__u6zASsDySMEPq_mXLZ37Xy7MEXd8QV5c6PfopaqxAbLNlPpYUl-7m5m0rlmHMOg94VAsDwEIEXT159gvYhYR3ohKRQNBWH6fojeyR-ZaMWMVi1RuGNBsLgYSC9vSk_k8bTAV3OMhrJNFYw2OEeDDBJhkSVOYIpyVnLuycUFXFkC4NlTZNx9_UeFcuma_GnRwilzhZCCCDdN2ZqYBJAs7YhPQcHadlisv5B8FYm2JVmMByCwNNkAx9disgU2x-4sj9r_5ggtx436KK24dKNH1csWR5WB8pArocS7zjj6l9tt8m5K-Dig9REzFtU7asCwWG62cJH3RBTYCTqkZINmis4G3T91McrPATO5bElRWsdRA67jmmSjrEuKyNGfu82cjKT0y4iAAX-kW4zvO5OF7Gr9LDDtafckuDAq9kyrpMV7AV-0n3hbu7ZS4_-TnFkcgGQt7zoZ7LxIiUWMcP65DdocUrD2Vgi87-qkaumzybw4LkPFsRg4UjGZTRe3vWQ0FisTwA6VZj "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Last night I had a town hall on CNN | | | | | | Friend, Last night I had a town hall on CNN and it was an incredible night answering questions from voters in the audience and sharing my vision for our future! Whether it was discussing my plans to restore our economy, secure our border, and make America strong and proud again - I made sure to have an honest discussion with the people in the audience and Americans across the country. Thanks to people like you, I know we can win this race and save our country. But I need your help to make it happen. "If you’re reading this email, that means YOU — we need YOUR support to help Nikki win this race. " | | Just like I did last night, I will continue to fight for our future and share my plans for tackling the real issues Americans care about. Americans are ready for a candidate who can win and right this ship, and I'm ready to get to work as your next president! But with just 10 DAYS until the first votes take place, I need your help right now to reach every voter with my message of strength and truth. "Will you rush a donation to keep the momentum SURGING and amplify my message across America? " Even a $5 donation today makes a difference. Let's make history! My very best, | Nikki R. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Sharing some amazing news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I’m nearly jumping for joy.
| | |
---
This is huge news, friend!
**_We just learned that activists here in Florida have officially put abortion on the ballot in 2024!_**
This ballot initiative will give Florida voters the chance to codify reproductive rights into our state constitution and overturn Republicans’ far-right abortion ban.
I can’t overstate just how important this victory is. In the years since Roe v. Wade was overturned, whenever voters are presented with a ballot initiative like this, they vote to codify reproductive rights every time. And I’m confident that the Sunshine State will be next.
**But far-right leaders like Rick Scott are STILL scheming to pass a nationwide ban on abortions._And right now, all eyes are on Florida. _**
**[_With the election year officially underway, we have to rise to the moment. That's why I've set a goal to bring in 10,000 donations before midnight tonight to defeat Rick Scott. Please, will you rush $5 now to help me defend reproductive rights and stop radicals like Scott from retaking the Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76558985/447803212/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk628-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDNiN2MyYWUtMDVhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Mm_po2apolXKTCIYPzQEW7ifTfFFAmsVShFvPn7r19k=)**

---
Look, over the last couple of years, we've watched the GOP unleash a tidal wave of extreme abortion bans across the country — including here in Florida. Today, my daughters and I are among the millions of women denied our rights to privacy, health care, and bodily autonomy. It’s not only infuriating — it’s downright _terrifying_.
Thankfully, voters across the country are fighting back. From Kansas to Ohio, they’ve taken to the ballot box to _reject_ these far-right bans and enshrine abortion rights in their state constitution. **Now, voters in Florida will have the chance to overturn Republicans’ extremist ban this November.**
But this is only just the beginning. If Democrats lose control of the Senate next year, Republicans could destroy abortion access nationwide.
That's why I’m running to defeat Rick Scott, restore abortion rights, and help save our Senate majority. **This race is a tie, but Scott has already spent over $3 million on attack ads during the last quarter alone.**
_[**Please, friend, I’m counting on your help: Will you rush $5 right now to help me defeat Rick Scott and defend abortion access? This race could be our ONLY chance to defend our Senate majority in 2024!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559003/447803228/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk628-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDNiN2MyYWUtMDVhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Mm_po2apolXKTCIYPzQEW7ifTfFFAmsVShFvPn7r19k=)_
| | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559005/447803229/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk628-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDNiN2MyYWUtMDVhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Mm_po2apolXKTCIYPzQEW7ifTfFFAmsVShFvPn7r19k=)

Thank you for all that you do,

Debbie
|
* * *

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

But far-right leaders like Rick Scott are STILL scheming to pass a nationwide ban on abortions.And right now, all eyes are on Florida. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Look, over the last couple of years, we've watched the GOP unleash a tidal wave of extreme abortion bans across the country — including here in Florida. Today, my daughters and I are among the millions of women denied our rights to privacy, health care, and bodily autonomy. It’s not only infuriating — it’s downright terrifying. Thankfully, voters across the country are fighting back. From Kansas to Ohio, they’ve taken to the ballot box to reject these far-right bans and enshrine abortion rights in their state constitution. Now, voters in Florida will have the chance to overturn Republicans’ extremist ban this November. But this is only just the beginning. If Democrats lose control of the Senate next year, Republicans could destroy abortion access nationwide. That's why I’m running to defeat Rick Scott, restore abortion rights, and help save our Senate majority. This race is a tie, but Scott has already spent over $3 million on attack ads during the last quarter alone. = | | = Thank you for all that you do, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559812/447804715/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535)_ **** _Democratic Mayors Sworn In_ This week, Democrats who won their mayoral elections in November were sworn in across the state. After flipping 6 seats in 40 of the largest cities and marking historic milestones in their victories, these former candidates are now ready to lead as mayors. From Evansville Mayor Stephanie Terry serving as the first Black, female mayor of the city to Mayor Eddie Melton bringing new energy to Gary, we are proud to have these public servants leading in our state. Congratulations to all Democratic mayors who took office this week, both incumbents and fresh faces. We look forward to watching their leadership over the next four years and beyond. They will do incredible things for their communities and Hoosiers across Indiana. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559813/447804716/1265880619?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535)**[_Share INDems_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559814/447804717/1265880619?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535) ****_Indiana Democrats Prioritize Early Childhood Education _ Indiana students need bold investments in their future, not half measures that do little to improve educational outcomes. While Republicans want to focus on [cell phones and small language tweaks](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559815/447804718/-2040300755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535), Democrats in the legislature want to revolutionize education by giving children a head start. Universal Pre-K will help ensure Indiana children are ready for Kindergarten, one of the biggest determinants for future educational success. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559816/447804719/-1498072503?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559817/447804720/-1498072503?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535) Hoosiers have a right to healthcare, and they shouldn’t have to bear the burden of mismanagement and poor leadership. Indiana needs change. The Indiana Democratic Party will continue to fight for expanded healthcare along with prudent fiscal responsibility. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559818/447804721/807392061?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535)**[ Share State Senator Shelli Yoder](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559819/447804722/807392061?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535) _State Senator Shelli Yoder Goes to Bat for Hoosiers_ State Senator Shelli Hoosier knows what it means to give her all for Hoosiers. Earlier this week, she filed four bills aimed at protecting Hoosiers and creating a better future. Her policy initiatives include protecting Indiana farmers, creating a soil health plan for solar farms, preventing childhood THC overdoses, and bolstering the food system in Indiana. Other statehouse leaders are announcing their initiatives as well, including Senator J.D. Ford’s ‘right to repair’ bill, Rep. Maureen Bauer’s [multi-faceted agenda](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559820/447804723/1866062229?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535), and Senator Greg Taylor’s bill to allow citizen ballot initiatives. Senator Yoder’s bills cover a wide variety of areas because she understands the importance of representing all Hoosiers and solving problems across the state. When the legislative session begins next week, Hoosiers can look to Senator Yoder and Indiana Democrats for sound leadership.
******[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559821/447804724/-1568001112?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535)**[Share **_Become a Delegate to the 2024 State and National Conventions_** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76559829/447804732/100484837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGEzNzIxOC0wN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3cpyyBEptyw5dmwRZQXjHuNcDrVD_OEVqvOnA33tpsY=&emci=08781bbb-faab-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3da37218-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4925535) Stay up-to-date with the latest news and updates on the 2024 Delegate Selection process. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Democratic Mayors Sworn In This week, Democrats who won their mayoral elections in November were sworn in across the state. After flipping 6 seats in 40 of the largest cities and marking historic milestones in their victories, these former candidates are now ready to lead as mayors. From Evansville Mayor Stephanie Terry serving as the first Black, female mayor of the city to Mayor Eddie Melton bringing new energy to Gary, we are proud to have these public servants leading in our state. Congratulations to all Democratic mayors who took office this week, both incumbents and fresh faces. We look forward to watching their leadership over the next four years and beyond. They will do incredible things for their communities and Hoosiers across Indiana. Indiana Democrats Prioritize Early Childhood Education Indiana students need bold investments in their future, not half measures that do little to improve educational outcomes. While Republicans want to focus on , Democrats in the legislature want to revolutionize education by giving children a head start. Universal Pre-K will help ensure Indiana children are ready for Kindergarten, one of the biggest determinants for future educational success. Hoosiers have a right to healthcare, and they shouldn’t have to bear the burden of mismanagement and poor leadership. Indiana needs change. The Indiana Democratic Party will continue to fight for expanded healthcare along with prudent fiscal responsibility. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. State Senator Shelli Yoder Goes to Bat for Hoosiers State Senator Shelli Hoosier knows what it means to give her all for Hoosiers. Earlier this week, she filed four bills aimed at protecting Hoosiers and creating a better future. Her policy initiatives include protecting Indiana farmers, creating a soil health plan for solar farms, preventing childhood THC overdoses, and bolstering the food system in Indiana. Other statehouse leaders are announcing their initiatives as well, including Senator J.D. Ford’s ‘right to repair’ bill, Rep. Maureen Bauer’s , and Senator Greg Taylor’s bill to allow citizen ballot initiatives. Senator Yoder’s bills cover a wide variety of areas because she understands the importance of representing all Hoosiers and solving problems across the state. When the legislative session begins next week, Hoosiers can look to Senator Yoder and Indiana Democrats for sound leadership. ** Become a Delegate to the 2024 State and National Conventions Stay up-to-date with the latest news and updates on the 2024 Delegate Selection process. Head to for more information about how to be a part of history next year in Chicago. Thinking About Running For Office in 2024? In 2024, we're looking to have a record number of Democrats running for office up and down the ballot all across Indiana. Having Democrats on the ballot for statewide, district, and local offices next year will ensure Hoosiers have as many choices as possible at the ballot box. If you're thinking about running for office, or just want to learn more, and a member of our team will be touch. Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Municipal campaign season is heating up, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help Upcoming Candidate Trainings Tuesday, January 9th: 1 p.m. ET: Running in a Red District. Join the National Democratic Training Committee for a free training on how to run for office in historically Republican areas. Learn the necessary steps to run, best practices, and how to get a campaign up and running. name: Dr. Paul Gosar
subject: Invasion at Southern Border Shatters All Previous Yearly Records
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | the Secure the Border Act | [](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-14-24-18-81a27391e3-5i66fe0c1d)
---
**Dear Fellow Patriots,** As your representative, I feel a profound duty to address a pressing issue that threatens the safety and security of our great nation. _America's illegal immigration crisis is shattering century-old records with alarming numbers!_

The recent data from the U.S Customs and Border Patrol is deeply concerning: **3,201,144 illegal aliens illegally crossed the southern border this year.** This is not a record to be proud of—it's unconscionable. **The Biden Regime's reckless open border policies have allowed nearly ten million illegal aliens to invade our country since Biden took office.**

What's even more alarming is the increase in terrorist activities at the southern border. In the last year, **over 200 terrorists,** have crossed into our territory. This is a stark contrast to just 11 terrorist suspects caught during the entire Trump presidency. The feeble Biden administration is emboldening these threats to our national security.

**_[To combat this crisis, I've been actively working on the Secure the Border Act —a comprehensive border security package that aims to protect our citizens and uphold the integrity of our nation](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-14-24-19-6fe4de4de0-5i66fe0c1d)_. **

Key provisions of the Secure the Border Act include:

Restarting construction of the border wall to fortify our borders.
Deploying cutting-edge technology to both the Southern and Northern borders.
Increasing the number of Border Patrol agents and providing bonus pay to ensure effective enforcement.
Demanding transparency from the Department of Homeland Security regarding illegal crossings.
Protecting unaccompanied children from human trafficking.
Ending catch and release policies.
Putting an end to the abuse of executive immigration authority.
Strengthening and streamlining the asylum process.

**[I need your support to make these critical measures a reality. Our nation's security is at stake, and your involvement can make a significant impact](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-14-24-19-6fe4de4de0-5i66fe0c1d).**
_**
How You Can Make a Difference:**_

**[Donate Now](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-14-24-19-6fe4de4de0-5i66fe0c1d): **Your contribution will directly support our efforts to secure our borders and protect American lives.
**Spread the Word:** Share this message with friends, family, and colleagues who share our commitment to a safer America.
**[Contact Your Representatives](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-14-24-20-026ced3d53-5i66fe0c1d): **Encourage your local representatives to stand with me and support the Secure the Border Act.

To donate and learn more about our mission to secure our borders, please **[click here](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-14-24-19-6fe4de4de0-5i66fe0c1d)**.

Thank you for standing with me in this crucial endeavor. Together, we can ensure a safer and more secure future for our great nation.

**For Freedom,**

Congressman Paul A. Gosar, D.D.S.
Representative, AZ-09

| [ DONATE >> ](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-14-24-18-81a27391e3-5i66fe0c1d)

subject: CA-SEN polling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
For most of 2023, polls showed us with a narrow lead or just a few points behind another Democrat in this race.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=35975%2E3422442%2EyWuqFy)
**The polling in this race has been a bit of a roller coaster ride.**
* For most of 2023, polls showed us with a narrow lead or just a few points behind another Democrat in this race.
* Then in October, Steve Garvey, a celebrity Republican, jumped into the race. He started gaining traction in the polls.
* In December, two polls showed Garvey moving into second place—which would keep us from advancing from the primary to the general.

Here’s the thing: Particularly because of Katie’s strength with young voters, we know we have what it takes to win the general election, no matter who the other candidate is. **But the math in this primary is straight up weird, and we can’t lose Katie’s voice in Congress just because of low primary turnout and a self-funded Republican.**
We have one month until ballots are mailed to voters and two months until Election Day. **[Can you help us reach voters ASAP and make sure Katie is California’s next U.S. Senator?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240105-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_POL_20240105_V1_F&refcode2=35975_3422442_yWuqFy&akid=35975%2E3422442%2EyWuqFy)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240105-1?refcode=EMAP24_1_POL_20240105_V1_F&refcode2=35975_3422442_yWuqFy&akid=35975%2E3422442%2EyWuqFy)
Thanks, Derek.
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAP24_1_POL_20240105_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=35975_3422442_yWuqFy&akid=35975%2E3422442%2EyWuqFy)**

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: What A Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
Team – 2023 was a HUGE year for this campaign.

[|
---](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/-TObSYcUnXSPjZkpfjYWuQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneulqP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF0ZWVmYWhzaW1vbi5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmWUcWSYZc6HTQhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR)
| | Team – 2023 was a HUGE year for this campaign. Not just our first year (well, 11 months) but a more successful one than we could have imagined. It’s hard to believe that just last February I launched my campaign to represent California’s 12th Congressional District. The last 11 months have been a whirlwind out on the trail, and as we launch into the election year, I want to reflect on where we are and how we got here. But before I do that, I hope you will take a moment to think about giving to fuel our efforts in 2024. | | [Donate](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/Xp4fOaWnv967nCozJeEOtQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneulqP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDUtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRxZJhlzodNCFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~)
---
When I launched this campaign last February, our community rallied behind the vision we shared. The countless conversations, where I passionately spoke about our goals and the change we could achieve together, set the foundation for what was to come.
Then we got to share the vision in beloved community; our campaign kickoff event was a testament to the strength of California’s 12th Congressional District, bringing together local artists, organizers, and leaders. These events show us what is possible because they draw out our love for our neighbors and desire for change. [**It was your support, cheers and contributions alike, that enabled us to host impactful events like these that resonate with our community and drive engagement for Team Lateefah.**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/Xp4fOaWnv967nCozJeEOtQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneulqP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDUtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRxZJhlzodNCFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~)
Taking our grassroots campaign to Washington DC was a surreal moment, symbolizing the coming together of our collective efforts. As we head into the election year, we need the resources to build on this momentum and expand our reach. [**Your generous contributions directly fund our ability to organize events, connect with voters, and establish a solid foundation for success.**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/Xp4fOaWnv967nCozJeEOtQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneulqP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDUtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRxZJhlzodNCFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~)
Our campaign only grew.
The endorsements we received from labor unions and national organizations like EMILY's List provided a powerful foundation for our campaign. These endorsements conveyed a message that our movement could not be ignored, and we were determined to make a lasting impact.
Governor Gavin Newsom’s endorsement was a huge milestone after months spent uniting a slew of elected officials from across the state behind our vision for California. With this collective support, the campaign gained momentum and a clear vision for our brightest possible future emerged.
The endorsements that came in 2023 from labor unions, national organizations, and elected officials have given our campaign undeniable strength. [**Now, it's time to leverage these endorsements effectively. Your financial support allows us to maximize the potential of these endorsements, reaching wider audiences and solidifying our position in the race.**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/Xp4fOaWnv967nCozJeEOtQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneulqP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDUtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRxZJhlzodNCFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~)
As we closed out 2023 by officially filing my candidacy papers, it marked a fitting milestone in our journey. Now, with the March 5th primary on the horizon, your support is more critical than ever.
Your contribution is a statement of belief in our shared vision. Every dollar brings us closer to achieving our goals, and with your support, we can make 2024 a year of triumph.
| [Donate](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/Xp4fOaWnv967nCozJeEOtQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRneulqP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDUtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZRxZJhlzodNCFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~)
---
Your generosity will fuel our campaign, ensuring that our message resonates with every voter in California's 12th Congressional District.
Thank you for being the backbone of our campaign, for believing in our cause, and for making a tangible difference. Together, we'll make 2024 a year of victory.
With heartfelt appreciation,
Lateefah Simon
| Paid for by Lateefah for Congress.

body:
Georgia’s maternal mortality crisis is worsening

|
