[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76560823/447805564/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjVhYzkxMi0wOGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvnyYhL7EuiwaOBkXwODUvcFLpD1b-IfOS2zvIRvKuQ=&emci=57ad2168-07ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=365ac912-08ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=43566853)

| | It’s no secret that Georgia has one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the entire country. What might not be as well known is that, **_despite a $16 BILLION budget surplus last year, Brian Kemp and his GOP allies in the state legislature allowed the maternal mortality crisis to worsen._**

Peter, Kemp and the GOP are failing Georgia moms and families.

Kemp has bragged about his 6-week abortion ban being one of the most restrictive in the entire country. And while Kemp is bragging about banning life-saving reproductive health care, our maternal mortality rate is steadily getting worse.

[**_We need to defeat Brian Kemp and GOP state legislators across Georgia if we’re going to make any headway on ending the maternal mortality crisis. Can you pitch in right now to help us flip seats in the Georgia legislature?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76560824/447805565/710125701?refcode=20240105.1_DPG_1E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjVhYzkxMi0wOGFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvnyYhL7EuiwaOBkXwODUvcFLpD1b-IfOS2zvIRvKuQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Surprise! New year, same MAGA BS! |

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

She will file an ethics complaint against Eric for his role in hosting a press conference outside the capitol for Hunter Biden.** Apparently MAGA Republicans don’t set resolutions, because if they did, they could learn a thing or two about the “New Year, New Me” mantra. body:
Republicans KNOW they have a real chance of losing next year, which is why they’re targeting toss-up seats like mine in PA-07.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76563054/447808619/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-05_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGMwYjQ0YS0wYmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHkeY6vTIL7Sk4w9m-aNcftZDN2YY2Qu67ju8r0MmAE=)
---
| **Have you seen this??**
---
| | _“... Rep. Susan Wild is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in Congress. Republicans have to sort through a crowded primary, but it’s the type of race that could give Democrats a headache if Biden’s standing doesn’t improve.”

\- Roll Call_
---
I’ll be perfectly frank – we’re facing an uphill battle, and we can’t afford to lose.

Do you know how many seats stand between Democrats and taking back the House? _**5 seats.**_

Republicans **KNOW** they have a real chance of losing next year, which is why they’re targeting toss-up seats like mine in PA-07.

They’ve been trying to flip this seat the last two election cycles, and this year won’t be any different. They’ve already put me on the top of their target list and are prepared to spend big to defeat me.

[_**I need your help to fuel this campaign. Will you contribute to my campaign to keep PA-07 blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76563055/447808627/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-01-05_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGMwYjQ0YS0wYmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHkeY6vTIL7Sk4w9m-aNcftZDN2YY2Qu67ju8r0MmAE=)

name: Andy Kim
subject: The lasting damage of January 6 was not the roaring riot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
[I want to talk a little bit about why tomorrow’s anniversary of January 6th is so important to me. But first, we’re in a fight to restore trust in our democracy, and I need to ask if you would consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Defeat Republicans to help our grassroots movements.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76563506/447808791/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240105_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmYzBiNDRhLTBiYWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YXYksQ_W4DSWN5PkOrw9g_Np7ZgSkH8e1fha9oA2FvU=)

The most vivid memory I have of Jan 6 is the moment I returned to the House chamber after the riot had been quelled. I stepped over broken glass to get into the chamber. What ensued over the next hour was the most powerful experience of my career.

People spoke with hushed whispers. We touched each other’s shoulders gently with comfort as if at a funeral. Everyone was still in a daze, swimming in uncertainty of the moment. I took a seat along the center aisle as the speeches began.

I glanced around the room.

Could it happen again? Would we finally unite? For a brief moment I thought what happened would be a shock to the system, like a defibrillator pulling our country back into rhythm. The speeches were raw, talking about the need to pull together.

But then something changed.

When speeches switched back to the electoral college debate, I felt the energy in the room shift. I watched people pull out the same speech about election fraud they were going to give before, as if the riot never happened. The prospect of unity lasted only a few minutes.

That was when I knew the events of the day wouldn’t create the unifying moment we needed. The shock of Jan 6 was not enough to shatter the Big Lie. **Many ask me if my colleagues who spout the Big Lie somehow believe what they say. At that moment I knew for certain they did. They believed every single word.**

I couldn’t watch, and headed for the doors in disgust. While the riot damaged our Capitol, I felt that the scene I just witnessed would ultimately do more harm. The lasting damage of January 6 was not the roaring riot, but the selfish silence and purposeful amnesia afterwards.

I walked out the center doors of the House chamber, the same doors that Presidents walk through to give the State of the Union. Just hours earlier, they’d been smashed and barricaded. Security officers had drawn their guns. Again, guns were drawn on the House floor.

As I walked the halls away from the chamber I kept thinking, maybe our nation lost its ability to be shocked. After a pandemic and now January 6, could something actually shock us to the point where we rediscover our shared identity and common good, like our nation has in the past?

Then I reached the Rotunda. To see that room – the most beautiful room in the most beautiful building in America – desecrated and strewn with trash, broke my heart. I got on my knees and started to pick up.

As I cleaned up the debris, I wandered down a side hall and saw a plaque: “Beneath this tablet the cornerstone...was laid by George Washington.” I stood there holding a bag of torn flags and broken glass, reminded that this building is bigger than all of us. I realized at that moment that I am but a mere caretaker of this building.

**This realization of being a caretaker fundamentally changed the way I see my job. Changed how I see the responsibility of being a citizen. Our democracy was handed to us, and on our watch we must do our best to preserve it and then pass it off to those that follow.**

I've been fixated on a singular question: how do we heal this country?

I spent a year searching for the answer, and came to see that it was right above me painted at the center of the ceiling of the Capitol dome. **To heal is “E Pluribus Unum.”**

E Pluribus Unum. Out of many, one. Phrase expresses our nation’s goal but doesn’t tell us how. What makes the “many” become “one?” Unity doesn’t just happen on its own. We have to put in the work.

**Here’s what I know: It’s not too late to unite this country.** I was wrong to think unity needed a shock to the system to catalyze. We don’t need a shock. We need service.

Our job now is to be caretakers. Our job is to heal this country and hand it off to our successors. That’s why I’m running for Senate.

[Will you join me in the fight to restore unity, integrity, and a commitment to service to Washington by splitting a donation to my campaign and Defeat Republicans today? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76563507/447808792/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240105_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmYzBiNDRhLTBiYWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YXYksQ_W4DSWN5PkOrw9g_Np7ZgSkH8e1fha9oA2FvU=)

Thank you,

Andy

name: Julie Chavez Rodriguez
subject: 3 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Together, we can send a powerful message about the strength of this movement to reelect Joe and Kamala and defend our democracy. | | |
---
Peter, This Saturday will mark the three-year anniversary of when a violent mob breached our nation’s Capitol. And they did so with the encouragement of Donald Trump. On January 6, 2021, we witnessed a very different vision of America -- one defined by revenge, retribution, and a rebuke of our very democracy. Our country is built upon the principles of liberty and justice for all. Our country is the home of people of innumerable backgrounds, races, religions, and walks of life -- all of whom have fought for the rights they deserve throughout our history. **All of whom deserve to live under the democratic system that our Constitution guarantees.** America watched as 2,000 rioters launched a violent attack on the Capitol as our duly elected Congress carried out the sacred ritual of our republic and certified the results of the election and the Electoral College vote. Violent rioters waved Confederate flags and used American flags on poles as weapons. 140 police officers were assaulted by rioters and five people died as a result of the events on January 6th -- including Capitol police officers. It was the first time in our nation's history that a president tried to prevent the peaceful transfer of power. Not even during the Civil War did insurrectionists breach our Capitol. But at the urging of Donald Trump, insurrectionists on January 6, 2021, did. **When Joe Biden ran for president four years ago, he said, “We’re in a battle for the soul of America.” It’s why more Americans voted for him and Kamala Harris in 2020 than any presidential ticket in history. Voters chose unity over division. Hope over fear.** But the threat Donald Trump posed in 2020 to American democracy has only grown more dire in the years since. Our message is clear and it is simple: We are running a campaign like the fate of our democracy depends on it. Because it does. [Peter, it’s up to all of us to make sure that Donald Trump stays out of the White House. clean_body: Together, we can send a powerful message about the strength of this movement to reelect Joe and Kamala and defend our democracy. | | | Peter, This Saturday will mark the three-year anniversary of when a violent mob breached our nation’s Capitol. And they did so with the encouragement of Donald Trump. On January 6, 2021, we witnessed a very different vision of America -- one defined by revenge, retribution, and a rebuke of our very democracy. Our country is built upon the principles of liberty and justice for all. Our country is the home of people of innumerable backgrounds, races, religions, and walks of life -- all of whom have fought for the rights they deserve throughout our history. All of whom deserve to live under the democratic system that our Constitution guarantees. America watched as 2,000 rioters launched a violent attack on the Capitol as our duly elected Congress carried out the sacred ritual of our republic and certified the results of the election and the Electoral College vote. Violent rioters waved Confederate flags and used American flags on poles as weapons. 140 police officers were assaulted by rioters and five people died as a result of the events on January 6th -- including Capitol police officers. It was the first time in our nation's history that a president tried to prevent the peaceful transfer of power. Not even during the Civil War did insurrectionists breach our Capitol. But at the urging of Donald Trump, insurrectionists on January 6, 2021, did. When Joe Biden ran for president four years ago, he said, “We’re in a battle for the soul of America.” It’s why more Americans voted for him and Kamala Harris in 2020 than any presidential ticket in history. Voters chose unity over division. Hope over fear. But the threat Donald Trump posed in 2020 to American democracy has only grown more dire in the years since. Our message is clear and it is simple: We are running a campaign like the fate of our democracy depends on it. Because it does. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | With your support, I know that President Biden and Vice President Harris will keep fighting for our fundamental freedoms, democratic values, and for YOU. Thank you so much for being a critical part of our campaign and for joining us in this fight. Julie Julie Chavez Rodriguez Campaign Manager, Biden-Harris 2024

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: This is HUGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Did you see this?
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240105-1-t2&t=1&akid=5127%2E196590%2E409t2k)
This is HUGE.
After years of the GOP abusing its power to silence the voice of Wisconsinites, the Wisconsin Supreme Court has finally thrown out the GOP’s heavily gerrymandered maps!
Not only does that mean that competitive and fair elections are returning to Wisconsin, but that Democrats finally have a real chance at flipping the state legislature blue!
So as we begin 2024, it is crucial that we have the resources to make that happen and undo the damage Republicans have caused across Wisconsin.
[**Can you contribute $3 to our special fund dedicated to flipping the legislative majority in Wisconsin? Your contribution will help us turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240105-1-t2&t=2&akid=5127%2E196590%2E409t2k)

[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.hytGtw&refcode=em240105-1-t2&t=24&akid=5127%2E196590%2E409t2k)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.w31MA1&refcode=em240105-1-t2&t=25&akid=5127%2E196590%2E409t2k)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240105-1-t2&t=26&akid=5127%2E196590%2E409t2k)
This ruling is possible because of this team and our work to help elect Justice Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court in April. Her election flipped the majority on the Supreme Court for the first time in over a decade.
For 12 years, Republicans in the Wisconsin State Legislature have abused their power to silence the voice of Wisconsinites. They’ve forced through voter suppression laws, attacks on unions and collective bargaining, and kept in place Wisconsin’s draconian 1849 ban on abortion.
Now is our chance to unseat those Republicans and turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.
[**If you can, please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford, to our fund to win Wisconsin and take back the legislative majority.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240105-1-t2&t=27&akid=5127%2E196590%2E409t2k)

Mandela

name: Team Warner
subject: it’s an election year

body:
here’s how Senator Warner is safeguarding our Democracy

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76566090/447811697/-1515256031?refcode=mw_em_240105_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDYwOTM4Yi0wZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pokh6VCnmXtv2SqFQAVsUjH1rB345oB-9toWbSnjM7k=) Derek, Tomorrow marks three years since we witnessed a harrowing attack on our democracy. We can’t allow the events of January 6, 2021 to ever occur again. That’s why Senator Warner and his colleagues passed the bipartisan _Electoral Count Reform Act_ – an imperative bill that enacts stronger protections for our democratic systems and secures our elections. A bill that holds politicians and insurrectionists that want to undermine the will of voters responsible. A bill that ensures a peaceful transition of power. Restoring trust in our electoral system is no easy feat, but Mark knows that this bill is a good start. Because now, in a turbulent election year, we have legislation that can better protect our democracy. But we can’t stop here. The next step is to elect leaders to Congress who wholeheartedly believe that we should do _more_ to safeguard our democracy – whether that’s advancing new protections for voting rights, increasing penalties for those who threaten election workers, or finding ways to help USPS handle election mail, there’s plenty to be done. **__**__[We hope you’ll consider supporting Senator Warner’s efforts to help send Democrats to Congress this year and make more progress in our work to secure our democracy and bolster trust in our electoral system.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76566092/447811699/-1515256031?refcode=mw_em_240105_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDYwOTM4Yi0wZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pokh6VCnmXtv2SqFQAVsUjH1rB345oB-9toWbSnjM7k=)__**__** Thank you, Team Warner **********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76566095/447811701/-1515256031?refcode=mw_em_240105_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDYwOTM4Yi0wZWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pokh6VCnmXtv2SqFQAVsUjH1rB345oB-9toWbSnjM7k=)**********

clean_body: here’s how Senator Warner is safeguarding our Democracy | | | = Derek, Tomorrow marks three years since we witnessed a harrowing attack on our democracy. We can’t allow the events of January 6, 2021 to ever occur again. That’s why Senator Warner and his colleagues passed the bipartisan Electoral Count Reform Act – an imperative bill that enacts stronger protections for our democratic systems and secures our elections. A bill that holds politicians and insurrectionists that want to undermine the will of voters responsible. A bill that ensures a peaceful transition of power. Restoring trust in our electoral system is no easy feat, but Mark knows that this bill is a good start. Because now, in a turbulent election year, we have legislation that can better protect our democracy. But we can’t stop here. The next step is to elect leaders to Congress who wholeheartedly believe that we should do more to safeguard our democracy – whether that’s advancing new protections for voting rights, increasing penalties for those who threaten election workers, or finding ways to help USPS handle election mail, there’s plenty to be done. =__ Thank you, Team Warner ********=****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

**DEVELOPING FROM CAPITOL HILL:
Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand Leads the Charge to Certify the Equal Rights Amendment!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76566524/447812626/-667042916?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4699-su-nd&refcode=jtk4699-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmYyMTI3Yi0wZmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JUxD-4K7-hgoyzRjcYoygOIKBj10GlsQCDTvfBD3QqE=&emci=843529a0-93a9-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f6f2127b-0fac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=7659029)
Friend: This is incredible news! Kirsten Gillibrand — a bold leader for gender equity — has introduced a new resolution to finally add the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) to the Constitution!
**The ERA would classify gender-based discrimination as unconstitutional, giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights nationwide.** Activists have spent 100 years pushing to add this amendment to the Constitution, and now the required 38 states have finally voted in favor of it. But an arbitrary, unbinding deadline is blocking us from finally adding the 28th Amendment to the Constitution.
Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent this deadline and ensure that all Americans are treated fairly under our Constitution, regardless of gender identity.
**We already know that right-wing extremists will do everything they can to sabotage this resolution — that's why it's so important to know if Americans support the ERA. You've been selected to represent 43614 in this live opinion poll, so please respond before midnight tonight to make your voice heard for gender equity:**
**Do You Support the Equal Rights Amendment?**

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9da43e75d5da453aa4c5fa42497de13b&_e=p0fi9R7RBTzsvtY_0l1GkdzOg0ZouBPECeBN2bjTz-yMbTi20Zp9RO0kTH7etmeCkI2h6CrQkdWNMYLti8qrd00woMNuwzuth5B4w9mZR7uT1NvaF0yFDP2CDJVVjGNN-cLwKxUFB0idreVOumdwHeYPxD-pyQqJowVvVIQU3EFAj4zlCLq3qt-mdsL7Fc94FNpTQ5GzHBYw8XcKOJKtKkRUPlaMMkyyG6SBHxUVHdXj0BwsK0smhcOZdD65-8v-MyRPj3HTaVlkTRMAqYFBOsg9_i7hx4VrxZpPMKf1ogsFPMoLMrFDAMTMVOl1rkPs7rC-3HNaWm_-KSys9PBUWBxveH9M5AjIfxipqBtBv2XD2X8dLNiO3qGT4NHowsLw_otTX1DkQQgZHpbjj17vlkdsUJbo5mK3E5Nr5k-cYKMDWiiMiEH12yDDDeOkCMBkiejU3Xm05AwPr-4War7X6QhIW9mE4y2HfyleurByMHQ%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9da43e75d5da453aa4c5fa42497de13b&_e=p0fi9R7RBTzsvtY_0l1GkdzOg0ZouBPECeBN2bjTz-yMbTi20Zp9RO0kTH7etmeCkI2h6CrQkdWNMYLti8qrd00woMNuwzuth5B4w9mZR7uT1NvaF0yFDP2CDJVVjGNN-cLwKxUFB0idreVOumdwHeYPxD-pyQqJowVvVIQU3EFAj4zlCLq3qt-mdsL7Fc94FNpTQ5GzHBYw8XcKOJKtKkRUPlaMMkyyG6SBHxUVHdXj0BwsK0smhcOZdD65-8v-MyRPj3HTaVlkTRMAqYFBOsg9_i7hx4VrxZpPMKf1ogsFPMoLMrFDAMTMVOl1rkPsuLE3i0mkzSWYwbI6MkkvFO7dh7K4shaw50-AK5NITLBm-TnvlG_b9PGpDPo8xgKc1qnokust_G9BNrpg30r816AmFEZsKo1dqwtAhGM4NCOrucoqZ6xyim_qjmckfuzKdFaHpeBe4k3NrSTvYBFoGQ90wlQBxDBPFJp-BZL9cCI%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not next month - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9da43e75d5da453aa4c5fa42497de13b&_e=p0fi9R7RBTzsvtY_0l1GkdzOg0ZouBPECeBN2bjTz-yMbTi20Zp9RO0kTH7etmeCkI2h6CrQkdWNMYLti8qrd00woMNuwzuth5B4w9mZR7uT1NvaF0yFDP2CDJVVjGNN-cLwKxUFB0idreVOumdwHeYPxD-pyQqJowVvVIQU3EFAj4zlCLq3qt-mdsL7Fc94FNpTQ5GzHBYw8XcKOJKtKkRUPlaMMkyyG6SBHxUVHdXj0BwsK0smhcOZdD65-8v-MyRPj3HTaVlkTRMAqYFBOsg9_i7hx4VrxZpPMKf1ogsFPMoLMrFDAMTMVOl1rkPsu5ZV2ExEcXXAAhQLpCHZe2qcXIdZ02pVRbnEwuDbZska-vQo6Wzf78XnxXdYUszjeauQFLre0L5DJx5Z33gQN_zaEbMrG68-yN63XfIBzqOoybwg8K_UPsB7VZrpA5VJm_XpnmkDatshTSaAtf95L5m2N_5RR4grYYTtfwFzScA%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not next month - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Happy New Year - Let's Get To Work!
body:
We'd like to wish you a Happy New Year -- and let you know how you be a big part of helping us grow!

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240105socmedtoolkit&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, From all of us at the Cornel West 2024 campaign – from Dr. West himself to our beautiful supporter team – Happy New Year. A new year means new opportunities to grow alongside those dearest to us. For so many of us, it means a new beacon of hope for what’s to come. For us involved with the campaign, it means standing resolute in our goals and walking the path of Truth, Justice and Love this election year. It is our responsibility to spread this resolution as far as the distance from California to Maine, and as deep as the White House. But we cannot do this alone. Every movement like ours runs off of the brilliance and innovations of everyday people – and it’s within this tradition that we ask for your help. Can you [help us by using this toolkit](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kQc4fvR1WFwDoaT2FI9hnB89RklbxKo2VC_sPP62O1I32HaVH4JST7VOdXYZbjZkdZfe3cmYq2Ta7h5TjSIruHKGEPkuPeSBjZR7MCzv6ZkfwM9ATPjouKJTBUqHTiKIeQ&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240105socmedtoolkit&n=2) to share our message far and wide – on social media, your neighborhood, and with your friends and family? You’ll find images, text, and methods to share on social media. You will also find poster-sized images to print and share at home, or local storefronts and street corners – if you have the means.
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kQc4fvR1WFwDoaT2FI9hnB89RklbxKo2VC_sPP62O1I32HaVH4JST7VOdXYZbjZkdZfe3cmYq2Ta7h5TjSIruHKGEPkuPeSBjZR7MCzv6ZkfwM9ATPjouKJTBUqHTiKIeQ&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240105socmedtoolkit&n=3 "Download our Social Media Toolkit!") [Download our Social Media Toolkit!](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=FHnL8ikUv8WviObJjkW8kQc4fvR1WFwDoaT2FI9hnB89RklbxKo2VC_sPP62O1I32HaVH4JST7VOdXYZbjZkdZfe3cmYq2Ta7h5TjSIruHKGEPkuPeSBjZR7MCzv6ZkfwM9ATPjouKJTBUqHTiKIeQ&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240105socmedtoolkit&n=3)
---
You can download this as a PDF (Go to File>Download>PDF), and it will still have the clickable links! If you have any questions on how to best utilize this toolkit – or you want to help shape our upcoming projects – all you have to do is visit [www.cornelwest2024.com/onboarding](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/onboarding?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240105socmedtoolkit&n=4) to get to our shared workspace. We need you and your community’s voice in this movement if we’re going to succeed.
---
Yours in Solidarity, **Team Cornel West 2024**
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240105socmedtoolkit&n=5)
---

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: Some New Year's Gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | |
---
Derek, I’m so grateful. Thanks to you, we hit our last critical fundraising goal of 2023 – and we’re starting the new year on track to success in November.
**But before we head full-speed into 2024, I want to slow down and celebrate some of the moments from last year that I’m especially grateful for.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76569599/447814506/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk938-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGViOWZmOS0xMmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ofADc17XgSQE1TI_pHQJvvWZ4TImWWWjekdgC9MVwBw=)
This fall, I got to see my daughter, Carly, walk down the aisle to join and marry Mark! Knowing that your child found the person they want to spend their life with is an incredible feeling – and I’m lucky enough to have had that experience now two years in a row! (Molly and her wife Kristen were gracious enough to share the spotlight for a little 😊)
**I****n Washington, I’m so grateful that you and this team have stood with me through the ups, downs and the “everythings-in-between”. **When the GOP attacked the rights of our LGBTQ neighbors, you helped me defend their dignity. When our veterans were being denied the care they deserved, you helped me find solutions. And when we had a chance to invest in STEM industry and education in our district, you helped me seize the opportunity and build a better future for us all.
I know that we’ll have our work cut out for us in 2024. Not only is my seat up for grabs, but President Biden’s historic leadership is being threatened by another four years of the indicted and extremist Donald Trump – _and I don’t have to tell you how worrying that is for the future of our democracy._
Yet, with the things this team has already accomplished, I’m confident that we can see progress and defeat extremism in November – **but only if you continue to stand with me.**
I’ll be in touch soon, but in the meantime, Happy New Year. I’m looking forward to crossing the finish line together this year.

There is work to be done,
Chrissy
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76569600/447814507/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk938-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGViOWZmOS0xMmFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ofADc17XgSQE1TI_pHQJvvWZ4TImWWWjekdgC9MVwBw=)

name: JD Vance
subject: Left-Wing Judges are telling YOU who to vote for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc

name: Cut Cruz HQ
subject: The Ted Cruz Curse
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CUT CRUZ PAC
body:
When Ted Cruz shows up to support a particular team in a sporting event, that team is destined to lose.
# [](https://act.cutcruz.com/go/128?t=1&akid=237%2E623276%2ExTZpSy)
Have you heard of the Ted Cruz curse?
**It’s a real thing — when Ted Cruz shows up to support a particular team in a sporting event, that team is destined to lose.** _The Houston Chronicle_ even reports the theory has held up over the last few months!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cc-20240105?refcode=em20240105&amount=5&refcode2=237_623276_xTZpSy&akid=237%2E623276%2ExTZpSy)
According to the _Chronicle_ , Ted was there to watch Texas A&M lose to Alabama in College Station, he was present for every single Astros loss in the postseason, and most recently, he was there when the Longhorns lost to Washington in the college football semifinals.
**But whether Ted’s presence in the stands is bad for our sports teams or not, it’s indisputable that his presence in the Senate is _definitely_ bad for Texas families.**
Texans need a senator who will fight for us in Washington — not someone who spends more time moonlighting as a podcast host and fanning the flames of the culture wars than getting legislation passed that benefits everyday Texans.
[**We’re working to build a statewide movement to Cut Cruz once and for all, but we need your help. Pitch in $5 now to help us end Ted Cruz’s curse on Texas for good this November!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cc-20240105?refcode=em20240105&amount=5&refcode2=237_623276_xTZpSy&akid=237%2E623276%2ExTZpSy)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cc-20240105?amount=5&refcode=em20240105&refcode2=237_623276_xTZpSy&akid=237%2E623276%2ExTZpSy)**
— Cut Cruz HQ

* * *
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cc-footer?refcode=em-237&t=2&refcode2=237_623276_xTZpSy&akid=237%2E623276%2ExTZpSy)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.losecruzpac.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=237%2E623276%2ExTZpSy)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.losecruzpac.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.losecruzpac.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=237%2E623276%2ExTZpSy)

To give by check:
Cut Cruz PAC
1835 7th St NW, Ste 203
Washington, DC 20001
Email us: [losecruz@e.losecruzpac.com](mailto:info@losecruzpac.com)
PAID FOR BY CUT CRUZ PAC. LOSECRUZPAC.COM. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE COMMITTEE.

subject: Rep. Chip Roy: "Shut down the border or shut down the govt"
body:
Don't miss this awesome episode of the Sean Spicer Show | | | | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2febf923c7cb/you-wont-believe-what-the-biden-white-house-just-did-11196719?e=f6564bbe3b)
|
---
|
---
# Shut Down the border OR Shut Down the Government | Rep Chip Roy...
Congressman Chip Roy from the 21st district of Texas released a letter to his colleagues to address the crisis happening at our southern border that ended with "If we choose not to fight, we will be guaranteed to fail – and so will America."
In this episode, the Congressman lays out the severity of the crisis: 10,000 people per day that come into the country illegally, the release of dangerous criminals and terrorists as well as millions of doses of deadly fentanyl and other narcotics killing tens of thousands of Americans. He makes it clear that he will give President Biden the choice, either shut down the border, or they will force a government shutdown.
Watch here:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=29ecd78e68&e=f6564bbe3b)
Read about what he said on the show in The Hill [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2a934434f2&e=f6564bbe3b).
Please do me a favor and click the link below and subscribe to the Sean Spicer Show.
| [Download here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=be2f2434b1&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
# ICYMI: An all star panel discusses the news of the week...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c0b1f4a224&e=f6564bbe3b)
2024 kicks off with a bang as the GOP race enters a final countdown to Iowa. Will the Supreme Court make a detrimental decision in the Trump ballot cases? Sara Gonzalez from The News and Why It Matters and Larry O'Connor from O'Connor and Company join me to weigh in on GOP candidates and how they will fare. PLUS we discuss the Government shutdown looming as Speaker Johnson leads lawmakers in vital decisions about Ukraine, our border, the impeachment inquiry into President Biden and funding for our federal government.
Don’t forget to subscribe to make sure you see all of my upcoming content.
| [Listen as a podcast here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=878a6d1963&e=f6564bbe3b)

[Biden campaign focuses on democracy in first ad of 2024](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=bd67f95f2e&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Hill

[2023 was Washington, DC’s deadliest year in more than two decades](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=661b63cdab&e=f6564bbe3b) — Washington Post
[Biden administration ask Supreme Court to allow Border Patrol to cut or move wire at Texas border](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=85defe3013&e=f6564bbe3b) — via NBC News

name: Team DASS
subject: POLL: Are Colorado and Maine right to ban Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570370/447815649/-664199346?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmJlN2E3Ni0xNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pryWhqNMNZEUN66Ez7fq9X7I0ipKdT2iC35qk2OALPg=)
Friend,

Colorado may have been the first state to remove Trump from their ballot, but with Maine now following suit and decisions pending in dozens of states, this question is on the minds of millions of voters.

In the words of Colorado Secretary of State and DASS Chair Jena Griswold: **"If the Constitution disqualifies the former President, we have to uphold the Constitution."**

**[We want to know what you think. Did Colorado and Maine make the right decision to disqualify Donald Trump from the 2024 ballot? Take our survey to share your thoughts on this urgent issue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570372/447815651/-1331053191?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmJlN2E3Ni0xNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pryWhqNMNZEUN66Ez7fq9X7I0ipKdT2iC35qk2OALPg=&emci=0963646f-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e6be7a76-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26828920)**
| **Agree or disagree:**

**“Colorado and Maine made the right decision to disqualify Donald Trump from the 2024 ballot”** | | **[Yes, I agree!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570374/447815653/-1331053191?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmJlN2E3Ni0xNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pryWhqNMNZEUN66Ez7fq9X7I0ipKdT2iC35qk2OALPg=&emci=0963646f-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e6be7a76-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26828920)**
---
**[No, I do not agree!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570375/447815655/-1331053191?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmJlN2E3Ni0xNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pryWhqNMNZEUN66Ez7fq9X7I0ipKdT2iC35qk2OALPg=&emci=0963646f-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e6be7a76-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26828920)**
**[Unsure](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570377/447815656/-1331053191?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmJlN2E3Ni0xNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pryWhqNMNZEUN66Ez7fq9X7I0ipKdT2iC35qk2OALPg=&emci=0963646f-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e6be7a76-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26828920)**

The 14th Amendment is pretty clear:

No president who, having previously taken an oath to support the Constitution of the United States, shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion.

The fact is we watched in _real time_ as Trump incited insurrectionists to attack the Capitol and overthrow election results.

This constitutional amendment protects us from those who disregard democracy taking power. And it’s up to our elected officials to uphold our rights and keep our elections safe.

**[So friend: we want to know where you stand on the issue. Submit your response by clicking HERE or vote on the buttons below:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570379/447815660/-1331053191?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmJlN2E3Ni0xNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pryWhqNMNZEUN66Ez7fq9X7I0ipKdT2iC35qk2OALPg=&emci=0963646f-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e6be7a76-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26828920)**
**Agree or disagree:**

**“Colorado and Maine made the right decision to disqualify Donald Trump from the 2024 ballot”** | | **[Yes, I agree!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570380/447815668/-1331053191?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmJlN2E3Ni0xNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pryWhqNMNZEUN66Ez7fq9X7I0ipKdT2iC35qk2OALPg=&emci=0963646f-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e6be7a76-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26828920)**

**[No, I do not agree!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570381/447815675/-1331053191?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmJlN2E3Ni0xNWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pryWhqNMNZEUN66Ez7fq9X7I0ipKdT2iC35qk2OALPg=&emci=0963646f-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=e6be7a76-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=26828920)**

In the words of Colorado Secretary of State and DASS Chair Jena Griswold: "If the Constitution disqualifies the former President, we have to uphold the Constitution." | Agree or disagree: “Colorado and Maine made the right decision to disqualify Donald Trump from the 2024 ballot” | | The 14th Amendment is pretty clear: No president who, having previously taken an oath to support the Constitution of the United States, shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion. The fact is we watched in real time as Trump incited insurrectionists to attack the Capitol and overthrow election results. This constitutional amendment protects us from those who disregard democracy taking power. And it’s up to our elected officials to uphold our rights and keep our elections safe. Agree or disagree: “Colorado and Maine made the right decision to disqualify Donald Trump from the 2024 ballot” | | We’re looking forward to hearing from you, Team DASS | = | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

I just wanted to reach out because your Election Year Membership Status is displayed as INACTIVE. Is this a mistake? We set aside a spot just for you, Fellow Patriot, but we can only hold it for the next HOUR. So please, act quickly. Claim your 2024 Election Year Membership NOW. | | | | Best, Derek Team Cammack | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Cammack Department of Records 5200 NW 43rd St, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: 2023 was the warmest year on record, but climate denialism is surging
body:
As the climate crisis accelerates, so too does the climate denial from the right-wing media.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570738/447816860/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFlZTUyZTAtMTVhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qgyDhKR0zE5qaz8Dd4Msk1mV1FIy4-BykmHrIMmQZy0=&emci=6a54fbd9-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=8aee52e0-15ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14016711)
**2023 was the warmest year on record, Peter. **And right now, many in the Midwest are experiencing a snowless winter, including Minneapolis, which saw its warmest Christmas ever at 54 degrees.
97% of scientists agree that humans are the cause, but consumers of right-wing media didn’t hear that fact in 2023. **Why? Because right-wing outlets like Fox News and Newsmax are putting climate deniers front and center in their programming.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76570739/447816861/-899879041?refcode=em20240105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFlZTUyZTAtMTVhYy1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qgyDhKR0zE5qaz8Dd4Msk1mV1FIy4-BykmHrIMmQZy0=)
_— Media Matters, 12/22/23_

So, who are these climate deniers getting all the right-wing airtime? One is a former academic who consulted with oil and gas companies during her time in academia. Another is a blogger and Senior Fellow at the Heartland Institute, a right-wing think tank that pushes for weakening and repealing renewable energy policies.
**Starting to get the picture, Peter?**
Right-wing media aren’t just stopping at platforming climate deniers. **Their personalities and guests are also excusing and justifying violence against peaceful climate demonstrators.** Media Matters even cites examples where right-wing pundits suggest protesters should be “beaten with a bullwhip” and forced to work in labor camps.
So what’s the impact of all this propaganda and hate? For starters, it makes having a real policy conversation about what we can do to stop the climate crisis nearly impossible.
**But, there is reason for hope:** climate change is inherently a local issue that you can see with your own eyes. That means different communities experience climate change in different ways. **By using factual, local journalism to share stories about how the climate crisis is impacting local communities, we can counter the lies and stand up to right-wing hate. **

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20Senate?=
subject: John Catsimatidis & Other Media Personalities Endorse John Teichert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | |
---
**John Catsimatidis & Other Media Personalities Endorse John Teichert **
**BALTIMORE, Md.** – A New Year means new endorsements for John Teichert as he seeks the Republican nomination for the U.S. Senate in Maryland.
With endorsements already lined up from state-wide elected officials and sheriffs, even national media personalities can’t help but see the real opportunities Teichert’s candidacy presents as he seeks to flip the U.S. Senate seat held by Democrats for decades.
Throwing his unwavering support behind Teichert, John Catsimatidis, host of The Cats Roundtable, said of Teichert: "As a fellow common-sense American, I am honored to endorse General John Teichert for U.S. Senate in Maryland. His commitment to preserving our values resonates deeply with me, and I believe in his ability to represent us with integrity and passion in the Senate. Join me in supporting General John Teichert - a true champion for Maryland and a defender of our shared American values."
Catsimatidis isn’t the only media personality supporting Teichert’s bid for the U.S. Senate.
Denny Gillem, Host of Frontlines of Freedom also shared his endorsement of Teichert stating in part, "As a former Airborne Ranger and host of Frontlines of Freedom, I fully support General John Teichert for the U.S. Senate in Maryland. General Teichert's commitment to national defense and strong, selfless leadership perfectly reflect the core values America was founded upon. Join me in supporting a proven leader who will bring integrity, dedication, and a robust defense perspective to the Senate."
With more individuals lining up to throw their support behind Teichert’s brand of leadership, not politics campaign, it’s yet another sign of the growing momentum that’s propelling his race for Maryland’s open U.S. Senate seat.
# # #

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Celebrate Democracy Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
Tomorrow, January 6, is the anniversary of the second day that will live in infamy in American history – the insurrection that tried to destroy our democracy in 2021.

We must not forget how close we came – with help from Scott Perry – to losing the greatest government the people of the world have ever seen. Let's each take five minutes during the day to consider all that we could lose if we don’t stand up for democracy now.

MAGA Republicans have declared war on what they call the “Deep State.” And there is a Deep State, but it’s not the one MAGA Republicans tell us it is.

The Deep State is not unelected government workers who are enforcing the laws Congress passed. The true Deep State is the army of the unelected ultra-rich – like Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas’s benefactor Harlan Crowe, the Koch Brothers and Sheldon Adelson – who use their money, especially dark money, like puppet masters to evade the law and get the government they want, replacing the government the people want.

[Help me defeat the MAGA Deep State. Our democracy depends on it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76571244/447818544/616904455?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_240105_1_1&refcode2=2efdaf4b-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3qAD7K+uG5E/XsUwA060YRtscDZ8KmBPL0fdHm4ZCBGisczXEqDjxylSPf7phYcI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWZkYWY0Yi0xN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0dyAENKKIHqndXqZ6Qib3XGCC9xBT80yVFzvXpqeZNQ=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76571245/447818545/616904455?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_240105_1_1&refcode2=2efdaf4b-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3qAD7K+uG5E/XsUwA060YRtscDZ8KmBPL0fdHm4ZCBGisczXEqDjxylSPf7phYcI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWZkYWY0Yi0xN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0dyAENKKIHqndXqZ6Qib3XGCC9xBT80yVFzvXpqeZNQ=)**
---

A huge part of the real Deep State is the Heritage Foundation, which is, right now, preparing for an overthrow of democracy upon the election of the “next conservative President.” They have assembled hundreds of MAGA followers to create a 900-page plan called Project 2025 to be ready on Day One to destroy the government that our people have created over 250 years.

Among other things, the Heritage Foundation’s Deep State solution to our problems includes:
* Banning mifepristone and misoprostol, a safe and effective way to end a pregnancy for more than half of the women who choose abortion. Some of us remember what life was like for women before _Roe v. Wade_ , and it’s nothing we should return to.
* Officially ignoring climate change as a matter of national policy that promotes using more fossil fuels, destroying our grandchildren’s world for nothing more than money.
* Invoking the Insurrection Act and mobilizing the military to take over local law enforcement, very much in the mold of Adolph Hitler.
* Removing protections against government workers being turned into political operatives. We tried this once in our history, and it was a corrupt and costly failure leading to the creation of the Civil Service.
* Officially allowing discrimination against people because of their sexual orientation. This tip of the iceberg will be followed, no doubt, by discrimination based on race, religion and ethnic heritage.
* “Ensuring consistent litigation decisions,” which means taking over the judicial system to get rulings the MAGA Deep State wants, the Constitution be damned. Note that they didn’t object to the inconsistent litigation decision of Dobbs, overturning _Roe v. Wade_.

The goal of the MAGA Deep State is to replace people whose allegiance is to the Constitution and “We, the People” with people whose allegiance is to, and whose job depends upon, the president, no matter how unhinged he may be. The Deep State Heritage Foundation, right now, is collecting resumes, looking for people who are conservative enough to replace tens of thousands of government workers who will be fired for the crime of doing their jobs according to law.

We cannot allow any of this to happen.

[I can beat Scott Perry. I am the only candidate to win election as a Democrat in a Republican district. I am the only candidate who is crisis-tested to fight this fight. I'm counting on your help – will you chip in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76571246/447818546/616904455?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_240105_1_1&refcode2=2efdaf4b-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3qAD7K+uG5E/XsUwA060YRtscDZ8KmBPL0fdHm4ZCBGisczXEqDjxylSPf7phYcI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWZkYWY0Yi0xN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0dyAENKKIHqndXqZ6Qib3XGCC9xBT80yVFzvXpqeZNQ=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76571247/447818547/616904455?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_240105_1_1&refcode2=2efdaf4b-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=3qAD7K+uG5E/XsUwA060YRtscDZ8KmBPL0fdHm4ZCBGisczXEqDjxylSPf7phYcI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWZkYWY0Yi0xN2FjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0dyAENKKIHqndXqZ6Qib3XGCC9xBT80yVFzvXpqeZNQ=)**

clean_body: | Tomorrow, January 6, is the anniversary of the second day that will live in infamy in American history – the insurrection that tried to destroy our democracy in 2021. We must not forget how close we came – with help from Scott Perry – to losing the greatest government the people of the world have ever seen. Let's each take five minutes during the day to consider all that we could lose if we don’t stand up for democracy now. MAGA Republicans have declared war on what they call the “Deep State.” And there is a Deep State, but it’s not the one MAGA Republicans tell us it is. The Deep State is not unelected government workers who are enforcing the laws Congress passed. The true Deep State is the army of the unelected ultra-rich – like Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas’s benefactor Harlan Crowe, the Koch Brothers and Sheldon Adelson – who use their money, especially dark money, like puppet masters to evade the law and get the government they want, replacing the government the people want. = | | = A huge part of the real Deep State is the Heritage Foundation, which is, right now, preparing for an overthrow of democracy upon the election of the “next conservative President.” They have assembled hundreds of MAGA followers to create a 900-page plan called Project 2025 to be ready on Day One to destroy the government that our people have created over 250 years. Among other things, the Heritage Foundation’s Deep State solution to our problems includes: Banning mifepristone and misoprostol, a safe and effective way to end a pregnancy for more than half of the women who choose abortion. Some of us remember what life was like for women before Roe v. Wade , and it’s nothing we should return to. Officially ignoring climate change as a matter of national policy that promotes using more fossil fuels, destroying our grandchildren’s world for nothing more than money. Invoking the Insurrection Act and mobilizing the military to take over local law enforcement, very much in the mold of Adolph Hitler. Removing protections against government workers being turned into political operatives. We tried this once in our history, and it was a corrupt and costly failure leading to the creation of the Civil Service. Officially allowing discrimination against people because of their sexual orientation. This tip of the iceberg will be followed, no doubt, by discrimination based on race, religion and ethnic heritage. “Ensuring consistent litigation decisions,” which means taking over the judicial system to get rulings the MAGA Deep State wants, the Constitution be damned. Note that they didn’t object to the inconsistent litigation decision of Dobbs, overturning Roe v. Wade. The goal of the MAGA Deep State is to replace people whose allegiance is to the Constitution and “We, the People” with people whose allegiance is to, and whose job depends upon, the president, no matter how unhinged he may be. The Deep State Heritage Foundation, right now, is collecting resumes, looking for people who are conservative enough to replace tens of thousands of government workers who will be fired for the crime of doing their jobs according to law. We cannot allow any of this to happen. = | = Thank you. – Rick | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

Happy New Year, Peter! It's Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson here and I want to start off by saying thank you for being here.

[https://email.email.talkswithliz.com/c/eJxskU2L1TAUhn9NspuS5juLLEStIAyMCxHdlDQ5beOkN7GJt-ivlxaEWdzt4eU574cfY7A_vx2mmM_my0f1zN5P5Oun-gMHq4l2XmKwvSKcG6qpwrC5mMb2p4D1bisuLrc3txMmhdGCaSc9yAm8MUD0JMOMV6uUAU28oUxIF5joFUzCkxmcdr5XHEdLCeWkJ4LSnnHV6Zl5MMIY6rkA4xAn17euufRaj9jWFP92Pm842bW1UhF7h-iA6FBb3t0C3ZLzksCVWE8ZosNWl3oLO6IDyzx8cIeqz-v3Xy8v7D7QdgogRIfocAXxQrPAeS964ucgmJDQlduCU76ae4TAG7Q1B-tKxLsN5YgpxSoV4mS5vJ92a_69e7BXmKdY709H3l9hx82e5IfYZn3exodbNQtt_L_HvwAAAP__X5qWdw]

> Happy New Year Peter!
>
> It's Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson here and I want to start off by saying thank you for being here.
>
> If you're reading this, you may or may not have heard my story so that’s about to change. In this email, I will introduce myself
> and share access to some of my resources with you.
>
> Here's a short bio about me:
>
> Elizabeth "LIZ" Johnson has been a Georgia 12th Congressional District resident for 28 years. Liz and her husband, who is a
> retired law enforcement officer, will celebrate their 27th wedding anniversary within two weeks of the 2024 November General
> Election. Together they have seven adult children, nineteen grandchildren, and several great-grandchildren.
>
> As a proven leader in her community, Liz has served as an elected officer, appointed board member, and committee chair of
> various organizations. She has served at the county, district, and state committee levels of the Democratic Party of Georgia for
> over 20 years as a political leader. In 2012, after being elected by her state committee peers, Liz also served as one of six
> Democratic National Committee members representing Georgia.
>
> In 2022, for the second time, Elizabeth ‘LIZ’ Johnson, became the Democratic Nominee for the U.S. House of Representatives in
> Georgia’s 12th District on the November ballot. Now more inspired than ever, Liz is back to win this Congressional seat for the
> residents of Georgia's 12th and for America.
>
> You can read my full story on my Meet Liz page [https://email.email.talkswithliz.com/c/eJxskEGL2zAQhX-NdbNRxrIsHXQobV0oBNJDKd2LkaVJrESOvJYSsfn1i80u7CHXmcf3Hp_pnVXnf1nO8rf887Pd198H-vdXfCFWCSq04QTVrqWMSRDQEpy08316m1EZPc3ana5fbiuMN1I0tdDcIB_QSIlUDNweyajsAIi2pVZoYNRaPggOglNqGwtcaOIUUGB0RxuAXc3aShxrg7KREgxrUOqC0a2tStpfYnZp9O5RmTARr8aU5ljU3wroCuhyzpV3j3MYrzFcj2G5xTVXQDchptK7R_nxIz5sFurA7A-d27gf_78eDvW9g0QmTGOwSs-OLMrO2XnvIm8LRk_bjrU6httiUG3DShfvZQ7LBReS1Ep-ik3KhKl_6j0pTP2n2_cAAAD__yGLiKk].
>
> Every once in a while, someone will inevitably email me to ask why he or she didn't receive a particular email that their friend
> received in their inbox. To make sure you receive my updates, simply add me to your contact list or drag this email away from
> the promotions tab. I want to make sure that you receive all of the campaign updates and resources that I share.
>
> If you're on Gmail, there is a drop-down arrow next to the big reply button. If you click that, the 5th option down says to "Add
> Liz Johnson to Contacts List."
>
> You'll hear from me again soon. This relationship is the start of something great, [Peter :)
>
> In my following emails, I'll tell “My Story”, discuss why and when I started my political campaign and how it affects you.
>
> Until then, have a great day and year ahead!
>
> With much gratitude,
>
> Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson

clean_body: Happy New Year, Peter! It's Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson here and I want to start off by saying thank you for being here. [] Happy New Year Peter! It's Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson here and I want to start off by saying thank you for being here. If you're reading this, you may or may not have heard my story so that’s about to change. In this email, I will introduce myself and share access to some of my resources with you. Here's a short bio about me: Elizabeth "LIZ" Johnson has been a Georgia 12th Congressional District resident for 28 years. Liz and her husband, who is a retired law enforcement officer, will celebrate their 27th wedding anniversary within two weeks of the 2024 November General Election. Together they have seven adult children, nineteen grandchildren, and several great-grandchildren. As a proven leader in her community, Liz has served as an elected officer, appointed board member, and committee chair of various organizations. She has served at the county, district, and state committee levels of the Democratic Party of Georgia for over 20 years as a political leader. In 2012, after being elected by her state committee peers, Liz also served as one of six Democratic National Committee members representing Georgia. In 2022, for the second time, Elizabeth ‘LIZ’ Johnson, became the Democratic Nominee for the U.S. House of Representatives in Georgia’s 12th District on the November ballot. Now more inspired than ever, Liz is back to win this Congressional seat for the residents of Georgia's 12th and for America. You can read my full story on my Meet Liz page []. Every once in a while, someone will inevitably email me to ask why he or she didn't receive a particular email that their friend received in their inbox. To make sure you receive my updates, simply add me to your contact list or drag this email away from the promotions tab. I want to make sure that you receive all of the campaign updates and resources that I share. If you're on Gmail, there is a drop-down arrow next to the big reply button. If you click that, the 5th option down says to "Add Liz Johnson to Contacts List." You'll hear from me again soon. This relationship is the start of something great, [Peter :) In my following emails, I'll tell “My Story”, discuss why and when I started my political campaign and how it affects you. Until then, have a great day and year ahead! With much gratitude, Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson Lizjohnsonforus.com [] $25 [] $50 [] $100 [] $250 [] $300 [] Other [] YOUR VOICE, YOUR SUPPORT, AND OUR FUTURES MATTER! THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR YOUR EARLY SUPPORT! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ ] Liz Johnson for Us 2024 P.O. BOX 1404 Statesboro, GA 30459 United States Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences [] or unsubscribe from this list []. [] []

| | **The Swamp Is Now A Sewer 🤮**
---
---
| | "Drain the swamp" has been our battle cry against the corruption and special interests infesting this town like a plague of locusts. But now, we're up to our necks in a whole new level of filth, turning this place into a dadgum [open sewer](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6b2vagPM0Nx0u0RbA9ePF_9YleXsWNoAcLz1D0ah5K--H6Cfg698n-yLaIOea02gVZh9p9PNHhoo_ei0VDBcfAOy0k5ESZLOp8Cam8qtwRtveNsGMieBezpwW47G5DDqYawirBQ_hGPIiXgaZRe0L8rpDkZYsEmb0WaGtWLLunN_Gq2uAv2XBABYYPBY_mREDCBZccH-dRkBEv2G2bnSIWku7Ws7XiyicrIZjVSQl3EkWUFP4OF01iGu_SP4eZX4eDyIAUbWQtOhqWQntx1oA5dU%3D), spewing out every bit of tainted garbage imaginable. Take that slimeball Jeffrey Epstein for example, a downright disgusting piece of work surrounded by a pack of cronies that need a swift kick down a long flight of steps. I don't give a darn which side of the aisle you're on, but if you're on that [Epstein list](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6bzHXZ85fEmSX-tQyGB9h9583C2Ag7bxt4aO6oVWJOuCquf9DZgzvh2IyiYf1rnb3nLr0KxqNlA8GZgCiVvwxlB4hgKTvTSw4Gvm_MUg7igPZFNExLZM_-AiJPfNVK2-LTuGgJpvjUAIY2k2wTtHUhkMJS-1Sjb94ek2u2ZxuaeWbNQjBCw-nv8cpdkWaO8O1A5HdkFc1WGZMq7brOWsweysc9iL0mD8kpDiYo775OMlUQRjVChoFMGTfW1ANXUSyQA%3D%3D) we've been learning more about this week, you're part of the problem. Let me be clear—I couldn't care less about anyone Epstein just casually rubbed elbows with. I'm after the sorry excuses for human beings directly [involved](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6b37hAS-TTvrX4XINE-maXnBi8wIHfO-o9_NGIdBYcgs1GrVrmlyHU5_M6Bl9UVtlzxlDtxB9sZ4NbEpiauxm2wW7aI-EyduxUGXwY4YOrmOF_KHtIU4JETxxHY4ILbx8fUqmLM_vxxXm9FEHrCAxgiNDm3E4dapA-boYIBTqHeKQ89hE6RKUi71i_qFG3eNRJqNPUebGTCVKP3eALVBmNRimZwGch9KLlm8PLxEYf-PZlRUXQDXW9-4QcE7drH7s3Nu9MmKepIjW89ZoVRgGIIdAg44anZZ85dXXKCHmKWo0) in his heinous crimes, especially those against innocent minors. We can't let this slide under the rug like some forgotten crumb; I'm sick and tired of these double standards for the big shots to use to wriggle off the hook. Even our so-called "Justice Department" is tainted and complacent in these crooked shenanigans. Last week, federal prosecutors conveniently decided against a [second trial](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6b56CHqgx7oqv11-Gn5kBA7hQTgqHoMmdjTf_ZPHfI0BklMIYdnAc3ag5g4vH6a_z2ORDzurTzo4CZzCbvKs0m5myStkn-kV4ZCfzE3xblJg1nnQDyAxZxOZNUcObBl4B11Svv2Re-ajta47O9BaUjH4k3A_t7_LGGTDjA2092iUbwJ55CD-V5ve20rMwla79OC33dD5pBMb4KQYJXR6nY4iZNhlKnXNWDOd4dU5FT24Hb9Tjs7cbKd1g0p0tiHcN4WN72Pp_WdXpG3hIqMUC2SoYA9IBxJ-j8KBtOUmWfojTdmeSXvek4BdayDOjUydbE1-o-zCCTceM1cgXnhC4AnM%3D) for the [disgraced dark money Democrat donor Sam Bankman-Fried](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6b56CHqgx7oqv11-Gn5kBA7ghJHMfp-2rJF4OBCXcoVdmErDkbF_bQjUvO1n8FE4ubsmsuy2jN8ifSpR9hJZXo8U-cB0zyCL5fqTm6BN3jGGM1xUwshhga8tgW_6tlOxGko39o8rk26vI5Eg1Mw1BAVRA3E4FZHQDyDnzqYpvXoMOeWa8fE3p0ax1AG458xRjOBSqalKTZALtlZuHeRJgpEOkmixBJdE9MkmzbwpsgJpsyuDlVtJcV1nqs6jqwD723Z5RvU_cEaZQehe94L5UIRcWF5dQGo2VQe9yjgeST6BS), claiming they don't want to delve into the details. Well, I cry foul. This is just to keep Americans in the dark about which politicians he bribed or whose campaigns he influenced. That collective sigh of relief you hear is from the DEEP STATE, folks. To boot, we're facing an all-out crisis at our southern border because President Biden and his fellow Democrats seem to have embraced [anarchy](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6byNhMLLb07llwKmvEI5vBiWH8ho0gVw3n2pfGjAONV0kvgLAaFgc3wPmGSpw2CF7XiewQkWMGP7nekw8Jpg0mlEIdFinuIgkgq0zuBNrOL3FJe4T5PnIQ9Xf2A5CjWlmg-ejj9QWawocZ0qoCXORXZL2_GpK62wysqv4KzURVoONkCkqjVFFMIl4gAy72L2DCPp7GV8IgIcdG3V4Yrdm4fQ%3D). Almost [10,000 migrants](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6b1JBEw8zQcCDBb47kqUjhyDhdWaiG1_2Fy4j5QCjJbyJlAumgw7WiqsoFw44VrloBgAlafFp6vn0uRWCKA9JFSeFmyOU2OhNlkUQOH1mhL4cTCNEYjAf0KvwmIH14j914iTFl4o8FVdNUuS02G1dukTf471Eu4p9wsGbwQybAWPwBbk3P5QzONOaUjs8BBtDSgc09o0GVhe7-NjOisfj3HghVrm71RTS3g6h_VE4KVRFaZkQPwNNsH3noAdFdOKbJA%3D%3D) pour in every day from all corners of the globe, most of whom will end up living off the [taxpayers' dime](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6b56CHqgx7oqv11-Gn5kBA7iooUsSQCfKXuaezxrJtl5d2jbUe3kISuTMFEtnHws2TAii4YB2vUtlqPgwYQClOkOA329PiFDt3o4E6OZ4vo1h0iO6_iOFs_IDaC-Z5xo8B1bi-vWzi-OVRFbDF7pSpyJrePOpoqmenEMQY_k5z1oqryZwBbHw4BR6x-16JUeofIpoW7RWp-ZMP1vUzw0BDW6ZjG0UM4ECkMFwVlVH5c64VJ-FooquTDpUrpP8TlqCB8RZeCRmZR2x9tNOaXdybUZvHyfvlgpGuvHI3EzELn8Q) in one way or another. And to add fuel to the fire, dozens are on the FBI's [terror watch list](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6b50vS4UAIsQDjrWFvpsCG_OR1IlXmtnhPVuhahkdZcpcxU-iZ9H5YnSewkOLBxZ525KL7RVkjgswxfj0IQ4IZUYMOGtOo5f6UFpoCkRbaB8Zis8k96Pa-MDG_mbV2eJU_aJXdL77UiJK3yGr9pM1rhTllLjtaQbiOW7XC1XqD5Q_6AYi7cfr5uP53dbbgi5hJMl0huUjamD1B54rnr3OZdWfXJRM1OaML0lygRgX0k30lVGfZTvoUYe_uKBKTnC3-w%3D%3D). After witnessing the atrocities unleashed on our friends in Israel three months ago, this should send shivers down your spine. It's high time for a day of reckoning. We have got to get this country back on track in 2024. Let’s purge the sewer and restore integrity and justice. I pray this year is a turning point, and it’s my goal to help us rise above the muck and demand accountability for the sake of this country we hold dear.

| | I recently told you I had the privilege of speaking at a Wreaths Across America ceremony at Knoxville National Cemetery, the place where my father was laid to rest. This fantastic organization exists to ensure no veteran is forgotten during the holidays, but [Veteran’s Heritage Site Foundation](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ea9400a3f5b6474baaa53eb6abc884ee&_e=2qf6iy6qcOFmckS1JSI6bwBsNCzkbWFc-R70zRzF2uA9eDkXa2xZW5kLHpGe1pCS5zDTg2Eik_uREv3uxU-Bi5g77aqYWwnirNy7XUr9NTGnIEQQ8-NlsuIuajMnz__FpjOcytnVqCiMYEHbBKmcHTR1qIHdbb56Soa4XhlpUTsr9DJWEUHRmGfSNv0z251P_A68bgHF6ZR7UUbpaD5ivIu_UndcNXtOrowYp5U3OY4%3D) goes the extra mile (literally) to fulfill that promise. Deep in the Smoky Mountains, there are veterans’ gravesites that can only be reached by foot. Each year, the organization sends a group of volunteer hikers to trek as far as 17 miles to lay wreaths on these hidden headstones. Some even require a GPS device to locate. This group’s efforts are commendable, and I’m grateful to be from a state that produces this type of patriotism. May we all be inspired by their commitment to honoring our nation’s heroes!
