| | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. Trump Re: 2023 -- a dark year for America
---
Dear Patriot,

---
With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in just DAYS, I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year - _one of the darkest years in American history_.
---
All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much _GREAT AGAIN!_
---
But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, _that_ is the ultimate crime.
---
**In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the _leading_ 2024 presidential candidate (_yours truly_) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the _" corporate death penalty"_ against me and my family. **
---
It might be hard to believe given what you've witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life...
---
_... Even the media said nice things about me! _
---
But then, I did something they couldn't possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones.
---
I chose _**YOU**_**** - the _PEOPLE!_
---
I chose to put _AMERICA_ FIRST.
---
I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State.
---
And if I could go back and do it all over again, _I wouldn 't have it any other way! _
---
**Remember, they 're not really coming after me, Patriot, they're coming after **_**YOU**_**. I 'm just standing in their way - ****_and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way._**
---
Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of _**LEGAL**_****_**WARFARE**_ imaginable to try and stop us.
---
**But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will** _**NEVER**_**,**_**_EVER_**_****_**SURRENDER**_**our country to their tyranny!**
---
_And I know that patriots like YOU won 't either..._
---

clean_body: Sharing my 2023 reflections with you... Sharing my 2023 reflections with you... | | | | | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. Trump Re: 2023 -- a dark year for America Dear Patriot, With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in just DAYS, I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year - one of the darkest years in American history. All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much GREAT AGAIN! But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, that is the ultimate crime. In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the leading 2024 presidential candidate (yours truly) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the " corporate death penalty" against me and my family. It might be hard to believe given what you've witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life... ... Even the media said nice things about me! But then, I did something they couldn't possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones. I chose YOU** - the PEOPLE! I chose to put AMERICA FIRST. I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State. And if I could go back and do it all over again, I wouldn 't have it any other way! Remember, they 're not really coming after me, Patriot, they're coming after YOU. I 'm just standing in their way - **and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way. Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of LEGAL**WARFARE imaginable to try and stop us. But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will NEVER,EVER_SURRENDERour country to their tyranny! And I know that patriots like YOU won 't either... | Come November 5, WE THE PEOPLE will PROVE that good and honest Americans had the courage to peacefully cast off the Radical Democrat regime that is destroying our country from within, and replace it with a government that serves and protects YOU. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump | | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. body:
The NRA is the weakest it's EVER been. Help us take them on.
#

We've got some breaking news, team:
**Wayne LaPierre, longtime CEO and Executive Vice President of the NRA, just announced that he is resigning from his position. This announcement comes just days before his corruption trial in New York begins.**
Today, we’ve defeated the man in charge of one of the largest special interest groups in the country. It’s more evident than ever that our movement to end gun violence has the momentum to drown out the gun lobby and their dangerous “guns everywhere” agenda.
[**Will you step up and make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your donation at this pivotal moment will be put right to work in our fight against the NRA.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240105-2-subs&t=1&akid=7333%2E3935704%2Eykz_k3)

Riddled with scandal, fraud, and misconduct, the NRA is the weakest it’s ever been. In 2018, the NRA had 5.5 million members. But since its 2019 corruption scandal, NRA membership has dropped to 4.2 million members, the lowest since 2012.

name: Joe Biden
subject: Valley Forge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Is democracy still America’s sacred cause? | | |
---
Peter, I have been reflecting. I just visited the grounds of Valley Forge and gave a speech about the future of our democracy. I wanted to share some of my thoughts directly with you. Valley Forge tells the story of the pain, suffering, and true patriotism it took to make America. The mission of Valley Forge -- and questions asked -- are similar to those today.**Is democracy still America’s sacred cause?** This isn’t rhetorical, academic, or hypothetical. Whether democracy is still America’s sacred cause is the most urgent question of our time. _It’s what the 2024 election is all about._ **For me, the choice is clear: Donald Trump’s campaign is all about him. It’s not about America and not about _you._** His campaign is obsessed with the past, not the future. He is willing to sacrifice our democracy to put _himself_ in power. **Our campaign is different. Our campaign is about all of us. It’s about OUR future together. Today at Valley Forge, we found ourselves in a new year -- some 246 years later -- just one day before January 6. A date forever seared into our memory because that was the day America nearly lost it all.
To think that some 246 years ago, George Washington was at the height of his power having just defeated the most powerful empire on Earth. He could have held onto that power as long as he wanted. But, that wasn’t the America he and the American troops of Valley Forge had fought for.
**In America, our leaders don’t hold on to power relentlessly. Our leaders return power to the people -- willingly. You do your duty and serve your country. And ours is a country worthy of service.**
That’s the America I see in our future and I’ve never been more optimistic in our ability to stay true to that sacred cause.
Thank you for being a part of it.
Joe
Joe Biden

clean_body: Is democracy still America’s sacred cause? | | | Peter, I have been reflecting. I just visited the grounds of Valley Forge and gave a speech about the future of our democracy. I wanted to share some of my thoughts directly with you. Valley Forge tells the story of the pain, suffering, and true patriotism it took to make America. The mission of Valley Forge -- and questions asked -- are similar to those today.Is democracy still America’s sacred cause? This isn’t rhetorical, academic, or hypothetical. Whether democracy is still America’s sacred cause is the most urgent question of our time. It’s what the 2024 election is all about. For me, the choice is clear: Donald Trump’s campaign is all about him. It’s not about America and not about you. His campaign is obsessed with the past, not the future. He is willing to sacrifice our democracy to put himself in power. Our campaign is different. Our campaign is about all of us. It’s about OUR future together. And preserving and strengthening OUR democracy. Peter, no matter how different our campaigns may be, we cannot forget what is at stake if we do not succeed. Three years ago tomorrow we saw with our own eyes a violent mob storm the United States Capitol. For the first time in our history, insurrectionists had come to stop the peaceful transfer of power in America. All because Donald Trump’s lies had brought the mob to Washington. He promised it would be “wild” -- and it was. He told the crowd to fight like hell -- and all hell was unleashed. He promised he would be right with them side-by-side. Then -- as usual -- he left others to do his dirty work. HE retreated to the White House. The entire nation watched in horror. The whole world watched in disbelief.And Trump did nothing. It was among the worst derelictions of duty by a President in American history. An attempt to overturn a free and fair election by force and violence. body:
In case you missed it | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f935af537b16/drill-baby-drill-12674238?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| **Hey Peter

I wanted to make sure you saw this, Elizabeth got a HUGE endorsement. Wanted to make sure you saw it. **

This is just the tip of the iceberg, with more big news to come
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=cd5c279f9d&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Peter,
---
| | The **Oil & Gas Workers Association (OGWA)**, a powerhouse in the fight for energy jobs and independence, has officially endorsed Elizabeth Helgelien for Congress in Nevada's 3rd Congressional District. [But have you endorsed Elizabeth yet?](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=aa9eb04d57&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| [****](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=76562288c2&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| **Here's the unvarnished truth from OGWA's President, Matt Coday:**
_"Our jobs, families, states, and nation are under attack every day. Extracting Nevada’s vast natural resources and supporting USA oil and gas jobs requires elected representatives with the political will to fight for American energy dominance. Elizabeth Helgelien is an experienced oil and gas professional who understands costly, unnecessary 'environmental' regulations hinder USA job growth. Elizabeth is committed to growing our economy, securing our borders, and restoring our national security. Oil & Gas Workers Association proudly endorses Elizabeth Helgelien for Congress and encourages all citizens in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District to support her with your vote. God bless you! God bless America!"_
---
|
---
| [Join OGWA and ENDORSE Elizabeth](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=2497c96d96&e=54a81bd33c "Join OGWA and ENDORSE Elizabeth")
---
| This endorsement is a testament to Elizabeth's relentless drive to champion policies that fuel American job growth and not just secure our energy independence but also become energy dominant. In a time when our energy sector is under siege by shortsighted policies and “Green New Deal” pipe dreams, Elizabeth stands as a guardian of American jobs.
---
| **Steve Walsh**
Senior Strategist
Elizabeth Helgelien Campaign
[**ElizabethForNV.com**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=0c949410eb&e=54a81bd33c)

P.S. [Your contribution, no matter the size, is the ammunition we need](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=b1282cb430&e=54a81bd33c) to keep pushing forward. It's about protecting jobs, families, and the very future of American energy. Let's not give ground to those who would see us dependent and diminished.

Thank you for standing with us in this crucial battle. Together, we will ensure that America remains a beacon of strength, prosperity, and energy independence.

---
|
---

clean_body: In case you missed it | | | | Hey Peter I wanted to make sure you saw this, Elizabeth got a HUGE endorsement. Wanted to make sure you saw it. This is just the tip of the iceberg, with more big news to come | | | Peter, | | The Oil & Gas Workers Association (OGWA), a powerhouse in the fight for energy jobs and independence, has officially endorsed Elizabeth Helgelien for Congress in Nevada's 3rd Congressional District. | | Here's the unvarnished truth from OGWA's President, Matt Coday: "Our jobs, families, states, and nation are under attack every day. Extracting Nevada’s vast natural resources and supporting USA oil and gas jobs requires elected representatives with the political will to fight for American energy dominance. Elizabeth Helgelien is an experienced oil and gas professional who understands costly, unnecessary 'environmental' regulations hinder USA job growth. Elizabeth is committed to growing our economy, securing our borders, and restoring our national security. Oil & Gas Workers Association proudly endorses Elizabeth Helgelien for Congress and encourages all citizens in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District to support her with your vote. God bless you! God bless America!" | | "Join OGWA and ENDORSE Elizabeth" | This endorsement is a testament to Elizabeth's relentless drive to champion policies that fuel American job growth and not just secure our energy independence but also become energy dominant. In a time when our energy sector is under siege by shortsighted policies and “Green New Deal” pipe dreams, Elizabeth stands as a guardian of American jobs. | Steve Walsh Senior Strategist Elizabeth Helgelien Campaign P.S. to keep pushing forward. It's about protecting jobs, families, and the very future of American energy. Let's not give ground to those who would see us dependent and diminished. Thank you for standing with us in this crucial battle. Together, we will ensure that America remains a beacon of strength, prosperity, and energy independence. | | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada" | | Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. name: Andy Kim
subject: E Pluribus Unum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| **[I want to talk a little bit about why tomorrow’s anniversary of January 6th is so important to me. But first, we’re in a fight to restore trust in our democracy, and I need to ask if you would consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Sharice Davids to help our grassroots movements.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76571620/447819717/1516808266?amount=20&source=EM_NBI_SD_20240105_FR_1.1_0_1MO_surrogate_NA_NA_kimsplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODI3NTJhYS0xOWFjLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUvFWHh0oNP8X8tKAJsLoRvu0pY5voStdCM02_YY0qk=)**

The most vivid memory I have of Jan 6 is the moment I returned to the House chamber after the riot had been quelled. I stepped over broken glass to get into the chamber. What ensued over the next hour was the most powerful experience of my career.

People spoke with hushed whispers. We touched each other’s shoulders gently with comfort as if at a funeral. Everyone was still in a daze, swimming in uncertainty of the moment. I took a seat along the center aisle as the speeches began.

I glanced around the room.

Could it happen again? Would we finally unite? For a brief moment I thought what happened would be a shock to the system, like a defibrillator pulling our country back into rhythm. The speeches were raw, talking about the need to pull together.

_But then something changed._

When speeches switched back to the electoral college debate, I felt the energy in the room shift. I watched people pull out the same speech about election fraud they were going to give before, as if the riot never happened. The prospect of unity lasted only a few minutes.

That was when I knew the events of the day wouldn’t create the unifying moment we needed. The shock of Jan 6 was not enough to shatter the Big Lie. **Many ask me if my colleagues who spout the Big Lie somehow believe what they say. At that moment I knew for certain they did. They believed every single word.**

I couldn’t watch, and headed for the doors in disgust. While the riot damaged our Capitol, I felt that the scene I just witnessed would ultimately do more harm. The lasting damage of January 6 was not the roaring riot, but the selfish silence and purposeful amnesia afterwards.

I walked out the center doors of the House chamber, the same doors that Presidents walk through to give the State of the Union. Just hours earlier, they’d been smashed and barricaded. Security officers had drawn their guns. Again, guns were drawn on the House floor.

As I walked the halls away from the chamber I kept thinking, maybe our nation lost its ability to be shocked. After a pandemic and now January 6, could something actually shock us to the point where we rediscover our shared identity and common good, like our nation has in the past?

Then I reached the Rotunda. To see that room – the most beautiful room in the most beautiful building in America – desecrated and strewn with trash, broke my heart. I got on my knees and started to pick up.

As I cleaned up the debris, I wandered down a side hall and saw a plaque: “Beneath this tablet the cornerstone...was laid by George Washington.” I stood there holding a bag of torn flags and broken glass, reminded that this building is bigger than all of us. I realized at that moment that I am but a mere caretaker of this building.

**This realization of being a caretaker fundamentally changed the way I see my job. Changed how I see the responsibility of being a citizen. Our democracy was handed to us, and on our watch we must do our best to preserve it and then pass it off to those that follow.**

I've been fixated on a singular question: how do we heal this country?

I spent a year searching for the answer, and came to see that it was right above me painted at the center of the ceiling of the Capitol dome. **To heal is “E Pluribus Unum.”**

E Pluribus Unum. Out of many, one. Phrase expresses our nation’s goal but doesn’t tell us how. What makes the “many” become “one?” Unity doesn’t just happen on its own. We have to put in the work.

**Here’s what I know: It’s not too late to unite this country.** I was wrong to think unity needed a shock to the system to catalyze. We don’t need a shock. We need service.

Our job now is to be caretakers. Our job is to heal this country and hand it off to our successors. That’s why I’m running for Senate.

clean_body: | = The most vivid memory I have of Jan 6 is the moment I returned to the House chamber after the riot had been quelled. I stepped over broken glass to get into the chamber. What ensued over the next hour was the most powerful experience of my career. People spoke with hushed whispers. We touched each other’s shoulders gently with comfort as if at a funeral. Everyone was still in a daze, swimming in uncertainty of the moment. I took a seat along the center aisle as the speeches began. I glanced around the room. Could it happen again? Would we finally unite? For a brief moment I thought what happened would be a shock to the system, like a defibrillator pulling our country back into rhythm. The speeches were raw, talking about the need to pull together. But then something changed. When speeches switched back to the electoral college debate, I felt the energy in the room shift. I watched people pull out the same speech about election fraud they were going to give before, as if the riot never happened. The prospect of unity lasted only a few minutes. That was when I knew the events of the day wouldn’t create the unifying moment we needed. The shock of Jan 6 was not enough to shatter the Big Lie. Many ask me if my colleagues who spout the Big Lie somehow believe what they say. At that moment I knew for certain they did. They believed every single word. I couldn’t watch, and headed for the doors in disgust. While the riot damaged our Capitol, I felt that the scene I just witnessed would ultimately do more harm. The lasting damage of January 6 was not the roaring riot, but the selfish silence and purposeful amnesia afterwards. I walked out the center doors of the House chamber, the same doors that Presidents walk through to give the State of the Union. Just hours earlier, they’d been smashed and barricaded. Security officers had drawn their guns. Again, guns were drawn on the House floor. As I walked the halls away from the chamber I kept thinking, maybe our nation lost its ability to be shocked. After a pandemic and now January 6, could something actually shock us to the point where we rediscover our shared identity and common good, like our nation has in the past? Then I reached the Rotunda. To see that room – the most beautiful room in the most beautiful building in America – desecrated and strewn with trash, broke my heart. I got on my knees and started to pick up. As I cleaned up the debris, I wandered down a side hall and saw a plaque: “Beneath this tablet the cornerstone...was laid by George Washington.” I stood there holding a bag of torn flags and broken glass, reminded that this building is bigger than all of us. I realized at that moment that I am but a mere caretaker of this building. This realization of being a caretaker fundamentally changed the way I see my job. Changed how I see the responsibility of being a citizen. Our democracy was handed to us, and on our watch we must do our best to preserve it and then pass it off to those that follow. I've been fixated on a singular question: how do we heal this country? I spent a year searching for the answer, and came to see that it was right above me painted at the center of the ceiling of the Capitol dome. To heal is “E Pluribus Unum.” E Pluribus Unum. Out of many, one. Phrase expresses our nation’s goal but doesn’t tell us how. What makes the “many” become “one?” Unity doesn’t just happen on its own. We have to put in the work. Here’s what I know: It’s not too late to unite this country. I was wrong to think unity needed a shock to the system to catalyze. We don’t need a shock. We need service. Our job now is to be caretakers. Our job is to heal this country and hand it off to our successors. That’s why I’m running for Senate. = Thank you, Andy | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be splite between Andy Kim and Sharice Davids. | = | = | = | = | = | = * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. | | Peter, Tim Kaine wouldn’t last a day in battle.

He’s never spent a day fighting for anything but his special interest friends in Washington D.C. and his own political power.
My name is Hung Cao. I came to America as a legal refugee from Communist Vietnam, and the second I was old enough, I dedicated my life to fighting for our country.

**Unlike Tim Kaine, I understand that freedom isn’t free. Every day, I see the radical Left and the D.C. establishment eroding the freedom my brothers and sisters in arms and I fought for, and I won’t take it sitting down.**

[ **I’m running for the U.S. Senate because we need leaders in Washington DC, not career politicians.**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=dfba9746d7a446d79c48b99237371301&_e=te43jLlJ4kCYU3Gv_ijFCqcnRnTrrf5YN_ig6E3iQpvCRG_Dvt_bXCTIYnkQA40XpYPA3Ofjj5YSFMsN92uQ7cHXQk3WdszdF6d0GH6_lZjwYlPhtXJu2t3fDfiKHxTPC17J2pqpitlnArMvMSLStTm-m5rGjllmtG6LN48_6lXDw1b_HGy2A6RNrDJ8idrku3x32T7VPkYbMJqgvffLoQbbhdom6Qmmrq03PQwoxKvDmF5yTvHp_hcWI4AfiI3LVvruFfKVcSnuqjZdAZP-lPlzZgvgatFOTvR-vyvKq91S3LgbufCyQSWrWi9w9W1xG-d4ixeMEUu4faHENXhS97Jk-ZATAIAAoXsZ75qDxhXeutaTWabXUKe-Zv-B7Lfp)

My name is Hung Cao. I came to America as a legal refugee from Communist Vietnam, and the second I was old enough, I dedicated my life to fighting for our country. Unlike Tim Kaine, I understand that freedom isn’t free. Every day, I see the radical Left and the D.C. establishment eroding the freedom my brothers and sisters in arms and I fought for, and I won’t take it sitting down. For too long, Virginia has been represented in the Capitol by D.C. politicians backed by billionaires and special interests. I can tell you right now: I won’t answer to anyone but the people of our Commonwealth. Taking on Tim Kaine won’t be easy; he has the entire political establishment on his side. | | Happy New Year, Peter! I’ve got amazing news: **We hit our End-of-Year goal just before midnight on Sunday.** I wish I could thank every one of you personally. But instead, I hope you’ll accept this thank you note as proof of how much I appreciate your support. This campaign is driven by our grassroots team, and with your help I’ll look forward to talking with you in communities of all sizes and types throughout our state to continue to learn more about the issues affecting our families. We can now count on _just one hand_ the number of months left until our election, and I am so glad to have you by my side. Marylanders are looking for someone who will be a steadfast protector of our fundamental rights, who will fight to make sure that women have the right to choose and who will ensure that our families have the support they need to thrive. I know what our families need, and I’ll look forward to meeting yours in the coming weeks. Together, let’s go farther and do better in 2024. Yours truly, Angela Alsobrooks | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9353?t=9&amount=25&akid=818%2E52803%2EASsmqr)

Thank YOU. THANK YOU.** Because of you, we were able to reach our end-of-year fundraising goal. This was the most amazing way to end a year full of wins! From protecting abortion rights to defending the ballot measure process to helping several campaigns launch their 2024 ballot measures, 2023 was a year bigger than we could have ever imagined. The fight doesn’t end there, though. We’re ready to continue to bring progressive policies to this country — one ballot measure at a time. And this year will be a big one: reproductive freedom, direct democracy, and workers’ benefits are all on the line this November. We’re ready to fight tooth and nail to push past the partisan gridlock to deliver the change people want to see in their communities. Happy New Year, and thank you for helping us keep up the good fight. — The Fairness Project

A week after taking... | | Katie publishes book offering advice on tackling challenges Katie Britt doesn’t so much walk into a room as she bursts upon the scene, and her arrival at a recent signing event for her new memoir, God Calls Us to Do Hard Things: Lessons from the Alabama Wiregrass, was no exception. One moment, a queue of signature seekers awaited... | | Katie sponsors 200 bills in first year in office This week, I marked the one-year anniversary of my swearing-in to the United States Senate, capping a whirlwind twelve months of work on behalf of the people of Alabama. I’m proud of the fact that my team and I were able to hit the ground running on day one, working diligently not only to deliver real results for our state, but also lead the fight for our foundational... | | | | | Alabama First Coffee Mug Alabama values. Alabama first. Claim your EXCLUSIVE coffee mug to show your Yellowhammer State pride! | | Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 27488 | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This is what we’re fighting for.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Peter,
I’m running for U.S. Senate because I want everyday Missourians to call the shots in our country — not giant corporations or the cowards like Josh Hawley that they’ve bought off in Washington. **This email is long, but will you please let me explain?**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42255?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl)**
**When I came home between deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, it was clear to me that Missouri is on the frontlines of the fight for power in our country.**
While communities like mine all across our state were stripped for parts, corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley attacked workers with anti-union schemes like “Right-to-Work” and fought to block wage increases for Missouri families — all to enrich multinational corporations and mega-donors who bankroll their campaigns and their careers.
They helped Wall Street financiers sell off our farmland to billionaires in China and Brazil — devastating rural communities and contributing to the closure of 90% of Missouri hog producers in a single generation.
One of Missouri’s oldest and largest employers, Anheuser-Busch, was sold to a Belgian conglomerate — costing Missouri more than a thousand jobs.
Missouri-based Monsanto, one of the world’s most important agrochemical and biotechnology companies, was sold to Germany — eliminating even more jobs.
And as dozens more headquarters have been taken out of state, politicians in power like Josh Hawley were happy to sit back and watch it happen.
**Manufacturing, agriculture, production — they’re shipping it all away to foreign oligarchs who don’t care about working people in our state.** And while our communities were getting gutted, these same politicians voted time and time again to spend trillions of dollars and thousands of lives on overseas wars that got their Big Oil friends rich.
These politicians have spent decades sparking phony culture wars to distract and divide our families. They’ve become so obsessed with controlling our lives, they made Missouri the first state in the nation to ban abortion — without exceptions for victims of rape or incest.
**Our state deserves a Senator who will stand up and fight for it, not run for the exit like Josh Hawley — and I’m ready to serve.[So if you’re ready to elect a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, will you please rush a donation of any amount toward my grassroots campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42255?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42256?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42256?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42255?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl)
---
We aren’t fighting the corporate status quo just to make a point, either. **This is a race we really can win.**
Our values have won at the ballot box in Missouri for referendums that go beyond what’s happening nowadays in Washington, or even what political elites in Jefferson City are willing to allow.
For the last three election cycles, Missouri voters have side-stepped our politicians by voting to increase the minimum wage well above the federal level, expand health care, repeal an anti-worker “Right-to-Work” scheme, legalize weed, and enact more protections against political corruption with wide margins.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42255?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl)
**So now, we’re building a record-breaking, people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley and take this Senate seat back for working Missourians.**
Together, we’re going to stop printing money for Wall Street and start funding our schools enough to get Missouri out of last place for starting teacher pay.
We’re going to abolish corporate PACs and demand a government that safeguards our democracy and holds corrupt politicians accountable.
We’re going to take back Missouri farmland for Missouri farmers and start manufacturing essential drugs right here in America.
We’re going to build an economy that puts American workers and small businesses in charge, not giant corporations and foreign oligarchs — an economy that invests in putting America first in the next generation of energy, semiconductors, and supply chain independence.
We’re going to put an end to pointless, trillion-dollar wars and invest in a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a historic investment in our workers and communities to rebuild our forgotten towns and cities, and to finally start making stuff in America again.
And we’re going to finally put everyday Missourians in charge of their own neighborhoods, workplaces, and bodies.
**It’s time to take our power back — and we can’t do it without your support.[So please, will you rush a donation of absolutely any amount to my campaign today? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race so you’ll always know I’m fighting for everyday, working people in the U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42255?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42256?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42256?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42256?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42256?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42256?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42256?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42255?refcode=em20240105-4546&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl)
---
Thank you for everything, Peter.
Now let’s get moving,
Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240105-4546-footer&t=15&refcode2=4546_614464_pMl5gl&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=4546%2E614464%2EpMl5gl). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: Team Gallego
subject: The Senate is no place for Kari Lake
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Kari Lake hasn’t stopped spreading the same lies that caused the insurrection in the first place.
#

Peter:
Before the third anniversary of January 6th, we wanted to remind you that Kari Lake hasn’t stopped spreading the same lies that caused the insurrection in the first place.
She’s just getting started:
* She has called on the Republican controlled House to decertify the results of the 2020 election and hold a new one.

* She called for political violence when Trump was federally indicted.

* She never conceded defeat after losing her campaign for governor in 2022.

* And after losing multiple lawsuits over her baseless election claims, she continues to file more.

She really believes this stuff.
The worst thing — **the WORST thing** — that we could do would be to treat Kari Lake as too extreme, too radical to win. Never forget that she lost by less than one percent of the votes in 2022. Arizona will be just as close in 2024 — if not closer.
If she and Donald Trump win and take power... well, we better do whatever we can to make sure they don’t.
[**So we’re asking for $3 because Kari Lake is a real threat to our democracy. $3 because Arizona always comes down to just a few thousand votes. $3 because Arizona will be one of the most expensive races in the country, and we need to raise millions more to defeat her.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240105-2-30&t=1&akid=1659%2E734936%2EmHZ6lZ)

✖️ Cutting Social Security and Medicare
✖️ Trying to ban books

clean_body: It may be a new year, but Republicans are making it clear that their extreme agenda isn’t going anywhere. = It may be a new year, but Republicans are making it clear that their extreme agenda isn't going anywhere. Instead of trying to deliver for the American people, the House GOP is more concerned with: ✖️ Attacking reproductive freedom ✖️ Cutting Social Security and Medicare ✖️ Trying to ban books ✖️ Targeting the LGBTQ+ community = ******** ****** | ******=****** Here’s the bad news: If Republicans succeed in flipping OR-06 and maintaining control of the House, they’ll have another two years to pass as much extreme, far-right legislation as possible. The good news? The path to the House Majority runs through Oregon, and it starts with keeping our district blue. With just five seats standing between Democrats and the House Majority, it’s more important than ever to defend competitive districts like ours, and ensure we have what it takes to defeat extremist Republicans this fall. = – Team Salinas ********** | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. | | Peter — When we launched this campaign on the idea that our country needs a new generation of common-sense, solutions-oriented leadership in Congress, I knew we were onto something. Since that day, **thousands of people have joined this movement to fight for real, lasting change in our community.** I've heard the struggles of small business owners. I've seen firsthand how challenges outside of the classroom are holding kids and their families back. I've experienced the devastating effects of climate change on our community, and I know our kids deserve a planet and a future they can thrive in. These problems won't disappear overnight, which is why together we're going to bring a new generation of leadership to Washington. Over the next 60 days, I am ready to knock on doors, hand out yard signs, and meet with voters across the district because **I'm ready to continue this work in Congress as a strong voice on the issues that matter most to our families and communities.** And I wouldn't have gotten this far without your support, Peter. I'm excited to stand at your side as we continue this fight, and together, we can take the fight to Congress for you, for your kids, and for our future. name: James Carville
subject: The whole country stands right here on the tipping point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Help Bob bring it home in the new year by becoming a 2024 Founding Donor.
Carville here.
**I’ve got to tell you: If we lose Pennsylvania, Democrats will blow a gasket.**
THIS IS IT. The whole country stands right here on the tipping point, and there’s absolutely no way we keep the Senate without PA. That’s just a fact.
That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to re-elect my dear friend Bob Casey. But at the same time, Mitch McConnell and his cronies are doing everything in THEIR power to flip this seat and retake the Senate majority.
They’re gearing up to flood PA with millions upon millions of dollars in attacks, and Bob’s opponent has the resources to self-fund his campaign. We can’t compete with that kind of money without your help, Peter. Bob is counting on grassroots support to keep PA and the Senate blue.
[**With the future of the country depending on Pennsylvania, will you become a 2024 Founding Donor to Bob’s re-election campaign today? His team still needs 2,400 more people to chip in before their deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240105-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240105-2&refcode2=1601_552475_PhMnU_&akid=1601%2E552475%2EPhMnU_)

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: Wow.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This is what a true grassroots movement looks like — fighting for truth, justice, and our constitution.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4982%2E5257348%2EORs7w4)
We wanted you to be the first to know, Derek — our campaign just published our fundraising numbers from the last quarter of 2023. Take a look:
**Nearly $6.3 million** raised.
**$0** from corporate PACs.
Over **93,000** unique donors.
Over **182,000** donations.
With an average contribution of just **$32**.
Across every single county in California and every corner of our country, people stepped up in support of Adam’s campaign — chipping in what you can, when you can — to protect our democracy. _And 95% of contributions were under $100._
**Wow.**
This is what a true grassroots movement looks like — fighting for truth, justice, and our constitution.
Early voting in our March 5 Primary Election is just weeks away. And the polls are still very close. But we’re building the momentum we need to help Adam win this race and address the cost of living, defend our democracy, and fight for an economy that works for everyone.
**Thanks to your support, our campaign is entering this final quarter before the Primary Election with momentum.** But we can’t take our foot off the gas now — nothing in this race is guaranteed, and we need to finish strong.
Derek, thank you for everything you’re doing to help us continue to build the largest grassroots campaign in the history of California so we can win this Senate race.
— Schiff HQ
**[P.S. — We need your support _today_ to reach more California voters. Please chip in $32, our average donation amount, or anything you can spare in support of Adam’s movement for California. These last few weeks before the election are make-or-break for us.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3189?c0=jan2024_abs_em.ZEhdGi&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240105_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4982%2E5257348%2EORs7w4)**

Across every single county in California and every corner of our country, people stepped up in support of Adam’s campaign — chipping in what you can, when you can — to protect our democracy. And 95% of contributions were under $100. Wow. This is what a true grassroots movement looks like — fighting for truth, justice, and our constitution. Early voting in our March 5 Primary Election is just weeks away. And the polls are still very close. But we’re building the momentum we need to help Adam win this race and address the cost of living, defend our democracy, and fight for an economy that works for everyone. Thanks to your support, our campaign is entering this final quarter before the Primary Election with momentum. But we can’t take our foot off the gas now — nothing in this race is guaranteed, and we need to finish strong. Derek, thank you for everything you’re doing to help us continue to build the largest grassroots campaign in the history of California so we can win this Senate race. — Schiff HQ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

subject: Primaries on the horizon

body:
Our victories depend on the work we put in today.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240105-3359-footer&t=1&akid=3359%2E420207%2EG5WCoI)
Peter,
Washington State primaries will come up quickly this year. So it’s crucial we kick off our fundraising and solidify our tools and resources ahead of the fast-approaching election season.
[**Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount to help us build our GOTV and outreach resources?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240105.Kv4PpG&refcode=em20240105-3359&t=2&akid=3359%2E420207%2EG5WCoI)

The truth is, _we’re going up against a lot_ _, Peter._ Whether it is the Republican donors at AIPAC or the shenanigans at No Labels, there is a lot at stake this year. But Pramila has never let big money in politics slow her down before — and we must continue to show up for her now.
From on-the-ground outreach efforts to fundraising events to community canvassing — we’re gearing up to ensure that Pramila and our Democratic base have the support we need to win in 2024.
**Our victories later this year depend on the work we put in today.**
**[Chip in today to continue powering Pramila’s work in Congress and strengthening our Democratic base from the ground up ahead of the 2024 elections.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240105.Kv4PpG&refcode=em20240105-3359&t=22&akid=3359%2E420207%2EG5WCoI)**

Please accept your invitation before midnight tonight: ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION: Friend, Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running to defeat Rick Scott in Florida. Her race is already shaping up to be one of the closest elections this year — and the results could determine whether or not Democrats maintain our Senate majority! With so much at stake, Debbie needs to hear from YOU. Rick Scott is a multi-millionaire who can bankroll his campaign at a moment's notice. Last time around, he spent a massive $64 MILLION to win this seat. The only way to compete with his endless resources is by building a strong, united grassroots movement. That's why we've created an exclusive Advisory Board Survey for grassroots activists to help shape our strategy and make their voices heard. We specifically chose you to represent 34223 in this survey given your strong record of support for Democrats. But this survey closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and you still haven't accepted your invite! | | | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

**Here’s the situation – we're in a high-stakes, tightly contested race to fill the seat being vacated by retiring Democratic Rep. Dan Kildee.** To win, it's vital that we show the strength of our grassroots support now.

**This isn't just another election; it’s a battle for the values we hold dear in Michigan and across the nation. While my National Republicans are going to invest heavily in this race, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to build a strong, people-powered campaign.**

Holding this seat is critical to protect if we want to flip the House blue in 2024. Will we stand for the Michigan Dream – a promise of hard work leading to a better life – or will we let divisive politics prevail?

[_**We have to hit the ground running to make sure we can keep this seat blue, and every contribution matters. Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=2e0c26bd401e4fc3b6b465732eb8e160&_e=B4B2sfbcuWRJwHRtwB36BbCbnPApw0o7qxX3eFyhdS3ln8IaaCapuT6qJFRyM811sO6z8lsh4tKknE1UhufSQRVBoqMWG3bWPhjcsDPpgEUCZP-nReMvcF7lVHWoVQgGvtlHd6GN20dTUYH84RAFp1XRlGIuXzKSabW-xYY1CQxGHX8q4hEjNuEzAQbwV1ksUvptLe_6-PzrvMaH_qIeAfJjaF1Itc-aJ9Sqwgz89nMES7B4fw2HxIRSXy3Q4Q-OU5Tvyr_LtWNce-Z0DNNYzn8fvONCUzQl6-HYP2KRO6l1h-yaP-o6D7Y6UnWRpGST0o801U29bwyUte91BohED_MsOz-RX3mg2Ssn9ujNnK0n_-byfYh-YdkGFpN_-BDCprAYOceSKkN_2Ljn_2r-_g%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=2e0c26bd401e4fc3b6b465732eb8e160&_e=B4B2sfbcuWRJwHRtwB36BbCbnPApw0o7qxX3eFyhdS3ln8IaaCapuT6qJFRyM811sO6z8lsh4tKknE1UhufSQRVBoqMWG3bWPhjcsDPpgEUCZP-nReMvcF7lVHWoVQgGvtlHd6GN20dTUYH84RAFp1XRlGIuXzKSabW-xYY1CQxGHX8q4hEjNuEzAQbwV1ksUvptLe_6-PzrvMaH_qIeAfJjaF1Itc-aJ9Sqwgz89nMES7B4fw2HxIRSXy3Q4Q-OEPCC8abebf5LgHn8lAKR8qg_yn1rEg7Gzsa3b3JRc-5mcbCc6n-JKpp5VfalW6SDzGcyIJ0w3X3NKixNqM1dbS4BzuBbfVu_bPs5V4chsrR0wotuZyFEoiv2CeJ2K5YRVoaREVT_48BF-zOJ__S0Kg%3D%3D)

Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today.

I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals.

I intend to make you proud.

God Bless,

Jim Banks

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
Watch my message for you >>>

| [ ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=de585daf1d444c37ad396127f35fa4b6&_e=hNDlgzyfJ1e5Rs3golLfndxzzou9biDQcwAXbyS5xA4nBvnIHi_5aMXXODDDXzy9V1EqTYwK-RYLyTDBeRRSkQxG7gMTMbw0mKyoWjdF12fwRyxIZhNIEHMlSV9XgjcZ7MplweLDCuGnmdHnjOANm8VN1uney2G7tGn_8xMSsiW59_6mO71MQ1yoXconkF4Q_GXztok61qJFdEXvIZF9CocmpXEHQmYWHI3QaM_Nd0UhrOS1mwAxzKKqAioLsjD3VOvMpCixuAF2KCu9cfnGXGDHP-cFn-noO85e6aK-VfNHzWkLDM51gmHN8yR-9cOg)

Fellow American, I am proud to be one of the most conservative members of Congress, and I am honored to have had your support in the fight to save our country. But our work taking on the Washington Establishment is not finished. Our country is at a crossroads, and only the America First Movement can save it and **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.** **_That's why I'm running for re-election in 2024!_**
| | | [ **↓ ↓↓ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO ↓↓↓** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=de585daf1d444c37ad396127f35fa4b6&_e=hNDlgzyfJ1e5Rs3golLfndxzzou9biDQcwAXbyS5xA4nBvnIHi_5aMXXODDDXzy9V1EqTYwK-RYLyTDBeRRSkQxG7gMTMbw0mKyoWjdF12fwRyxIZhNIEHMlSV9XgjcZ7MplweLDCuGnmdHnjOANm8VN1uney2G7tGn_8xMSsiV1_iiPXhLyboEudXt7qRZllr0IRDIkVCAMLdJuwakTbOkriPmPU2W8CrvkHuNwEN3m6ui6gRz8B-AErx33Q70D-JFslulWpKMI1VR4fmluhVINeX5ItWeWblLm6LIbMWxpGqJKj0JEw3r3fW-2lZTt)

**Now more than ever, I need you to stand with me.** The attacks against me have only intensified since I announced my re-election campaign because Democrats know that I am a thorn in the side of the Biden administration and the Radical Left. Fellow American, they would love nothing more than to silence me and our movement. I will not back down, but I need resources to fight fire with fire, so it is crucial I do not fall short of my fundraising goals now as we rapidly approach election day. [**I invite you to support my campaign by chipping in whatever you can today and by sharing my announcement video with other grassroots conservatives.**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=de585daf1d444c37ad396127f35fa4b6&_e=hNDlgzyfJ1e5Rs3golLfndxzzou9biDQcwAXbyS5xA4nBvnIHi_5aMXXODDDXzy9V1EqTYwK-RYLyTDBeRRSkQxG7gMTMbw0mKyoWjdF12fwRyxIZhNIEHMlSV9XgjcZ7MplweLDCuGnmdHnjOANm8VN1uney2G7tGn_8xMSsiU7w5NsNnqF5oTjNzoDs4SmVhpKdgfe8QiKYTlxeIETx-JlQnmnDt1TFjnTg6jh7KUYPkQuK0FbkZbDDQs3TeQRiVL7WX7P_cnNFrKnSQtyWn0nk0UPBzqKR4f65Rf4gqebrAPECrAy3GwH2NRxiZt0) Every donation matters, and with the combined support of America First patriots from across the country, my team and I will have the resources to lead the fight to Save America! Your fellow patriot, **Rep. Mary Miller** Congresswoman, IL-15

Everything we do is only possible because of your support, so we’re counting on you to help us flip this seat. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Sam * | | = Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress Sam Eppler for Congress 3419 Westminster Ave Box #268 Dallas, TX 75205 United States | | ---|--- = = Communicating by email is a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with you, but if you no longer would like to receive emails, you can click here to

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: I can’t thank you enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
I know you heard a lot from my team and me last week, so I’m just reaching out to say thank you.

In a race as competitive as ours, reaching our fundraising goals is critical to keeping our campaign on track to win. And thanks to this grassroots team, we not only reached our end-of-year fundraising goal – we surpassed it! So once again, thank you.

My resolution for this year is clear: I plan to keep fighting for Oregon families, and I plan to flip this seat and deliver for our community in Congress.

We have a lot of work to do in 2024, and I can’t do it without you.

Thank you for being in this fight with me. Have a great New Year!

Janelle

P.S. Thanks to your support over the last few months, we were able to finish off 2023 strong. Help us start 2024 off on the right note by becoming one of our first donors of the year! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bynumq12024?refcode=em_eng_2024.01.04_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10]

Janelle Bynum is running for in Oregon's 5th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit JanelleBynum.com [https://www.janellebynum.com/] .

Hi there. Yes, it’s really me, Jane Fonda.

You might recognize me from the silver screen, but today, I write to you heart-to-heart as someone deeply invested in the well-being of our planet.

For decades, I've been moved by the beauty of our world and alarmed by its fragility. Each story of a vanishing species, and each report of another devastating wildfire, strikes a chord in my heart. I know you feel it too — the urgency, the responsibility. We're in this together, every step of the way.

**That’s exactly why I founded the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.**

It's not just another campaign for change; it’s a battle cry to save our beloved home. But to make real change, we need resources. And real progress requires funding and a united front from all of us. **_[Your donation, big or small, is more than a contribution. It's an investment in this critical fight. Can I count on your support?>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76573480/447825830/2105508926?refcode=ea.1eea581b-24ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.1eea581b-24ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlZWE1ODFiLTI0YWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WFIZwY9-Z2QL7YDX82eFfuPpOvZP6agPMit8vlSVoZs=)_**

Every donation fuels our mission to defeat fossil fuel supporters and elect bold leaders up and down the ballot in the 2024 elections. Leaders who prioritize our planet over profit and aren’t afraid to fight the influence of Big Oil.

It’s a huge year. So we want to expand our movement and get thousands of people involved in tackling the climate crisis – we're talking everything from knocking on doors to making phone calls, and loads more. It's all about making a big impact at the ballot box.

Just imagine a world free from the clutches of Big Oil's greed. That's the future we can build together. **_[So, I ask you again: can I count on you to chip in any amount today and help us protect our beautiful planet?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76573481/447825831/2105508926?refcode=ea.1eea581b-24ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.1eea581b-24ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFlZWE1ODFiLTI0YWMtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WFIZwY9-Z2QL7YDX82eFfuPpOvZP6agPMit8vlSVoZs=)_**

name: Team AOC
subject: Demand better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
When Alexandria won in 2018, her message inspired a lot of people. She was fearless in critiquing politics-as-usual. She proposed big, new ideas — like the Green New Deal — to tackle our most difficult challenges.
While Alexandria’s message resonated across the country, some Democratic Party leaders responded very differently. They called her ideas extreme and more than a few of them attacked her personally.
[We need to make it clear: there’s nothing wrong with new ideas and holding your own Party accountable. Will you make a $5 contribution today to show you stand with Alexandria and support pushing the Democratic Party forward?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240105.CmYyoc&refcode=em20240105-5594-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240105.CmYyoc&refcode=em20240105-5594-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ)**
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
Alexandria campaigned on expanding Medicare in order to make prescriptions more affordable. Now, Medicare has the power to negotiate prescription drugs — and insulin is capped at $35/ month. Alexandria’s Green New Deal was called pie-in-the-sky, but last year, Congress passed its largest ever investment to fight climate change — $369 billion. Now, Alexandria is fighting to ban trading stock for Members of Congress, after it was revealed that 277 lawmakers did not disclose individual stock investments in 2020 — and 75 of them directly profited from stocks in the companies that developed COVID-19 vaccines.1
[Every dollar, no matter the amount, shows widespread support for our progressive priorities from NY-14 and beyond.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240105.CmYyoc&refcode=em20240105-5594-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240105.CmYyoc&refcode=em20240105-5594-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ)**
Our sincerest thanks,
Team AOC

1 - [**Insider:** As the pandemic raged, at least 75 lawmakers bought and sold stock in companies that make COVID-19 vaccines, treatments, and tests](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10376?t=23&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240105?refcode=em20240105-5594-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&refcode2=5594_2526796_-Yg6aJ&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240105-5594-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=25&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=5594%2E2526796%2E-Yg6aJ)

We _can_ secure our razor-thin Senate majority, win back the House, and re-elect President Biden — but that won’t happen overnight. It has to start now, and it’s going to take good old-fashioned teamwork to do it. **[**So please, Peter, will you chip in $10 — $1 for every month left until Election Day — to help us beat the odds once again? It’s simple, Peter.

Republicans HAVE to take back the Senate in 2024.

There are only TWO Democrat seats up for grabs in states that Pres. Trump won in 2020 – one of them is Ohio.

That’s why every conservative who is sick and tired of the Biden fiasco MUST [**throw their support**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=05b0ca2204b546e3ae54b5c82079e868&_e=OPJ9kUQjyCScI9S4aByMLWJzdk2OcEW3m2Cwj1g5ZLe2pxAnv45l-mOpzK-iQzvsGTXkuOL3zi-eeQLpaqEYvInWQZJxYYIDibymWwIElaSTJGUm_pIBM2Y3vLSbRdShyJ6tpG3QtAApRE9F_jW6UoakXrVxE3x146cZoOx1vFs36ijv83k7Xwrqm83NgYS236cRNukoPW0b8_8iniyuSMJb5trK-O5mF3zCsI7FUZprzEhMfYmt3pnI5BHtIg7BNcIV4yGZLBx5X-TQN2a6gEKPTolqzvT7w1J6DWR9hvqOimLtUyl4Uxt2AqGnQYErGJK6Wwei7Blk4Dc0-Ya6gIKPhKGu0JAZ2NUmsHfX1KW46G_soGIie4ACvgSStJ0ATkAaZrE8NlI644KqC7k1oA%3D%3D) behind **Bernie Moreno** – the conservative fighter and political outsider running to flip Ohio’s Senate seat.

[ ** Sen. Lummis is on Team Moreno
JOIN THEM NOW! **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=05b0ca2204b546e3ae54b5c82079e868&_e=OPJ9kUQjyCScI9S4aByMLWJzdk2OcEW3m2Cwj1g5ZLe2pxAnv45l-mOpzK-iQzvsGTXkuOL3zi-eeQLpaqEYvInWQZJxYYIDibymWwIElaSTJGUm_pIBM2Y3vLSbRdShyJ6tpG3QtAApRE9F_jW6UoakXrVxE3x146cZoOx1vFs36ijv83k7Xwrqm83NgYS236cRNukoPW0b8_8iniyuSMJb5trK-O5mF3zCsI7FUZprzEhMfYmt3pnI5BHtIg7BLl5r9TyPVNgwQyH15CTKYQXFDSlNe1BvJWtJtVP396JXOPgYtpckyeUnQwY5lV9Y_UZXDwryNkXpNp_TxDHY5_gfW1rt5QoF7AA_xoNp-NMkKnW0wpGaBMfq-_Nwm9wyROfOThTUT0qT_ZhvPJ-b2A%3D%3D)
The choice to back Bernie is so obvious that Senators **J.D. Vance** , **Marco Rubio** , **Mike Lee** , and President **Donald Trump** have also thrown their hat in the ring for Bernie, and there will be more to come.

[**Will you rush at least $15 or more to right away to support Bernie’s campaign and their many efforts to flip this toss-up seat and restore conservative control of the Senate?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=05b0ca2204b546e3ae54b5c82079e868&_e=OPJ9kUQjyCScI9S4aByMLWJzdk2OcEW3m2Cwj1g5ZLe2pxAnv45l-mOpzK-iQzvsGTXkuOL3zi-eeQLpaqEYvInWQZJxYYIDibymWwIElaSTJGUm_pIBM2Y3vLSbRdShyJ6tpG3QtAApRE9F_jW6UoakXrVxE3x146cZoOx1vFs36ijv83k7Xwrqm83NgYS236cRNukoPW0b8_8iniyuSMJb5trK-O5mF3zCsI7FUZprzEhMfYmt3pnI5BHtIg7BvCpNazGsESI_zDuxB87hOaUZyM3eSTNpCefDsOGhAadaix0c2Wq-3pfF1eykhhhg5qcMt0AhTxCHUODN9ccm4jthIqVJUp5uF5pQSvtTJEPoAQgH4dAltqE1JN5TF4aB_cUabHCby67kUwAUGRyypg%3D%3D)

[ ** Throw your support behind Bernie! **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=05b0ca2204b546e3ae54b5c82079e868&_e=OPJ9kUQjyCScI9S4aByMLWJzdk2OcEW3m2Cwj1g5ZLe2pxAnv45l-mOpzK-iQzvsGTXkuOL3zi-eeQLpaqEYvInWQZJxYYIDibymWwIElaSTJGUm_pIBM2Y3vLSbRdShyJ6tpG3QtAApRE9F_jW6UoakXrVxE3x146cZoOx1vFs36ijv83k7Xwrqm83NgYS236cRNukoPW0b8_8iniyuSMJb5trK-O5mF3zCsI7FUZprzEhMfYmt3pnI5BHtIg7BpTqb9TtIOfGHvWKBoW46SAbDl80I7VNGpihdrXjWrlK_hG9KOu3pxpczshs1nCH4331dyYZZG9OFb_SkpRELBn_N-U6l9uUpfdvriz_zXygTtUpv_3CjD-t1pV2jcCnzvT8isgjNVX-Nb2HPRotWQg%3D%3D)
